verses.text: When it sees them from a distant place, they hear its raging and roaring.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ مِنْهَا مَكَانًا ضَيِّقًا مُّقَرَّنِينَ دَعَوْا۟ هُنَالِكَ ثُبُورًا
verses.text: And when they are cast, shackled, into a tight place therein, there they plead for demise.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا تَدْعُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ثُبُورًا وَٰحِدًا وَٱدْعُوا۟ ثُبُورًا كَثِيرًا
verses.text: “Do not call pl for one demise today, but call for many demises.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ أَمْ جَنَّةُ ٱلْخُلْدِ ٱلَّتِى وُعِدَ ٱلْمُتَّقُونَ ۚ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَزَآءً وَمَصِيرًا
verses.text: Say sg , “Is that better or the Garden of Eternity promised to the ones who were mindful (of God) ? For them it has always been a repayment anda destiny.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّهُمْ فِيهَا مَا يَشَآءُونَ خَـٰلِدِينَ ۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ وَعْدًا مَّسْـُٔولًا
verses.text: They have therein whatever they desire, as they abide. That has always been your sg Lord’s promise, (worthy) to be requested.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَوْمَ يَحْشُرُهُمْ وَمَا يَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَيَقُولُ ءَأَنتُمْ أَضْلَلْتُمْ عِبَادِى هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ أَمْ هُمْ ضَلُّوا۟ ٱلسَّبِيلَ
verses.text: And on the day when He 1 herds them and what they worship apart from Allah, then He says 2 , “Was it you pl who misguided these servants of Mine, or was it they who strayed from the way?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَكَ مَا كَانَ يَنۢبَغِى لَنَآ أَن نَّتَّخِذَ مِن دُونِكَ مِنْ أَوْلِيَآءَ وَلَـٰكِن مَّتَّعْتَهُمْ وَءَابَآءَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ نَسُوا۟ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَكَانُوا۟ قَوْمًۢا بُورًا
verses.text: They said 1 , “Highly Exalted are You. We should not have taken any 2 masters apart from You. But you allowed them to enjoy, as well as their fathers, until they forgot the Reminder and became a ruined people.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوكُم بِمَا تَقُولُونَ فَمَا تَسْتَطِيعُونَ صَرْفًا وَلَا نَصْرًا ۚ وَمَن يَظْلِم مِّنكُمْ نُذِقْهُ عَذَابًا كَبِيرًا
verses.text: Thus they 1 have certainly disbelieved you pl regarding what you say, so you 2 can neither avoid (punishment) nor get any support. And whoever of you commits injustice, We will make him taste a supreme punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَا قَبْلَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ إِلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ لَيَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَيَمْشُونَ فِى ٱلْأَسْوَاقِ ۗ وَجَعَلْنَا بَعْضَكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ فِتْنَةً أَتَصْبِرُونَ ۗ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ بَصِيرًا
verses.text: And never did We send any emissaries before you sg but they used to eat food and walk in the marketplaces. And We made some of you a means of trial for others—will you be patient? And your Lord has always been All-Seeing.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَرْجُونَ لِقَآءَنَا لَوْلَآ أُنزِلَ عَلَيْنَا ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ أَوْ نَرَىٰ رَبَّنَا ۗ لَقَدِ ٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ فِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَعَتَوْ عُتُوًّا كَبِيرًا
verses.text: And those who do not expect to meet Us said, “If only the angels were sent down to us or we could see our Lord.” They have acted arrogantly regarding themselves and have become excessively defiant.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ لَا بُشْرَىٰ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُجْرِمِينَ وَيَقُولُونَ حِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا
verses.text: On the day when they see the angels—no glad tidings for the criminals on that day, and they 1 say, “an insurmountable separator 2 .”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَدِمْنَآ إِلَىٰ مَا عَمِلُوا۟ مِنْ عَمَلٍ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ هَبَآءً مَّنثُورًا
verses.text: And We proceeded 1 to the work they had done and turned them into scattered dust.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَيْرٌ مُّسْتَقَرًّا وَأَحْسَنُ مَقِيلًا
verses.text: The fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) on that day have a better residence and are more fairly accommodated.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِٱلْغَمَـٰمِ وَنُزِّلَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ تَنزِيلًا
verses.text: And it is the day when the sky is cleft with clouds and the angels were c sent down 1 in streams.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْمُلْكُ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْحَقُّ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۚ وَكَانَ يَوْمًا عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ عَسِيرًا
verses.text: Dominion on that day belongs to the All-Merciful, and it has been a difficult day for the deniers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَوْمَ يَعَضُّ ٱلظَّالِمُ عَلَىٰ يَدَيْهِ يَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى ٱتَّخَذْتُ مَعَ ٱلرَّسُولِ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: And it is the day when the unjust bites his hands, saying, “If only I had followed the way with the Messenger.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰوَيْلَتَىٰ لَيْتَنِى لَمْ أَتَّخِذْ فُلَانًا خَلِيلًا
verses.text: Woe to me! I wish I had not taken so-and-so for a close friend;

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّقَدْ أَضَلَّنِى عَنِ ٱلذِّكْرِ بَعْدَ إِذْ جَآءَنِى ۗ وَكَانَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ خَذُولًا
verses.text: he definitely made me stray away from the Reminder after it had come to me.” And Satan has always been a betrayer of man.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ ٱلرَّسُولُ يَـٰرَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِى ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مَهْجُورًا
verses.text: And the Messenger said c , “O My Lord, my people have dealt with this Recital 1 by deserting it.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَذَٰلِكَ جَعَلْنَا لِكُلِّ نَبِىٍّ عَدُوًّا مِّنَ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ ۗ وَكَفَىٰ بِرَبِّكَ هَادِيًا وَنَصِيرًا
verses.text: Likewise, to every prophet We assigned enemies from among the criminals. But sufficient is your sg Lord as a Guide and Supporter.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَوْلَا نُزِّلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ جُمْلَةً وَٰحِدَةً ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ لِنُثَبِّتَ بِهِۦ فُؤَادَكَ ۖ وَرَتَّلْنَـٰهُ تَرْتِيلًا
verses.text: And those who denied said, “If only the Recital e had been sent down upon him as one complete whole!” Yet (it is sent in this way) in order to strengthen your heart thereby, and We (revealed it to be) chanted slowly and distinctly.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَأْتُونَكَ بِمَثَلٍ إِلَّا جِئْنَـٰكَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَأَحْسَنَ تَفْسِيرًا
verses.text: And whatever similitude they come to you sg with, We provide you with the truth and a better exposition.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُحْشَرُونَ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Those who are herded to Hell on their faces—those are in a worse position and further astray from the way.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلْنَا مَعَهُۥٓ أَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ وَزِيرًا
verses.text: And surely We gave Moses the Scripture and appointed his brother Aaron as an assistant,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقُلْنَا ٱذْهَبَآ إِلَى ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا فَدَمَّرْنَـٰهُمْ تَدْمِيرًا
verses.text: then We said, “Go dl to the people who have disbelieved Our signs,” then We destroyed them completely.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ لَّمَّا كَذَّبُوا۟ ٱلرُّسُلَ أَغْرَقْنَـٰهُمْ وَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ لِلنَّاسِ ءَايَةً ۖ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لِلظَّـٰلِمِينَ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًا
verses.text: And when the people of Noah disbelieved the messengers, We drowned them and made them a sign for mankind. And We have prepared a painful punishment for the unjust,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعَادًا وَثَمُودَا۟ وَأَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلرَّسِّ وَقُرُونًۢا بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ كَثِيرًا
verses.text: and (for) ʻĀd 1 and Thamûd 2 and the fellows of Al-Russ 3 and many generations in between.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلًّا ضَرَبْنَا لَهُ ٱلْأَمْثَـٰلَ ۖ وَكُلًّا تَبَّرْنَا تَتْبِيرًا
verses.text: Thus to each We set forth parables, and each We devastated utterly.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَتَوْا۟ عَلَى ٱلْقَرْيَةِ ٱلَّتِىٓ أُمْطِرَتْ مَطَرَ ٱلسَّوْءِ ۚ أَفَلَمْ يَكُونُوا۟ يَرَوْنَهَا ۚ بَلْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ نُشُورًا
verses.text: And indeed they have already come across the city 1 upon which was rained the woeful rain. Have they not seen it then? Rather, they did not expect any resurrection.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْكَ إِن يَتَّخِذُونَكَ إِلَّا هُزُوًا أَهَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى بَعَثَ ٱللَّهُ رَسُولًا
verses.text: And when they see you sg , they take you not except in ridicule: “Is this the one Allah has sent as a messenger?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كَادَ لَيُضِلُّنَا عَنْ ءَالِهَتِنَا لَوْلَآ أَن صَبَرْنَا عَلَيْهَا ۚ وَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ حِينَ يَرَوْنَ ٱلْعَذَابَ مَنْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: He was about to make us stray away from our gods, had we not patiently adhered to them.” And they will eventually know, when they witness the punishment, who is further astray from the way.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَرَءَيْتَ مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَـٰهَهُۥ هَوَىٰهُ أَفَأَنتَ تَكُونُ عَلَيْهِ وَكِيلًا
verses.text: Have you sg seen the one who took his own whim as his god? Would you be a trustee for him?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَحْسَبُ أَنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ يَسْمَعُونَ أَوْ يَعْقِلُونَ ۚ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا كَٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ ۖ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Or do you sg assume that most of them hear or reason? They are but like livestock; rather, they are even further astray from the way.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَيْفَ مَدَّ ٱلظِّلَّ وَلَوْ شَآءَ لَجَعَلَهُۥ سَاكِنًا ثُمَّ جَعَلْنَا ٱلشَّمْسَ عَلَيْهِ دَلِيلًا
verses.text: Have you sg not seen how your Lord extended the shade? And had He willed, He could have made it still. Then We made the sun a guide to it.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ قَبَضْنَـٰهُ إِلَيْنَا قَبْضًا يَسِيرًا
verses.text: Then We drew it to Us easily.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا وَٱلنَّوْمَ سُبَاتًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلنَّهَارَ نُشُورًا
verses.text: And it is He Who made the night for you pl as a garment and sleep for repose, and made the day a (time of) resurrection.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ بُشْرًۢا بَيْنَ يَدَىْ رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً طَهُورًا
verses.text: And it is He Who sent the winds 1 as heralds of glad tidings 2 ahead of His mercy. And We 3 sent down from the sky pure water

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّنُحْـِۧىَ بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا وَنُسْقِيَهُۥ مِمَّا خَلَقْنَآ أَنْعَـٰمًا وَأَنَاسِىَّ كَثِيرًا
verses.text: to revive a lifeless land thereby, and to provide drink for a multitude of animals and humans We have created.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ صَرَّفْنَـٰهُ بَيْنَهُمْ لِيَذَّكَّرُوا۟ فَأَبَىٰٓ أَكْثَرُ ٱلنَّاسِ إِلَّا كُفُورًا
verses.text: And most surely We have circulated it among them, that they may constantly remember 1 , yet most of mankind refused anything but constant denial.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ شِئْنَا لَبَعَثْنَا فِى كُلِّ قَرْيَةٍ نَّذِيرًا
verses.text: And had We willed, We could have sent to every town a warner.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا تُطِعِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ وَجَـٰهِدْهُم بِهِۦ جِهَادًا كَبِيرًا
verses.text: So do not obey sg the deniers, but strive against them with it 1 a supreme striving.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ هَـٰذَا عَذْبٌ فُرَاتٌ وَهَـٰذَا مِلْحٌ أُجَاجٌ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخًا وَحِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا
verses.text: And it is He Who merged the two seas, this one fresh and sweet and this one salty and bitter, and He made between them a barrier and an insurmountable separator.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ بَشَرًا فَجَعَلَهُۥ نَسَبًا وَصِهْرًا ۗ وَكَانَ رَبُّكَ قَدِيرًا
verses.text: And it is He Who created of water a human being, then made him related by lineage and marriage. And your sg Lord has always been All-Able.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُهُمْ وَلَا يَضُرُّهُمْ ۗ وَكَانَ ٱلْكَافِرُ عَلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ ظَهِيرًا
verses.text: Yet they worship, apart from Allah, what neither benefits them nor harms them. And the denier has always been a backup against his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَـٰكَ إِلَّا مُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا
verses.text: And We have not sent you but as a bearer of glad tidings and as a warner.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ أَن يَتَّخِذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
verses.text: Say sg , “I ask of you no reward for this—only that whoever wills may take a way to his Lord.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱلْحَىِّ ٱلَّذِى لَا يَمُوتُ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِهِۦ ۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِهِۦ بِذُنُوبِ عِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرًا
verses.text: And place your sg trust in the Ever-Living One Who never dies, and exalt Him with praise. And sufficient is He as the All-Aware of the misdeeds of His servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ۚ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ فَسْـَٔلْ بِهِۦ خَبِيرًا
verses.text: The One Who created the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them in six days 1 then settled on the Throne. The All-Merciful. So ask about Him one (who is) well aware.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ قَالُوا۟ وَمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ أَنَسْجُدُ لِمَا تَأْمُرُنَا وَزَادَهُمْ نُفُورًا ۩
verses.text: And when it is said to them, “Prostrate yourselves to the All-Merciful,” they say, “And what is the All-Merciful? Shall we prostrate ourselves to what you command 1 us ?” And it increases their aversion.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًا وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا سِرَٰجًا وَقَمَرًا مُّنِيرًا
verses.text: Supremely Blessed be the One Who placed constellations in the sky and placed in it a lamp 1 and an illuminating moon.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ خِلْفَةً لِّمَنْ أَرَادَ أَن يَذَّكَّرَ أَوْ أَرَادَ شُكُورًا
verses.text: And it is He Who made the night and the day alternate—for whoever wants to constantly remember 1 or wants to give constant thanks.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعِبَادُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ ٱلْجَـٰهِلُونَ قَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا
verses.text: And the servants of the All-Merciful are those who walk the earth gently 1 , and when the ignorant harassers address them, they say, “Peace.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَبِيتُونَ لِرَبِّهِمْ سُجَّدًا وَقِيَـٰمًا
verses.text: And they are those who spend the night prostrating themselves to their Lord and standing (in prayer) .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱصْرِفْ عَنَّا عَذَابَ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ إِنَّ عَذَابَهَا كَانَ غَرَامًا
verses.text: And they are those who say, ‘‘Our Lord, avert from us the punishment of Hell; indeed, its suffering has been ever adhering;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا سَآءَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا
verses.text: it is indeed bad as a residence and dwelling place.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَآ أَنفَقُوا۟ لَمْ يُسْرِفُوا۟ وَلَمْ يَقْتُرُوا۟ وَكَانَ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ قَوَامًا
verses.text: And they are those who, when they spend, are neither extravagant nor stingy, for the upright method has always been between both.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَدْعُونَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ وَلَا يَقْتُلُونَ ٱلنَّفْسَ ٱلَّتِى حَرَّمَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا يَزْنُونَ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ يَلْقَ أَثَامًا
verses.text: And they are those who do not call upon any other god with Allah and do not kill the self which Allah has made inviolable—except in the pursuit of justice—and do not fornicate. And whoever does that encounters penalties.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُضَـٰعَفْ لَهُ ٱلْعَذَابُ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ وَيَخْلُدْ فِيهِۦ مُهَانًا
verses.text: The punishment is doubled for him on the Day of Resurrection, and he abides therein humiliated—

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلًا صَـٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ ٱللَّهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ حَسَنَـٰتٍ ۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا
verses.text: except for whoever has repented and has attained faith and has done righteous work, for those—Allah replaces their evil deeds with good deeds. And Allah has always been Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن تَابَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا فَإِنَّهُۥ يَتُوبُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَتَابًا
verses.text: And whoever has repented and has acted righteously, then surely he repents to Allah a true repentance.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَشْهَدُونَ ٱلزُّورَ وَإِذَا مَرُّوا۟ بِٱللَّغْوِ مَرُّوا۟ كِرَامًا
verses.text: And they are those who do not bear false witness, and when they come across idle talk, they pass by with dignity.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَمْ يَخِرُّوا۟ عَلَيْهَا صُمًّا وَعُمْيَانًا
verses.text: And they are those who, when reminded of the signs 1 of their Lord, do not fall before them deaf and blind.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَٰجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّـٰتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَٱجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا
verses.text: And they are those who say, “Our Lord, grant us in our spouses and our offspring (s) 1 a comfort to the eyes, and make us a good example of the ones who were mindful (of God) .”

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُجْزَوْنَ ٱلْغُرْفَةَ بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ وَيُلَقَّوْنَ فِيهَا تَحِيَّةً وَسَلَـٰمًا
verses.text: Those are awarded the Chamber (in Heaven) for their patience, and are received 1 therein with greetings and peace,

verses.arabicUthmani: خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ حَسُنَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا
verses.text: abiding therein—an excellent residence and dwelling place.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ مَا يَعْبَؤُا۟ بِكُمْ رَبِّى لَوْلَا دُعَآؤُكُمْ ۖ فَقَدْ كَذَّبْتُمْ فَسَوْفَ يَكُونُ لِزَامًۢا
verses.text: Say sg , “What are you pl to my Lord without your calling upon Him? But you have certainly disbelieved, so the inevitable is bound to come.”

verses.arabicUthmani: طسٓمٓ
verses.text: Tâ Sîn Mīm.

verses.arabicUthmani: تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.text: Those are the signs of the Evident Scripture.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَعَلَّكَ بَـٰخِعٌ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Perhaps you sg are going to destroy yourself with sorrow because they do not believe?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَـٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَـٰضِعِينَ
verses.text: If We will, We can bestow 1 upon them a sign from heaven, at which their necks would stay bent in humility.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.text: But no fresh reminder comes to them from the All-Merciful but they disregard it.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَـٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: Thus they have certainly disbelieved, but soon will come to them the tidings of what they used to ridicule.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: Have they not seen the land— how many noble kinds of plants We have germinated therein?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, in that is a sign, and in no way were most of them believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: And indeed, it is your sg Lord who is surely the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: And recall when Your Lord called to Moses, “Go to the unjust people—

verses.arabicUthmani: قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ أَلَا يَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: the people of Pharaoh. Will they never be mindful?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ
verses.text: He said, “My Lord, I fear that they will disbelieve me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَضِيقُ صَدْرِى وَلَا يَنطَلِقُ لِسَانِى فَأَرْسِلْ إِلَىٰ هَـٰرُونَ
verses.text: And my chest tightens 1 and my tongue is not fluent , so send for Aaron (too) .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ
verses.text: And they hold (a charge of) a misdeed against me, so I fear they will kill me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ
verses.text: He said, “By no means! So go dl , with Our signs; We are with you pl , listening.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأْتِيَا فِرْعَوْنَ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: So go dl to Pharaoh and say, ‘We are indeed the Messenger of the Lord of all realms:

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنْ أَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: send the Children of Israel with us.’”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَلَمْ نُرَبِّكَ فِينَا وَلِيدًا وَلَبِثْتَ فِينَا مِنْ عُمُرِكَ سِنِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Did we not raise you sg among us as a child, and you stayed among us for many years of your life?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: And you sg committed that base deed of yours that you committed while you were one of the deniers 1 .”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.text: He said, “I did it then while I was one of those astray.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And I fled from you pl when I feared you, then my Lord gave me wise judgment and made me one of the emissaries.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتِلْكَ نِعْمَةٌ تَمُنُّهَا عَلَىَّ أَنْ عَبَّدتَّ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: And is that a favor you sg remind me of: that you have enslaved the Children of Israel?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَا رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Pharaoh said, “And what is the Lord of all realms?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
verses.text: He said, “The Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, if you pl (can ever) believe with certitude.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لِمَنْ حَوْلَهُۥٓ أَلَا تَسْتَمِعُونَ
verses.text: He said to those around him, “Are you listening?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Your pl Lord and the Lord of your ancient fathers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ إِنَّ رَسُولَكُمُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: He said, “This messenger of yours who has been sent to you is certainly a madman.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: He said, “The Lord of the east and the west and whatever is between them, if you pl can (ever) reason.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لَئِنِ ٱتَّخَذْتَ إِلَـٰهًا غَيْرِى لَأَجْعَلَنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمَسْجُونِينَ
verses.text: He said, “If you sg accept any god other than me, I will surely make you of the imprisoned.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكَ بِشَىْءٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: He said, “What if I bring you sg something evident?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَأْتِ بِهِۦٓ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Bring it, if you sg are of the truthful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: So he cast his staff and thereupon it was an evident serpent.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ
verses.text: And he pulled his hand and thereupon it was white for the beholders.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لِلْمَلَإِ حَوْلَهُۥٓ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَسَـٰحِرٌ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: He said to the chiefs around him, “This is indeed a knowledgeable sorcerer

verses.arabicUthmani: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ
verses.text: who wants to evict you from your land with his sorcery, so what do you command?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ
verses.text: They said, “Put him off, and his brother, and send summoners to the cities

verses.arabicUthmani: يَأْتُوكَ بِكُلِّ سَحَّارٍ عَلِيمٍ
verses.text: to bring you sg every knowledgeable magician.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجُمِعَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ لِمِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.text: So the sorcerers were assembled for the appointment on a specified day.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقِيلَ لِلنَّاسِ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّجْتَمِعُونَ
verses.text: And people were told, “Are you going to assemble,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
verses.text: that we may follow the sorcerers if they are the overcomers?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ قَالُوا۟ لِفِرْعَوْنَ أَئِنَّ لَنَا لَأَجْرًا إِن كُنَّا نَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
verses.text: So when the sorcerers arrived, they said to Pharaoh, “Is there a reward for us if we are the overcomers?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Yes, and you will then most surely become of those brought near (to me) .”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰٓ أَلْقُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُم مُّلْقُونَ
verses.text: Moses said to them, “Cast whatever you intend to cast.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَلْقَوْا۟ حِبَالَهُمْ وَعِصِيَّهُمْ وَقَالُوا۟ بِعِزَّةِ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ
verses.text: So they cast their ropes and their staffs and said, “By Pharaoh’s might, we are most surely the overcomers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ
verses.text: Then Moses threw his staff, and thereupon it swallowed what they had fabricated.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سَـٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: So the sorcerers fell down prostrating.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: They said, “We have attained faith in the Lord of all realms,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبِّ مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ
verses.text: the Lord of Moses and Aaron.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ فَلَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ ۚ لَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَـٰفٍ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Have you pl believed in him before I have given you permission? He must be your leader who taught you sorcery. Well, you will certainly know soon; I will most surely cut off your hands and feet on opposite sides, and I will most surely crucify you all.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ
verses.text: They said, “No problem; indeed, to our Lord we are returning.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَـٰيَـٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: We ardently hope our Lord will forgive us our offenses, as we were the first of the believers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِىٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
verses.text: And We revealed to Moses: “Journey withMy servants by night; you pl will indeed be followed.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَرْسَلَ فِرْعَوْنُ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ
verses.text: So Pharaoh sent summoners to the cities.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَشِرْذِمَةٌ قَلِيلُونَ
verses.text: “Indeed, these are just a small gang,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُمْ لَنَا لَغَآئِظُونَ
verses.text: and they certainly do enrage us.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّا لَجَمِيعٌ حَـٰذِرُونَ
verses.text: But indeed, we are cautious 1 .”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخْرَجْنَـٰهُم مِّن جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: So We got them out from gardens and springs

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُنُوزٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: and treasures and a noble domicile.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ وَأَوْرَثْنَـٰهَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: So it was. And We made the Children of Israel inherit them.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَتْبَعُوهُم مُّشْرِقِينَ
verses.text: And they pursued them at sunrise.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا تَرَٰٓءَا ٱلْجَمْعَانِ قَالَ أَصْحَـٰبُ مُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّا لَمُدْرَكُونَ
verses.text: And when the two groups sighted each other, the followers of Moses said, “We are indeed overtaken!”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
verses.text: He said, “By no means! My Lord is indeed with me; He will guide me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱضْرِب بِّعَصَاكَ ٱلْبَحْرَ ۖ فَٱنفَلَقَ فَكَانَ كُلُّ فِرْقٍ كَٱلطَّوْدِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So We revealed to Moses: “Strike the sea with your staff,” whereupon it split, so that each part was like a great hill.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَزْلَفْنَا ثَمَّ ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: And thereupon, we brought the others near.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنجَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: Then We saved Moses and those with him, all of them.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: Then We drowned the others.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Most surely in that is a sign, and in no way were most of them believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: And most surely, your sg Lord is the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ نَبَأَ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
verses.text: And relate to them the tiding of Abraham,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: when he said to his father and his people, “What do you worship?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَـٰكِفِينَ
verses.text: They said, “We worship human-shaped idols and we remain consecrating ourselves to them.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ هَلْ يَسْمَعُونَكُمْ إِذْ تَدْعُونَ
verses.text: He said, “Can they hear you pl when you call?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ يَنفَعُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَضُرُّونَ
verses.text: Or can they benefit you, or can they do harm?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: They said, “Rather, we found our forefathers doing so.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: He said, “Have you seen what you have been worshiping,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُمُ ٱلْأَقْدَمُونَ
verses.text: you and your ancient fathers?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِّىٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: They are enemies to me, except for the Lord of all realms,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَنِى فَهُوَ يَهْدِينِ
verses.text: Who created me and therefore He guides me;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِى هُوَ يُطْعِمُنِى وَيَسْقِينِ
verses.text: and Who feeds me and gives me to drink;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا مَرِضْتُ فَهُوَ يَشْفِينِ
verses.text: and when I get sick, He heals me;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِى يُمِيتُنِى ثُمَّ يُحْيِينِ
verses.text: and Who makes me die and then revives me;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لِى خَطِيٓـَٔتِى يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: and Whom I ardently hope will forgive me my offense on the Day of Recompense.”

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِى بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: “My Lord, grant me wise judgment and include me with the righteous,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and make me a reputation of truth among later generations,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱجْعَلْنِى مِن وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: and make me of the inheritors of the Garden of Bliss,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.text: and forgive my father—he was indeed one of those astray,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تُخْزِنِى يَوْمَ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: and do not disgrace me on the day they are resurrected:

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ لَا يَنفَعُ مَالٌ وَلَا بَنُونَ
verses.text: the day when neither wealth nor children are of help—

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ
verses.text: except for one who has come 1 to Allah witha sound heart.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: And the Garden (of Paradise) was brought near for those who had been mindful,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِلْغَاوِينَ
verses.text: while purgatory was displayed to the deluded ones.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: And they were told, “Where is what you used to worship

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ
verses.text: apart from Allah? Can they support you or get support for themselves?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكُبْكِبُوا۟ فِيهَا هُمْ وَٱلْغَاوُۥنَ
verses.text: Then they were toppled into it, together with the deluded ones

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجُنُودُ إِبْلِيسَ أَجْمَعُونَ
verses.text: and the troops of Iblis 1 , all of them.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ وَهُمْ فِيهَا يَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: They said, as they disputed about it,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: “(We swear) by Allah, we were surely in evident misguidance

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ نُسَوِّيكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: for equating you pl with the Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَضَلَّنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: But no one misguided us except the criminals.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا لَنَا مِن شَـٰفِعِينَ
verses.text: And now we neither have intercessors

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا صَدِيقٍ حَمِيمٍ
verses.text: nor any intimate friend.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: So if only we could have another chance, we would be of the believers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Most surely in that is a sign, and in no way were most of them believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: And most surely, your sg Lord is the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: The people of Noah disbelieved the emissaries

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ نُوحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when their brother Noah said to them, “Will you never be mindful?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So be mindful of Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And I ask of you no reward for this, for my reward is only from the Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So be mindful of Allah and obey me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ لَكَ وَٱتَّبَعَكَ ٱلْأَرْذَلُونَ
verses.text: They said, “Shall we believe in you , when (only) the lowliest have followed you 1 ?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِى بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, “What do I know about what they used to do?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّى ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: Their reckoning rests only with my Lord, if only you were aware.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِطَارِدِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: And in no way would I expel the believers;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ أَنَا۠ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: I am only an evident warner.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَرْجُومِينَ
verses.text: They said, “If you do not refrain, O Noah, you will most surely be of those stoned.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِى كَذَّبُونِ
verses.text: He said, “My Lord, my people have disbelieved me.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱفْتَحْ بَيْنِى وَبَيْنَهُمْ فَتْحًا وَنَجِّنِى وَمَن مَّعِىَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: So legislate between me and them decisively, and deliver me and those who are with me of the believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنجَيْنَـٰهُ وَمَن مَّعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
verses.text: So We saved him and those with him in the laden ship.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا بَعْدُ ٱلْبَاقِينَ
verses.text: Then We drowned the rest.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Most surely in that is a sign, and in no way were most of them believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: And most surely, your sg Lord is the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: ʻĀd 1 disbelieved the emissaries

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ هُودٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when their brother Hûd said to them, “Will you never be mindful?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: Indeed, I am to you pl a trustworthy messenger.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So be mindful of Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And I ask of you no reward for this, for my reward is only from the Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَبْنُونَ بِكُلِّ رِيعٍ ءَايَةً تَعْبَثُونَ
verses.text: Do you build a sign on every height for vanity’s sake?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَتَّخِذُونَ مَصَانِعَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَخْلُدُونَ
verses.text: And you set up fortresses, hoping to live eternally?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا بَطَشْتُم بَطَشْتُمْ جَبَّارِينَ
verses.text: And when you pl strike, you strike mercilessly?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So be mindful of Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَمَدَّكُم بِمَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: And be mindful of the One Who supplied you with whatever you know.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَدَّكُم بِأَنْعَـٰمٍ وَبَنِينَ
verses.text: He supplied you with livestock and children

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: and gardens and springs.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a great day.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْوَٰعِظِينَ
verses.text: They said, “It is equal to us, whether you admonish or be not of those who admonish.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا خُلُقُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: This is nothing but the character 1 of the ancients,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.text: and we will never be punished.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: So they disbelieved him; thus We annihilated them. Most surely in that is a sign, and in no way were most of them believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: And most surely, Your sg Lord is the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: Thamûd 1 disbelieved the emissaries

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَـٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when their brother Salih said to them, “Will you never be mindful?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So be mindful of Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And I ask of you no reward for this, for my reward is only from the Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتُتْرَكُونَ فِى مَا هَـٰهُنَآ ءَامِنِينَ
verses.text: Will you (always) be left secure in whatever is here?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: In gardens and springs

verses.arabicUthmani: وَزُرُوعٍ وَنَخْلٍ طَلْعُهَا هَضِيمٌ
verses.text: and vegetation (s) , and palm-trees with tender yield?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا فَـٰرِهِينَ
verses.text: And you carve houses in the mountains, with skill 1 ?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So be mindful of Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تُطِيعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
verses.text: And do not obey the command of the extremists:

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
verses.text: those who spread corruption in the land and do not reform.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَحَّرِينَ
verses.text: They said, “You are surely one of the bewitched;

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: you are nothing but a human being like us, so bring us a sign if you are of the truthful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ هَـٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.text: He said, “This is a she-camel; she has her turn to drink, and you have your turn to drink on a well-known day.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَمَسُّوهَا بِسُوٓءٍ فَيَأْخُذَكُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: And do not touch her with any harm, lest the punishment of a great day seize you.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَقَرُوهَا فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ نَـٰدِمِينَ
verses.text: But they hamstrung her, then became remorseful 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخَذَهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: So the punishment seized them. Most surely in that is a sign, and in no way were most of them believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: And most surely, your sg Lord is the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: The people of Lot disbelieved the emissaries

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ لُوطٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when their brother Lot said to them, “Will you never be mindful?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So be mindful of Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And I ask of you no reward for this, for my reward is only from the Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلذُّكْرَانَ مِنَ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Of all the creatures in all realms, do you pl approach males?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ
verses.text: And you leave what your Lord has created for you of spouses? Rather, you are a people who have transgressed.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْرَجِينَ
verses.text: They said, “Unless you refrain, O Lot, you will most surely be of those evicted.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ إِنِّى لِعَمَلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلْقَالِينَ
verses.text: He said, “I am certainly one of those who abhor your practice.”

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبِّ نَجِّنِى وَأَهْلِى مِمَّا يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: “My Lord, deliver me and my family from what they practice.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: So We delivered him and his family, all of them,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عَجُوزًا فِى ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: except for an old woman among those who lingered behind.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ دَمَّرْنَا ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: Then We destroyed the others.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: And We rained down upon them a rain, so how bad was the rain of those forewarned!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Most surely in that is a sign, and in no way were most of them believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: And most surely, your sg Lord is the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَ أَصْحَـٰبُ لْـَٔيْكَةِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: The Fellows of the Thicket disbelieved the emissaries

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: when Shu’aib said to them, “Will you never be mindful?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُونِ
verses.text: So be mindful of Allah and obey me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And I ask of you no reward for this, for my reward is only from the Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْسِرِينَ
verses.text: Give full measure and do not be of the cheaters,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَزِنُوا۟ بِٱلْقِسْطَاسِ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمِ
verses.text: and weigh with accurate scales

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ
verses.text: and do not defraud people of their belongings, and do not go wickedly about the land, corrupting it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلْجِبِلَّةَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: And be mindful of the One Who created you pl and the masses of old.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَحَّرِينَ
verses.text: They said, “You are surely one of the bewitched.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ
verses.text: And you are nothing but a human being like us, and we think that you are surely of the liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: So make pieces 1 from heaven fall on us, if you are of the truthful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, “My Lord knows better what you do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَخَذَهُمْ عَذَابُ يَوْمِ ٱلظُّلَّةِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: But they disbelieved him, so the punishment of the Day of Gloom seized them; it was indeed the punishment of a great day.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Most surely in that is a sign, and in no way were most of them believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: And most surely, your sg Lord is the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَنزِيلُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And most surely, it is a bestowal from on high from the Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: نَزَلَ بِهِ ٱلرُّوحُ ٱلْأَمِينُ
verses.text: The Trustworthy Spirit came down with it 1

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰ قَلْبِكَ لِتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ
verses.text: upon your sg heart, that you may be of the forewarners,

verses.arabicUthmani: بِلِسَانٍ عَرَبِىٍّ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: in an evident Arabic tongue.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَفِى زُبُرِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: And it is in the books of the ancients.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ ءَايَةً أَن يَعْلَمَهُۥ عُلَمَـٰٓؤُا۟ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ
verses.text: Is it not a sign for them that the scholars of the Children of Israel recognized it?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ نَزَّلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ بَعْضِ ٱلْأَعْجَمِينَ
verses.text: And had We bestowed it from on high upon some non-Arabs

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and he had recited it to them, they would still not have believed in it.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ سَلَكْنَـٰهُ فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: Thus We inserted it into the hearts of the criminals.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِهِۦ حَتَّىٰ يَرَوُا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
verses.text: They will not believe in it until they witness the painful punishment

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَأْتِيَهُم بَغْتَةً وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: which will come to them suddenly while they are unaware.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَقُولُوا۟ هَلْ نَحْنُ مُنظَرُونَ
verses.text: Then they will say, “Will we be reprieved?”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.text: So do they seek to hasten Our punishment?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتَ إِن مَّتَّعْنَـٰهُمْ سِنِينَ
verses.text: So have you sg seen if We let them enjoy (life) for (many) years,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ جَآءَهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: then there comes to them what they were promised,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُمَتَّعُونَ
verses.text: of what avail to them will their past enjoyments be?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ إِلَّا لَهَا مُنذِرُونَ
verses.text: And never did We destroy a town but it had forewarners—

verses.arabicUthmani: ذِكْرَىٰ وَمَا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: a reminding, and in no way have We been unjust.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَنَزَّلَتْ بِهِ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ
verses.text: And in no way have the devils been descending with it,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُمْ وَمَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
verses.text: for it neither suits them nor is it in their power.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّمْعِ لَمَعْزُولُونَ
verses.text: They are indeed barred from hearing (it) .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.text: So do not call upon any other god with Allah, lest you sg be of those punished.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ ٱلْأَقْرَبِينَ
verses.text: And warn your sg close kinsfolk,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and lower your wing 1 for those of the believers who have followed you.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: But if they disobey you, say, “I am indeed innocent of what you do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.text: And 1 place your trust in the Almighty, the Bestower of mercy,

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى يَرَىٰكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.text: Who sees you when you rise,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَقَلُّبَكَ فِى ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: as well as your movement among those who prostrate;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: indeed, He is the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ
verses.text: Shall I inform you pl upon whom the devils keep descending?

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنَزَّلُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ أَفَّاكٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.text: They keep descending upon every sinful fabricator.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُلْقُونَ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ كَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: They give ear, and most of them are liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشُّعَرَآءُ يَتَّبِعُهُمُ ٱلْغَاوُۥنَ
verses.text: And as for the poets—the deluded ones follow them.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّهُمْ فِى كُلِّ وَادٍ يَهِيمُونَ
verses.text: Have you sg not seen that they aimlessly roam in every valley?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُمْ يَقُولُونَ مَا لَا يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: And that they say what they do not do?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَٱنتَصَرُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَىَّ مُنقَلَبٍ يَنقَلِبُونَ
verses.text: Except for those who attained faith and did righteous deeds and remembered Allah frequently and defended themselves after they had been dealt with unjustly. And those who have been unjust will know the place of return to which they are bound to return.

verses.arabicUthmani: طسٓ ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ وَكِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Tâ Sîn. Those are the signs 1 of the Recital 2 and an Evident Scripture—

verses.arabicUthmani: هُدًى وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: guidance and glad tidings for the believers

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُم بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: who establish the prayer and bring 1 the purifying charity 2 and, of the Hereafter, they are certain.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمْ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ فَهُمْ يَعْمَهُونَ
verses.text: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter—We have adorned their deeds for them, so they wander aimlessly;

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَهُمْ سُوٓءُ ٱلْعَذَابِ وَهُمْ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ هُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرُونَ
verses.text: those are the ones for whom is the worst punishment, and in the Hereafter they are the biggest losers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ
verses.text: And indeed, you sg are surely receiving the Recital b from One who is All-Wise, All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِأَهْلِهِۦٓ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا سَـَٔاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِخَبَرٍ أَوْ ءَاتِيكُم بِشِهَابٍ قَبَسٍ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَصْطَلُونَ
verses.text: Recall when Moses said to his family, “I have surely glimpsed a fire. I will bring you some news from it, or bring you a firebrand, a borrowed flame 1 , that you may warm yourselves.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهَا نُودِىَ أَنۢ بُورِكَ مَن فِى ٱلنَّارِ وَمَنْ حَوْلَهَا وَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Then when he reached it, he was called: “Blessed is whoever is in the fire and whoever is around it, and Highly Exalted is Allah, Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: O Moses, it is indeed I, Allah, the Almighty, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ ۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَآنٌّ وَلَّىٰ مُدْبِرًا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ ۚ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفْ إِنِّى لَا يَخَافُ لَدَىَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: Now, cast your staff.” So when he saw it shaking as though it were a snake, he turned away, fleeing, and did not look back. “O Moses, fear not! Truly, in My presence emissaries have nothing to fear,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَن ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسْنًۢا بَعْدَ سُوٓءٍ فَإِنِّى غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: except for one who did an injustice then substituted kindness for evil—then I am surely Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَدْخِلْ يَدَكَ فِى جَيْبِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ ۖ فِى تِسْعِ ءَايَـٰتٍ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ وَقَوْمِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: And put your hand inside the opening of your garment (and) it will come out white, without any evil affliction—among nine signs to Pharaoh and his people; they have indeed been a defiantly disobedient people.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايَـٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: So when Our signs came to them as an eye-opener, they said, “This is evident sorcery.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَحَدُوا۟ بِهَا وَٱسْتَيْقَنَتْهَآ أَنفُسُهُمْ ظُلْمًا وَعُلُوًّا ۚ فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
verses.text: And they repudiated them, though their (inner) selves were certain of them—out of injustice and haughtiness; so look sg what the outcome was for the corrupters.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمَـٰنَ عِلْمًا ۖ وَقَالَا ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: And indeed, We brought David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, “Praise be to Allah, Who has favored us over many of His believing servants.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَرِثَ سُلَيْمَـٰنُ دَاوُۥدَ ۖ وَقَالَ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ عُلِّمْنَا مَنطِقَ ٱلطَّيْرِ وَأُوتِينَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ ۖ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: And Solomon succeeded David, and he said, “O mankind, we have been taught the language of birds, and we have been given of everything; this is most surely the evident grace.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحُشِرَ لِسُلَيْمَـٰنَ جُنُودُهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ وَٱلطَّيْرِ فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
verses.text: And to the service of Solomon were herded his troops of unseen beings 1 and men and birds, all held in strict order,

verses.arabicUthmani: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَتَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ وَادِ ٱلنَّمْلِ قَالَتْ نَمْلَةٌ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّمْلُ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ مَسَـٰكِنَكُمْ لَا يَحْطِمَنَّكُمْ سُلَيْمَـٰنُ وَجُنُودُهُۥ وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: until, when they came upon the valley of ants, an ant said, “O you ants! Enter into your homes, lest Solomon and his troops crush you while they are unaware.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَـٰلِحًا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِى بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِى عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: So he smiled, laughing at her speech, and said, “My Lord, direct me to be thankful for Your blessings which you have bestowed upon me and upon my parents, and to do righteousness that well pleases You. And include me, by Your mercy, among Your righteous servants.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَفَقَّدَ ٱلطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِىَ لَآ أَرَى ٱلْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْغَآئِبِينَ
verses.text: Then he inspected the birds and said, “What is it with me? Can I not see the hoopoe, or is he among the absentees?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَأُعَذِّبَنَّهُۥ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا أَوْ لَأَا۟ذْبَحَنَّهُۥٓ أَوْ لَيَأْتِيَنِّى بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Most surely, I will either punish him severely or slay him, unless he brings me an evident excuse.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ
verses.text: But he did not stay away for long and he said, “I have encompassed that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with sure tidings.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: I found a woman reigning over them, and she has been given of everything, and she has a great throne.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun apart from Allah, for Satan has adorned their deeds for them and has thus barred them from the way, so that they are not guided —

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ
verses.text: that they do not 1 prostrate themselves to Allah, Who brings out what is hidden in the heavens and the earth, and knows whatever you 2 hide and whatever you make public.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ۩
verses.text: Allah—there is no god but He, Lord of the Great Throne.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ
verses.text: He said, “We will see whether you have spoken the truth or have been one of the liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱذْهَب بِّكِتَـٰبِى هَـٰذَا فَأَلْقِهْ إِلَيْهِمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: Go with this letter of mine and cast it to them, then turn away from them and wait to see what they say to each other.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَتْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ إِنِّىٓ أُلْقِىَ إِلَىَّ كِتَـٰبٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: She said, “O chiefs, a noble letter has indeed been cast down to me;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ مِن سُلَيْمَـٰنَ وَإِنَّهُۥ بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
verses.text: it is indeed from Solomon, and it is indeed, ‘In the name of Allah, the All-Merciful, the Bestower of mercy:

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَىَّ وَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: You must not exalt yourselves above me and must come to me as Muslims 1 .’”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَتْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَفْتُونِى فِىٓ أَمْرِى مَا كُنتُ قَاطِعَةً أَمْرًا حَتَّىٰ تَشْهَدُونِ
verses.text: She said, “O chiefs, give me your opinion in this matter of mine. I never take a decision on any matter except in your presence.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ نَحْنُ أُو۟لُوا۟ قُوَّةٍ وَأُو۟لُوا۟ بَأْسٍ شَدِيدٍ وَٱلْأَمْرُ إِلَيْكِ فَٱنظُرِى مَاذَا تَأْمُرِينَ
verses.text: They said, “We are a people of power and of intense force, and you are in command, so see what you wish to command.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَتْ إِنَّ ٱلْمُلُوكَ إِذَا دَخَلُوا۟ قَرْيَةً أَفْسَدُوهَا وَجَعَلُوٓا۟ أَعِزَّةَ أَهْلِهَآ أَذِلَّةً ۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: She said, “Indeed, when kings enter a town, they corrupt it and humiliate its dignified people, and this is what they (always) do.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنِّى مُرْسِلَةٌ إِلَيْهِم بِهَدِيَّةٍ فَنَاظِرَةٌۢ بِمَ يَرْجِعُ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: Thus I am sending them a gift and will see what the emissaries return with.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَ سُلَيْمَـٰنَ قَالَ أَتُمِدُّونَنِ بِمَالٍ فَمَآ ءَاتَىٰنِۦَ ٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ مِّمَّآ ءَاتَىٰكُم بَلْ أَنتُم بِهَدِيَّتِكُمْ تَفْرَحُونَ
verses.text: So when he came to Solomon, he said, “Are you pl supplying me with wealth? What Allah has brought me is better than what He has brought you. Rather, it is you who rejoice when given gifts.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱرْجِعْ إِلَيْهِمْ فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّهُم بِجُنُودٍ لَّا قِبَلَ لَهُم بِهَا وَلَنُخْرِجَنَّهُم مِّنْهَآ أَذِلَّةً وَهُمْ صَـٰغِرُونَ
verses.text: Return sg back to them. Indeed, we will come upon them with troops they cannot resist, and indeed, we will evict them from it, humiliated and dishonored.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَيُّكُمْ يَأْتِينِى بِعَرْشِهَا قَبْلَ أَن يَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: He said, “O chiefs, which one of you can bring me her throne before they come to me as Muslims 1 ?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ عِفْرِيتٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن تَقُومَ مِن مَّقَامِكَ ۖ وَإِنِّى عَلَيْهِ لَقَوِىٌّ أَمِينٌ
verses.text: A powerful one of the unseen beings 1 said, “I will bring it to you sg before you rise from your seat, and indeed, I am certainly strong and trustworthy enough to do it.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ ٱلَّذِى عِندَهُۥ عِلْمٌ مِّنَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن يَرْتَدَّ إِلَيْكَ طَرْفُكَ ۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهُ مُسْتَقِرًّا عِندَهُۥ قَالَ هَـٰذَا مِن فَضْلِ رَبِّى لِيَبْلُوَنِىٓ ءَأَشْكُرُ أَمْ أَكْفُرُ ۖ وَمَن شَكَرَ فَإِنَّمَا يَشْكُرُ لِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن كَفَرَ فَإِنَّ رَبِّى غَنِىٌّ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: The one who had knowledge of the Scripture said, “I will bring it to you before you blink your eye.” So when he saw it settled before him, he said, “This is of my Lord’s grace, to test me: whether I will thank or will deny. For whoever is thankful is only thankful to his own benefit, and whoever has denied 1 —my Lord is, indeed, Self-Sufficient, Noble.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ نَكِّرُوا۟ لَهَا عَرْشَهَا نَنظُرْ أَتَهْتَدِىٓ أَمْ تَكُونُ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: He said, “Disguise her throne for her, and we shall see whether she will be guided or be one of those who are never guided.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْ قِيلَ أَهَـٰكَذَا عَرْشُكِ ۖ قَالَتْ كَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ ۚ وَأُوتِينَا ٱلْعِلْمَ مِن قَبْلِهَا وَكُنَّا مُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: So when she arrived, it was said, “Is your throne like this?” She said, “As if this is it.” (Solomon said,) “And We were given knowledge before her and we have always been Muslims a .”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَصَدَّهَا مَا كَانَت تَّعْبُدُ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّهَا كَانَتْ مِن قَوْمٍ كَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: But she was barred by whatever she used to worship apart from Allah; indeed, she was of a denying people.

verses.arabicUthmani: قِيلَ لَهَا ٱدْخُلِى ٱلصَّرْحَ ۖ فَلَمَّا رَأَتْهُ حَسِبَتْهُ لُجَّةً وَكَشَفَتْ عَن سَاقَيْهَا ۚ قَالَ إِنَّهُۥ صَرْحٌ مُّمَرَّدٌ مِّن قَوَارِيرَ ۗ قَالَتْ رَبِّ إِنِّى ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِى وَأَسْلَمْتُ مَعَ سُلَيْمَـٰنَ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: She was told, “Enter the tower.” And when she saw it, she thought it was a deep pond and she bared her legs. He said, “It is a tower paved with glass.” She said, “My Lord, I have indeed been unjust to myself, and I have submitted with Solomon to Allah, Lord of all realms.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ ثَمُودَ أَخَاهُمْ صَـٰلِحًا أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَإِذَا هُمْ فَرِيقَانِ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: And indeed, We sent to Thamûd their brother Saleh (saying) , “Worship Allah.” But they promptly became two disputing groups.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ لِمَ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ قَبْلَ ٱلْحَسَنَةِ ۖ لَوْلَا تَسْتَغْفِرُونَ ٱللَّهَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: He said, “O my people, why do you ask that the bad be hastened before the good? If only you would ask Allah’s forgiveness so that you may be shown mercy.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ ٱطَّيَّرْنَا بِكَ وَبِمَن مَّعَكَ ۚ قَالَ طَـٰٓئِرُكُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تُفْتَنُونَ
verses.text: They said, “We consider you sg a bad omen, and those with you (too) .” He said, “Your omen is with Allah. In fact, you are a people being tried.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَانَ فِى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ تِسْعَةُ رَهْطٍ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ
verses.text: And there were nine persons in the city who were spreading corruption in the land and would not reform.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ تَقَاسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ لَنُبَيِّتَنَّهُۥ وَأَهْلَهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَقُولَنَّ لِوَلِيِّهِۦ مَا شَهِدْنَا مَهْلِكَ أَهْلِهِۦ وَإِنَّا لَصَـٰدِقُونَ
verses.text: They said, “Swear by Allah to one another that we 1 will surely attack him and his family at night, and then we will emphatically tell his kinsman seeking retribution, ‘We did not witness the murder of his family, and we are indeed truthful.’”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا وَمَكَرْنَا مَكْرًا وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: And they schemed a scheme, and We schemed a scheme while they were unaware.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ مَكْرِهِمْ أَنَّا دَمَّرْنَـٰهُمْ وَقَوْمَهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: So look sg at how the outcome of their scheming was that We 1 did destroy them and their people, all of them.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتِلْكَ بُيُوتُهُمْ خَاوِيَةًۢ بِمَا ظَلَمُوٓا۟ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: So here are their houses, vacant, on account of their injustice. Indeed, in this is surely a sign for people who know.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنجَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَكَانُوا۟ يَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: And We saved those who believed and were mindful (of God) .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلُوطًا إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَتَأْتُونَ ٱلْفَـٰحِشَةَ وَأَنتُمْ تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: And Lot (too) , when he said to his people, “Do you commit obscenity while you can see (its shamefulness) ?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَئِنَّكُمْ لَتَأْتُونَ ٱلرِّجَالَ شَهْوَةً مِّن دُونِ ٱلنِّسَآءِ ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تَجْهَلُونَ
verses.text: Do you approach men with lust instead of women? Rather you are an ignorant people.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ فَمَا كَانَ جَوَابَ قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ أَخْرِجُوٓا۟ ءَالَ لُوطٍ مِّن قَرْيَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ أُنَاسٌ يَتَطَهَّرُونَ
verses.text: But the only response of his people was to say, “Evict Lot’s folk from your town; indeed, they are a few people who always keep themselves clean.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَنجَيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱمْرَأَتَهُۥ قَدَّرْنَـٰهَا مِنَ ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: So We saved him and his family, except for his wife, whom We destined to be of those who lingered behind.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: And We rained upon them a rain, and so evil was the rain of the forewarned.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَىٰٓ ۗ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Praise be to Allah and peace be upon His servants whom He has elected. Is Allah better or what they 1 associate ?”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ حَدَآئِقَ ذَاتَ بَهْجَةٍ مَّا كَانَ لَكُمْ أَن تُنۢبِتُوا۟ شَجَرَهَآ ۗ أَءِلَـٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ يَعْدِلُونَ
verses.text: Or who (else then) is the one who created the heavens and the earth, and sent down to you pl from the sky water with which We 1 germinated gardens full of beauty, whose trees you could not have germinated? Is there any other god with Allah? Rather, they are a people who equate 2 .

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّن جَعَلَ ٱلْأَرْضَ قَرَارًا وَجَعَلَ خِلَـٰلَهَآ أَنْهَـٰرًا وَجَعَلَ لَهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ حَاجِزًا ۗ أَءِلَـٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Or who (else then) is the one who made the earth habitable and made rivers flow through it and set firm mountains for it and placed a partition between the two seas? Is there any other god with Allah? Rather, most of them do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَءِلَـٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Or who (else then) is the one who responds to someone in need when he calls upon Him and relieves evil and makes you successors on earth? Is there any other god with Allah? Little do you remind 1 yourselves .

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّن يَهْدِيكُمْ فِى ظُلُمَـٰتِ ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ وَمَن يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ بُشْرًۢا بَيْنَ يَدَىْ رَحْمَتِهِۦٓ ۗ أَءِلَـٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ تَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: Or who (else then) is the one who guides you pl through the darkness (es) of the land and the sea, and who sends the winds 1 as heralds of glad tidings 2 before His mercy? Is there any other god with Allah? Most High is Allah above what they associate.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّن يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ وَمَن يَرْزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَءِلَـٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قُلْ هَاتُوا۟ بُرْهَـٰنَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Or who (else then) is the one who originates creation and then restores it, and Who provides for you pl from the sky and the land? Is there any other god with Allah? Say sg , “Produce your pl proof, if you are truthful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “No one in the heavens or the earth knows what is hidden except Allah.” For they are unaware of when they will be resurrected;

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱدَّٰرَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّنْهَا ۖ بَلْ هُم مِّنْهَا عَمُونَ
verses.text: rather, their knowledge has been reached 1 in the Hereafter; rather, they are in doubt about it; rather, they are completely blind to it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَءِذَا كُنَّا تُرَٰبًا وَءَابَآؤُنَآ أَئِنَّا لَمُخْرَجُونَ
verses.text: And those who denied said, “ Can it be that 1 when we have become dust, and our forefathers— can it be that we will really be brought out?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا هَـٰذَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: Most surely, we were promised this before, we and our forefathers; this is nothing but the legends of the ancients.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ سِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Journey through the earth and look what the outcome was for the criminals.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُن فِى ضَيْقٍ مِّمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ
verses.text: But do sg not grieve over them and do not be troubled by what they scheme.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: And they say, “When is this promise, if you are truthful?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Perhaps some of what you are asking to be hastened has drawn near.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: And indeed, your sg Lord is surely the Possessor of grace towards mankind, but most of them are not thankful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُكِنُّ صُدُورُهُمْ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
verses.text: And indeed, your sg Lord knows whatever their chests harbor and whatever they make public.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا مِنْ غَآئِبَةٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا فِى كِتَـٰبٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: And never is there anything hidden in the heaven or the earth but it is in an evident record 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ يَقُصُّ عَلَىٰ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ أَكْثَرَ ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
verses.text: This Recital 1 indeed narrates to the Children of Israel most of what they differ over,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةٌ لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: and most surely it is a guidance and a mercy to the believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَقْضِى بَيْنَهُم بِحُكْمِهِۦ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: Indeed, your sg Lord decrees between them by His wise judgment, and He is the Almighty, the All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَى ٱلْحَقِّ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.text: So place your sg trust in Allah; you are indeed upon the evident truth.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, you sg cannot make the dead hear, nor can you make 1 the deaf hear the call if they withdraw and turn their backs.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهَـٰدِى ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلَـٰلَتِهِمْ ۖ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ
verses.text: Nor can you sg guide 1 the blind out of their utter misguidance; you can make no one hear except those who believe in Our signs, and are (thus) Muslims 2 .

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَإِذَا وَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَخْرَجْنَا لَهُمْ دَآبَّةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ تُكَلِّمُهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلنَّاسَ كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا لَا يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: And when the decree is fulfilled against them, We will bring out for them—from the earth—a treading creature that will tell them that 1 mankind used to have no certitude in Our signs.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَوْمَ نَحْشُرُ مِن كُلِّ أُمَّةٍ فَوْجًا مِّمَّن يُكَذِّبُ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ
verses.text: On the day when We herd from every community a crowd of those who disbelieve our signs, so that they are held in strict order.

verses.arabicUthmani: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءُو قَالَ أَكَذَّبْتُم بِـَٔايَـٰتِى وَلَمْ تُحِيطُوا۟ بِهَا عِلْمًا أَمَّاذَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Until, when they come (before their Lord) , He will say, “Did you deny My signs and did you not encompass them in knowledge, or what were you doing?”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِم بِمَا ظَلَمُوا۟ فَهُمْ لَا يَنطِقُونَ
verses.text: And the decree shall be fulfilled against them for the injustices they did, and they shall be speechless.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِيَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Have they not seen that We have made the night for them to rest therein and the day allowing sight? Indeed, in that are signs for people who believe.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَكُلٌّ أَتَوْهُ دَٰخِرِينَ
verses.text: And on the day when the Trumpet is blown, and everyone in the heavens and the earth was 1 horrified, except whomever Allah willed, and everyone came before Him in humility.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَى ٱلْجِبَالَ تَحْسَبُهَا جَامِدَةً وَهِىَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِ ۚ صُنْعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَتْقَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: And you sg see the mountains, thinking them fixed, yet they pass as the passing of the clouds—the making of Allah Who has perfected everything; He is indeed All-Aware of what you 1 do .

verses.arabicUthmani: مَن جَآءَ بِٱلْحَسَنَةِ فَلَهُۥ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهَا وَهُم مِّن فَزَعٍ يَوْمَئِذٍ ءَامِنُونَ
verses.text: Whoever comes with a good deed—for him is one better than it and they are safe from horror 1 on that day,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ هَلْ تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: while whoever comes with an evil deed—their faces are tumbled into the Fire. “Are you 1 being repaid except for what you used to do?”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هَـٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ ۖ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: (Say sg ) “Indeed, I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this township, Who has made it inviolable and to Whom everything belongs, and I have been commanded to be of the Muslims 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنْ أَتْلُوَا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ ۖ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَهْتَدِى لِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَقُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ
verses.text: and to read the Recital 1 ; so whoever is guided, then he is surely guided to his own benefit. And whoever goes astray, then say, “Indeed, I am only one of the forewarners.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ فَتَعْرِفُونَهَا ۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَـٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: And say sg , “Praise be to Allah; He will show you pl His signs and you will recognize them. For in no way is your sg Lord oblivious of what you pl do 1 .”

verses.arabicUthmani: طسٓمٓ
verses.text: Tâ Sîn Mīm.

verses.arabicUthmani: تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
verses.text: Those are the signs 1 of the Evident Scripture.

verses.arabicUthmani: نَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْكَ مِن نَّبَإِ مُوسَىٰ وَفِرْعَوْنَ بِٱلْحَقِّ لِقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: We read to you sg from the tiding of Moses and Pharaoh in truth for people who believe.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِرْعَوْنَ عَلَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَجَعَلَ أَهْلَهَا شِيَعًا يَسْتَضْعِفُ طَآئِفَةً مِّنْهُمْ يُذَبِّحُ أَبْنَآءَهُمْ وَيَسْتَحْىِۦ نِسَآءَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, Pharaoh became exalted in the land and divided its people into sects, deeming a faction of them weak and oppressed: slaughtering their sons while keeping their women alive (in bondage) . Indeed, he was one of the corrupters.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنُرِيدُ أَن نَّمُنَّ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسْتُضْعِفُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَنَجْعَلَهُمْ أَئِمَّةً وَنَجْعَلَهُمُ ٱلْوَٰرِثِينَ
verses.text: Thus We are willing to favor those who were deemed weak and oppressed in the land and to make them leaders and to make them the inheritors

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنُمَكِّنَ لَهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَنُرِىَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَهَـٰمَـٰنَ وَجُنُودَهُمَا مِنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَحْذَرُونَ
verses.text: and to establish them in the land and to show Pharaoh and Hamān and their troops from them the very thing they used to fear 1 .
