verses.text: They said, “We see an evil omen in you pl ; if you do not give up, we will most surely stone you, and a painful punishment from us will most surely afflict you.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ طَـٰٓئِرُكُم مَّعَكُمْ ۚ أَئِن ذُكِّرْتُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّسْرِفُونَ
verses.text: They said, “Your evil omen is within yourselves. Can it be that it is because you were reminded 1 ? Rather, you are an extremist people!”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَآءَ مِنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ رَجُلٌ يَسْعَىٰ قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And there came a man rushing from the farthest end of the city. He said, “O my people, follow the emissaries.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَن لَّا يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ أَجْرًا وَهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
verses.text: Follow those who do not ask you pl any reward, and are themselves guided.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لِىَ لَآ أَعْبُدُ ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: And why should I not worship the One Who originated me, and to Whom you pl are returned 1 ?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً إِن يُرِدْنِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ بِضُرٍّ لَّا تُغْنِ عَنِّى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ
verses.text: Shall I take other gods apart from Him? If the All-Merciful wants harm for me, their intercession does not avail me at all, nor can they rescue me.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّىٓ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: In that case, I should indeed be in evident misguidance.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّىٓ ءَامَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَٱسْمَعُونِ
verses.text: Indeed, I have attained faith in your pl Lord, so listen to me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قِيلَ ٱدْخُلِ ٱلْجَنَّةَ ۖ قَالَ يَـٰلَيْتَ قَوْمِى يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: It was said, “Enter the Garden (of Paradise) .” He said, “Oh if only my people could know

verses.arabicUthmani: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِى رَبِّى وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
verses.text: how my Lord has forgiven me and made me one of the honored!”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ مِن جُندٍ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ
verses.text: And after him, We sent down no soldiers from heaven to his people, nor would We ever send any down.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خَـٰمِدُونَ
verses.text: It was just 1 a single Shout, and suddenly they were extinct.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ ۚ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: Alas for the servants! No messenger comes to them but they ridicule him.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: Have they not seen how many generations We annihilated before them—that they will not return to them?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: And none of them 1 but will be arraigned before Us, all together .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنَـٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: And there is a sign for them in the lifeless land: We have revived it and have brought out from it grains, so from it they eat.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّـٰتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَـٰبٍ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ
verses.text: And We have made in it gardens of palm-trees and grapevines, and have caused springs to burst forth in it,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: that they may eat from its produce and (from) what 1 their hands have made 2 . So will they not give thanks?

verses.arabicUthmani: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Highly Exalted is He Who created all pairs—of what the earth germinates and of their own selves 1 and of what they do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
verses.text: And a sign for them is the night: We strip the day out of it—and they are suddenly in darkness.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَّهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
verses.text: And the sun runs towards its destination; such is the determining of the Almighty, the All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَـٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
verses.text: And We have determined the moon 1 in phases until it returned like an old palm-branch.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
verses.text: The sun is not to overtake the moon, nor is the night to outpace the day, and each floats in an orbit.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
verses.text: And a sign for them is that We carried their offspring 1 in the laden ship,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ
verses.text: and We created for them the like of it in which they ride.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن نَّشَأْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ
verses.text: And if We will, We can drown them—with no screaming to be heard from them, nor will they be rescued,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَمَتَـٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: except by a mercy from Us and enjoyment for a while.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُوا۟ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَمَا خَلْفَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: And when it is said to them, “Be mindful of what lies before you and what lies behind you, that you may receive mercy” . . . 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ مِّنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ
verses.text: Yet never does a sign of their Lord’s signs come to them, but they disregard it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَنُطْعِمُ مَن لَّوْ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطْعَمَهُۥٓ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: And when it is said to them, “Spend of what Allah has provided for you,” those who deny say to those who have attained faith, “Shall we feed someone whom Allah could feed, if He so wills? You are but in evident misguidance.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: And they say, “When will this promise be, if you pl are truthful?”

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَخِصِّمُونَ
verses.text: All they can expect is a single Shout, which will take them away while they feud,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَوْصِيَةً وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمْ يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: so that they will neither be able to make a will nor return to their own people.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ
verses.text: And the trumpet was blown 1 , whereupon they walked quickly out from the tombs to their Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرْقَدِنَا ۜ ۗ هَـٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: They said, “Woe to us! Who has resurrected us from our resting place?” This is what the All-Merciful has promised, and the emissaries have spoken the truth.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: It was just 1 a single Shout, and suddenly they were all arraigned before Us.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: So today no soul is dealt with unjustly in the least, and you pl are not repaid except for what you used to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى شُغُلٍ فَـٰكِهُونَ
verses.text: Indeed, today the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) are happily busy,

verses.arabicUthmani: هُمْ وَأَزْوَٰجُهُمْ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ
verses.text: they and their spouses, in shades 1 , reclining on couches.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَهُمْ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ
verses.text: For them are fruits therein, and for them is whatever they call for.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْلًا مِّن رَّبٍّ رَّحِيمٍ
verses.text: “Peace”—a word from a Lord Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱمْتَـٰزُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: But step aside today, you criminals.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَلَمْ أَعْهَدْ إِلَيْكُمْ يَـٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Did I not covenant with you, O Children of Adam, that you shall not worship the devil—indeed, for you he is an evident enemy—

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنِ ٱعْبُدُونِى ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ
verses.text: and that you shall worship Me? This is a straight path.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَضَلَّ مِنكُمْ جِبِلًّا كَثِيرًا ۖ أَفَلَمْ تَكُونُوا۟ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: Yet he has certainly led a great multitude of you astray. Did you not use reason?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: This is Hell which you pl were promised.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
verses.text: Roast in it today on account of how you used to deny.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: Today, We put a seal upon their mouths, and their hands speak to Us, and their feet testify to whatever they used to earn.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: And if We will, We can obliterate their eyes, then they race with each other to (find) the Path—but how will they see?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
verses.text: And if We will, We can disfigure them right in their place 1 , so that they can neither move forward nor go back.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ ۖ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: And to whomever We give long life, We reverse his development—so will they 1 not reason ?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا عَلَّمْنَـٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: And never did We teach him 1 poetry, nor is it proper for him; it is but a Reminder and an Evident Recital 2 —

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: so that it may forewarn 1 whoever is alive, and so that God’s decree may be deserved by the deniers.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعَـٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مَـٰلِكُونَ
verses.text: Have they not seen that We have created for them, of Our Handiwork, livestock, so that they are their owners?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَذَلَّلْنَـٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: And We made them manageable by them, so some they ride and some they eat.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنَـٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: And they have in them other benefits and drinks, so will they not give thanks?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: Yet they have taken to themselves gods other than Allah, that perhaps they may be supported.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: They cannot support them, even if they are arraigned for them as an army.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
verses.text: So let not their words sadden you sg . Indeed, We know whatever they keep secret and whatever they make public.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Has man not regarded that We created him from a sperm-drop? Yet he became an evident adversary,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًا وَنَسِىَ خَلْقَهُۥ ۖ قَالَ مَن يُحْىِ ٱلْعِظَـٰمَ وَهِىَ رَمِيمٌ
verses.text: and he set forth a parable for Us and forgot his own creation. He said, “Who can revive the bones when they have decayed?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Say sg , “He who initiated them the first time revives them, for He is All-Knowing of every creation.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ نَارًا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنْهُ تُوقِدُونَ
verses.text: He who made fire for you pl out of green trees, so that with them you kindle.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَيْسَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: Is not He Who created the heavens and the earth capable 1 of creating the like of them? Yes indeed, and He is the All-Creating, the All-Knowing.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ
verses.text: Indeed, His only command once He has desired anything is to say to it, “Be,” and so it is 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: So Highly Exalted is the One in Whose hand is the dominion of everything, and to Him you sg are returned 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلصَّـٰٓفَّـٰتِ صَفًّا
verses.text: By those aligned, lined up in ranks.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلزَّٰجِرَٰتِ زَجْرًا
verses.text: Then by the propellers propelling firmly.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلتَّـٰلِيَـٰتِ ذِكْرًا
verses.text: Then by the readers of a Reminder—

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ إِلَـٰهَكُمْ لَوَٰحِدٌ
verses.text: indeed, your pl God is surely One,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ
verses.text: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, and Lord of the Easts.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلْكَوَاكِبِ
verses.text: Indeed, We have adorned the lowest 1 heaven with an adornment, the planets 2 ,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحِفْظًا مِّن كُلِّ شَيْطَـٰنٍ مَّارِدٍ
verses.text: and as a protection against every defiant devil.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٍ
verses.text: They cannot eavesdrop 1 on the Higher Assembly, for they get bombarded from every side—

verses.arabicUthmani: دُحُورًا ۖ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ وَاصِبٌ
verses.text: repelled, and they will have an unremitting punishment,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَنْ خَطِفَ ٱلْخَطْفَةَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ ثَاقِبٌ
verses.text: except for one who snatched a fragment and was then pursued by a piercing meteor.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَهُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَم مَّنْ خَلَقْنَآ ۚ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّن طِينٍ لَّازِبٍۭ
verses.text: So inquire sg of them, “Are they more difficult to create, or the others We created?” Indeed, We created them from sticky clay.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ عَجِبْتَ وَيَسْخَرُونَ
verses.text: Rather, you sg were amazed 1 as they ridicule.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ لَا يَذْكُرُونَ
verses.text: And when reminded, they remember not.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يَسْتَسْخِرُونَ
verses.text: And when they see a sign, they exaggerate in ridiculing

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: and say, “This is nothing but evident sorcery.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
verses.text: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones, can it be that 1 we will really be resurrected?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
verses.text: And 1 our ancient forefathers?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ نَعَمْ وَأَنتُمْ دَٰخِرُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Yes indeed, and you will be totally subdued.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ فَإِذَا هُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: It is but a single nudge, and there they are looking on (in bewilderment) !

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَا هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: And they said 1 , “Woe to us! This is the Day of Recompense.”

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: “This is the Day of Decision which you pl used to deny.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ ٱحْشُرُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ وَأَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: Herd pl those who were unjust and their spouses, and what they used to worship

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهْدُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: apart from Allah, and guide them to the path to purgatory.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقِفُوهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُم مَّسْـُٔولُونَ
verses.text: And stop them—indeed, they are to be questioned.”

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنَاصَرُونَ
verses.text: “What is the matter with you pl that you do not help one another?”

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ هُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ مُسْتَسْلِمُونَ
verses.text: Rather, on this day, they are submissive.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: And they came g to one another, asking one another.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَأْتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: They 1 said, “Indeed, you pl used to come at us from the right 2 ”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَل لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: They 1 said, “Rather, you pl yourselves were not believers,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيْكُم مِّن سُلْطَـٰنٍۭ ۖ بَلْ كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا طَـٰغِينَ
verses.text: and we had no authority over you; rather, you yourselves were a people who exceeded all limits.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَحَقَّ عَلَيْنَا قَوْلُ رَبِّنَآ ۖ إِنَّا لَذَآئِقُونَ
verses.text: And therefore we deserved our Lord’s decree on us. Most surely we will all get a taste,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَغْوَيْنَـٰكُمْ إِنَّا كُنَّا غَـٰوِينَ
verses.text: for we deluded you pl ; indeed, we were deluded.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ مُشْتَرِكُونَ
verses.text: So on that day, they are indeed partners in the punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: This is what We do with the criminals.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
verses.text: Indeed, when it was said to them, “There is no god except Allah,” they would act arrogantly

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍ مَّجْنُونٍۭ
verses.text: and say, “Are we really to abandon our gods for a mad poet?”

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ جَآءَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: In fact, he came with the truth, and he confirmed the emissaries.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّكُمْ لَذَآئِقُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْأَلِيمِ
verses.text: Most surely, you pl will taste the painful punishment,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: and in no way will you be repaid except for what you used to do,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: except for Allah’s sincere chosen 1 servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمْ رِزْقٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
verses.text: For those, there is a known provision:

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَٰكِهُ ۖ وَهُم مُّكْرَمُونَ
verses.text: fruits, and they are honored

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: in the Gardens of Bliss,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
verses.text: on couches facing one another.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينٍۭ
verses.text: A drink is passed round among them from a flowing spring:

verses.arabicUthmani: بَيْضَآءَ لَذَّةٍ لِّلشَّـٰرِبِينَ
verses.text: white, a delight to those who drink,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنزَفُونَ
verses.text: no headiness in it, nor by it are they 1 drained 2 .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعِندَهُمْ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ عِينٌ
verses.text: And with them are bashful maidens with lovely eyes,

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُنَّ بَيْضٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
verses.text: as if they were closely guarded eggs.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: So they came 1 to one another, asking one another.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ قَآئِلٌ مِّنْهُمْ إِنِّى كَانَ لِى قَرِينٌ
verses.text: One of them said, “Indeed, I did have a comrade

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُ أَءِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصَدِّقِينَ
verses.text: who would say, ‘Can it be that you sg are really of those who believe?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ
verses.text: Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones, can it be that 1 we will really be called to account?’”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّطَّلِعُونَ
verses.text: He said (to his companions in Paradise) , “Can you pl view (him) ?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱطَّلَعَ فَرَءَاهُ فِى سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: Then he viewed (him) and saw him in the midst of purgatory.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ تَٱللَّهِ إِن كِدتَّ لَتُرْدِينِ
verses.text: He said, “(I swear) by Allah, you sg almost ruined me.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْلَا نِعْمَةُ رَبِّى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْضَرِينَ
verses.text: And were it not for the blessing of my Lord, I would have been of the arraigned.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَيِّتِينَ
verses.text: “Are we (then) not to die

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَوْتَتَنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ
verses.text: except for our first death? And are we never to be punished?”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: It is most surely this which is the great triumph.

verses.arabicUthmani: لِمِثْلِ هَـٰذَا فَلْيَعْمَلِ ٱلْعَـٰمِلُونَ
verses.text: For the like of this let the workers work.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ نُّزُلًا أَمْ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
verses.text: Is this a better hospitality or the Tree of Zaqqum 1 ?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَـٰهَا فِتْنَةً لِّلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, We have made it a means of trial for the unjust.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخْرُجُ فِىٓ أَصْلِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: Indeed, it is a tree that comes out from the very origin of purgatory.

verses.arabicUthmani: طَلْعُهَا كَأَنَّهُۥ رُءُوسُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينِ
verses.text: Its yield is as if it were devils’ heads.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّهُمْ لَـَٔاكِلُونَ مِنْهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ
verses.text: So they are sure to eat from it and fill their bellies with it.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا لَشَوْبًا مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ
verses.text: Then, on top of it, they will have a brew of scalding water.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّ مَرْجِعَهُمْ لَإِلَى ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: Then their return is sure to be to purgatory.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ أَلْفَوْا۟ ءَابَآءَهُمْ ضَآلِّينَ
verses.text: Indeed, they found their forefathers astray,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهُمْ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِمْ يُهْرَعُونَ
verses.text: so they rush along in their footsteps.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ ضَلَّ قَبْلَهُمْ أَكْثَرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: And certainly, most of the ancients before them went astray.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِم مُّنذِرِينَ
verses.text: And certainly, We sent among them forewarners.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: So look sg at what the outcome was for those who were warned,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: except for Allah’s sincere chosen 1 servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ نَادَىٰنَا نُوحٌ فَلَنِعْمَ ٱلْمُجِيبُونَ
verses.text: And certainly, Noah called out to Us, so the very excellent of responders are We!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: Thus We delivered him and his family from the great calamity,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُۥ هُمُ ٱلْبَاقِينَ
verses.text: and We made his offspring the sole survivors,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and We left him thus to be remembered among later generations.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰ نُوحٍ فِى ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Peace be upon Noah among (all creatures of) all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, thus do We repay those who excel in doing good.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, he is one of Our believing servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: Then We drowned the others.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَإِنَّ مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ لَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ
verses.text: And, indeed, of his kind is Abraham.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ جَآءَ رَبَّهُۥ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ
verses.text: Recall when he came to his Lord with a sound heart.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لِأَبِيهِ وَقَوْمِهِۦ مَاذَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: He said to his father and his people, “What are you worshiping?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَئِفْكًا ءَالِهَةً دُونَ ٱللَّهِ تُرِيدُونَ
verses.text: Is it false gods, instead of Allah, that you pl want?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا ظَنُّكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: So what is your pl opinion about the Lord of all realms?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَنَظَرَ نَظْرَةً فِى ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.text: Then he took one look at the stars

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ إِنِّى سَقِيمٌ
verses.text: and said, “I am sick.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ مُدْبِرِينَ
verses.text: So they turned away from him, fleeing,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمْ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: whereupon he turned to their gods and said, “Will you pl not eat?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنطِقُونَ
verses.text: What is it with you pl ? Do you not speak?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَاغَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضَرْبًۢا بِٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: Then he turned on them, striking with his right hand.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَقْبَلُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ يَزِفُّونَ
verses.text: So they came towards him, dashing 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَتَعْبُدُونَ مَا تَنْحِتُونَ
verses.text: He said, “Do you worship what you carve,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمْ وَمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: when Allah has created you pl and all that you do?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ ٱبْنُوا۟ لَهُۥ بُنْيَـٰنًا فَأَلْقُوهُ فِى ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: They said, “Build a structure for him and throw him into purgatory.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَرَادُوا۟ بِهِۦ كَيْدًا فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمُ ٱلْأَسْفَلِينَ
verses.text: So they desired to plot against him, but We made them the lowest.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالَ إِنِّى ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ
verses.text: And then he said, “I am going to my Lord—He will guide me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: “My Lord, give me one of the righteous.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبَشَّرْنَـٰهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ حَلِيمٍ
verses.text: So We gave him glad tidings of a forbearing boy.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا بَلَغَ مَعَهُ ٱلسَّعْىَ قَالَ يَـٰبُنَىَّ إِنِّىٓ أَرَىٰ فِى ٱلْمَنَامِ أَنِّىٓ أَذْبَحُكَ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا تَرَىٰ ۚ قَالَ يَـٰٓأَبَتِ ٱفْعَلْ مَا تُؤْمَرُ ۖ سَتَجِدُنِىٓ إِن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: Then, when he was old enough to accompany him, he said, “O my child, I see in a dream that I am sacrificing you, so look— what do you see 1 ?” He said, “O my father, do as you are commanded; you will find me, Allah willing, of the patient ones.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّآ أَسْلَمَا وَتَلَّهُۥ لِلْجَبِينِ
verses.text: Then, when they dl had submitted and he laid him down on his forehead,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَـٰدَيْنَـٰهُ أَن يَـٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ
verses.text: We then called out to him, “O Abraham!

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ صَدَّقْتَ ٱلرُّءْيَآ ۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: You sg have truly fulfilled the vision.” Thus indeed do We repay those who excel in doing good.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْبَلَـٰٓؤُا۟ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: Indeed, this was certainly the evident test.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَدَيْنَـٰهُ بِذِبْحٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: And We redeemed him with a great sacrifice,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and We left him thus to be remembered among later generations:

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ
verses.text: “Peace be upon Abraham.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Thus We repay those who excel in doing good.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, he is one of Our believing servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبَشَّرْنَـٰهُ بِإِسْحَـٰقَ نَبِيًّا مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: And We gave him glad tidings of Isaac, a prophet, one of the righteous.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبَـٰرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ ۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحْسِنٌ وَظَالِمٌ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ مُبِينٌ
verses.text: And We blessed him and Isaac. But of their offspring is one who excels in doing good and one who is evidently unjust to himself.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ
verses.text: And We certainly conferred Our favor upon Moses and Aaron,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُمَا وَقَوْمَهُمَا مِنَ ٱلْكَرْبِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: and We delivered them dl and their people from the great calamity.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَصَرْنَـٰهُمْ فَكَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ
verses.text: And We supported them pl , so they were the overcomers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمَا ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ٱلْمُسْتَبِينَ
verses.text: And We gave them dl the evidential Scripture,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهَدَيْنَـٰهُمَا ٱلصِّرَٰطَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ
verses.text: and We guided them dl upon the straight path.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِمَا فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: And We left them dl thus to be remembered among later generations:

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ وَهَـٰرُونَ
verses.text: “Peace be upon Moses and Aaron.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Thus do We repay those who excel in doing good.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, they are of Our believing servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ إِلْيَاسَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And Elijah is indeed one of the emissaries.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ لِقَوْمِهِۦٓ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: Recall when he said to his people, “Will you not be mindful (of God) ?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَدْعُونَ بَعْلًا وَتَذَرُونَ أَحْسَنَ ٱلْخَـٰلِقِينَ
verses.text: Do you pl call upon Baʻl 1 and leave the best of creators —

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ وَرَبَّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: Allah, your Lord 1 and the Lord of your ancient fathers?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَإِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: But they disbelieved him, and thus they will certainly be arraigned,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: except for Allah’s sincere chosen 1 servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: And We left him thus to be remembered among later generations:

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰٓ إِلْ يَاسِينَ
verses.text: “Peace be upon Elijah 1 .”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Thus do We repay those who excel in doing good.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, he is one of Our believing servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لُوطًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And Lot is indeed one of the emissaries.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ نَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَأَهْلَهُۥٓ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: Recall when We delivered him and all of his family,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عَجُوزًا فِى ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ
verses.text: except for an old woman 1 who lingered behind.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ دَمَّرْنَا ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ
verses.text: Then We annihilated the others.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّكُمْ لَتَمُرُّونَ عَلَيْهِم مُّصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: And most surely you pl pass by them in the morning

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبِٱلَّيْلِ ۗ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: and at night. Do you not reason?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ يُونُسَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And Jonah is indeed one of the emissaries.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ أَبَقَ إِلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
verses.text: Recall when he fled to the overloaded ship,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَاهَمَ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُدْحَضِينَ
verses.text: and he drew lots and was of those who lost.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْتَقَمَهُ ٱلْحُوتُ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
verses.text: Then the whale took him into its mouth, and he was to blame.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَوْلَآ أَنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ
verses.text: And had he not been one of those who highly exalt God,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَلَبِثَ فِى بَطْنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: he would have stayed in its belly until the day they are resurrected.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ سَقِيمٌ
verses.text: Then We threw him into the wilderness while he was sick,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنۢبَتْنَا عَلَيْهِ شَجَرَةً مِّن يَقْطِينٍ
verses.text: and We germinated a gourd tree over him.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِا۟ئَةِ أَلْفٍ أَوْ يَزِيدُونَ
verses.text: Then We sent him to a hundred thousand or more.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَـَٔامَنُوا۟ فَمَتَّعْنَـٰهُمْ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: And they attained faith, so We gave them enjoyment for some time.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَلِرَبِّكَ ٱلْبَنَاتُ وَلَهُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
verses.text: So inquire sg of them, “Are the daughters for your sg Lord while for them are the sons?”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ إِنَـٰثًا وَهُمْ شَـٰهِدُونَ
verses.text: Or did We create the angels as females while they witnessed?”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَآ إِنَّهُم مِّنْ إِفْكِهِمْ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.text: Undoubtedly, it is out of their utter falsehood that they do indeed say,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَدَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: “Allah has begotten.” But they are most surely liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَصْطَفَى ٱلْبَنَاتِ عَلَى ٱلْبَنِينَ
verses.text: Has He selected daughters over sons?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا لَكُمْ كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: What is it with you pl ? How do you judge?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Will you not remind 1 yourselves ?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَكُمْ سُلْطَـٰنٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Or do you pl have an evident manifestation?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأْتُوا۟ بِكِتَـٰبِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Then bring your pl scripture, if you have been truthful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَعَلُوا۟ بَيْنَهُۥ وَبَيْنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ نَسَبًا ۚ وَلَقَدْ عَلِمَتِ ٱلْجِنَّةُ إِنَّهُمْ لَمُحْضَرُونَ
verses.text: And they invented a relationship between Him and (the race of) unseen beings 1 . And certainly, (the race of) unseen beings knew that they (who made the claims) would surely be arraigned—

verses.arabicUthmani: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.text: Highly Exalted is Allah far above what they describe—

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: except for Allah’s sincere chosen 1 servants.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّكُمْ وَمَا تَعْبُدُونَ
verses.text: Thus surely, you pl and what you worship

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَنتُمْ عَلَيْهِ بِفَـٰتِنِينَ
verses.text: can never seduce (anyone) away from Him,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا مَنْ هُوَ صَالِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: except for one who is to roast in purgatory.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا مِنَّآ إِلَّا لَهُۥ مَقَامٌ مَّعْلُومٌ
verses.text: “And there is not one of us 1 but has an assigned position.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلصَّآفُّونَ
verses.text: And we are indeed the aligned.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّا لَنَحْنُ ٱلْمُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.text: And we are indeed those who exalt God.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن كَانُوا۟ لَيَقُولُونَ
verses.text: Even though they 1 used to say,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوْ أَنَّ عِندَنَا ذِكْرًا مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: “Had we received a Reminder from the ancients 1 ,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَكُنَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: we would have been Allah’s sincere chosen servants.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَفَرُوا۟ بِهِۦ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: But they denied it, so they will find out.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ سَبَقَتْ كَلِمَتُنَا لِعِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And most surely Our Word has already gone out to our servant emissaries:

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ لَهُمُ ٱلْمَنصُورُونَ
verses.text: indeed, it is they who shall surely be supported,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ جُندَنَا لَهُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ
verses.text: and indeed it is Our soldiers who shall surely be the overcomers.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: So turn sg away from them for some time,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَبْصِرْهُمْ فَسَوْفَ يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and watch them—for they will soon see.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَبِعَذَابِنَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.text: Do they seek to hasten Our punishment?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا نَزَلَ بِسَاحَتِهِمْ فَسَآءَ صَبَاحُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ
verses.text: Yet, when it descends into their courtyard, miserable shall be the morning of those forewarned 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: And turn sg away from them for a while,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَبْصِرْ فَسَوْفَ يُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and watch—they will soon see.

verses.arabicUthmani: سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ ٱلْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
verses.text: Highly Exalted is your Lord, the Lord of Might, far above what they describe.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَى ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
verses.text: And peace be upon the emissaries.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: And all praise be to Allah, Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: صٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ذِى ٱلذِّكْرِ
verses.text: Sād. By the Recital 1 containing the Reminder.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى عِزَّةٍ وَشِقَاقٍ
verses.text: Yet those who denied are in a state of might 1 and opposition.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن قَرْنٍ فَنَادَوا۟ وَّلَاتَ حِينَ مَنَاصٍ
verses.text: How many generations have We caused to perish before them, so they called out when it was too late to escape!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَعَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌ مِّنْهُمْ ۖ وَقَالَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا سَـٰحِرٌ كَذَّابٌ
verses.text: And they marveled that a forewarner had come to them from among them, and the deniers said, “This is a sorcerer, a sheer liar.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَجَعَلَ ٱلْـَٔالِهَةَ إِلَـٰهًا وَٰحِدًا ۖ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ عُجَابٌ
verses.text: Did he make all the gods into one God? Surely this is indeed something strange.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱنطَلَقَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِنْهُمْ أَنِ ٱمْشُوا۟ وَٱصْبِرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِكُمْ ۖ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَشَىْءٌ يُرَادُ
verses.text: And the chiefs among them proceeded, (saying) , “Walk away (from the Prophet) and hold fast to your pl gods; indeed this is certainly something planned.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا سَمِعْنَا بِهَـٰذَا فِى ٱلْمِلَّةِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا ٱخْتِلَـٰقٌ
verses.text: Never have we heard of this in the former creed. This is nothing but an invention.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءُنزِلَ عَلَيْهِ ٱلذِّكْرُ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّن ذِكْرِى ۖ بَل لَّمَّا يَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِ
verses.text: Was the Reminder sent down to him out of all of us?” Rather, they are doubtful about My Reminder; rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَحْمَةِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْوَهَّابِ
verses.text: Or do they possess the treasuries of your sg Lord’s mercy, the Almighty, the Giver?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُم مُّلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ۖ فَلْيَرْتَقُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَسْبَـٰبِ
verses.text: Or do they possess the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them? Then let them ascend by any means.

verses.arabicUthmani: جُندٌ مَّا هُنَالِكَ مَهْزُومٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَحْزَابِ
verses.text: An army of confederates will be defeated there.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ وَعَادٌ وَفِرْعَوْنُ ذُو ٱلْأَوْتَادِ
verses.text: Before them the people of Noah disbelieved, as did ʻĀd 1 , and Pharaoh of the stakes,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثَمُودُ وَقَوْمُ لُوطٍ وَأَصْحَـٰبُ لْـَٔيْكَةِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلْأَحْزَابُ
verses.text: and Thamûd 1 and the people of Lot and the fellows of the thicket. Those were the parties.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن كُلٌّ إِلَّا كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ عِقَابِ
verses.text: None of them but disbelieved the messengers, so My punishment was deserved.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَنظُرُ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً مَّا لَهَا مِن فَوَاقٍ
verses.text: For these await nothing but a single shout, from which there is no recovery.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا عَجِّل لَّنَا قِطَّنَا قَبْلَ يَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: Yet they said, “Our Lord, hasten for us our share of punishment before the Day of Reckoning.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَا دَاوُۥدَ ذَا ٱلْأَيْدِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: Endure sg patiently what they say and remember Our servant David who was endowed with strong faith; indeed, he often turns 1 to Us.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا سَخَّرْنَا ٱلْجِبَالَ مَعَهُۥ يُسَبِّحْنَ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ وَٱلْإِشْرَاقِ
verses.text: Indeed, We subjected the mountains to give due exaltations (to God) with him in the evening and at daybreak,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلطَّيْرَ مَحْشُورَةً ۖ كُلٌّ لَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: with the birds made to flock, each often turning to Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَشَدَدْنَا مُلْكَهُۥ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَفَصْلَ ٱلْخِطَابِ
verses.text: Thus We strengthened his dominion and brought him wisdom and decisive speech.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَصْمِ إِذْ تَسَوَّرُوا۟ ٱلْمِحْرَابَ
verses.text: And has the tiding of the disputants reached you sg , as they climbed the sanctuary—

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَىٰ دَاوُۥدَ فَفَزِعَ مِنْهُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ خَصْمَانِ بَغَىٰ بَعْضُنَا عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَنَا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تُشْطِطْ وَٱهْدِنَآ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ
verses.text: as they entered upon David, and he was startled by them? They said, “Do not fear; two disputants, one of whom has oppressed the other. So judge between us with the truth and do not be untrue, and guide us to the right path.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَآ أَخِى لَهُۥ تِسْعٌ وَتِسْعُونَ نَعْجَةً وَلِىَ نَعْجَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ فَقَالَ أَكْفِلْنِيهَا وَعَزَّنِى فِى ٱلْخِطَابِ
verses.text: “Indeed, this is my brother; he has ninety-nine ewes and I have just one ewe, and he said, ‘Entrust it to me,’ and he pressured me with words.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لَقَدْ ظَلَمَكَ بِسُؤَالِ نَعْجَتِكَ إِلَىٰ نِعَاجِهِۦ ۖ وَإِنَّ كَثِيرًا مِّنَ ٱلْخُلَطَآءِ لَيَبْغِى بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَقَلِيلٌ مَّا هُمْ ۗ وَظَنَّ دَاوُۥدُ أَنَّمَا فَتَنَّـٰهُ فَٱسْتَغْفَرَ رَبَّهُۥ وَخَرَّ رَاكِعًا وَأَنَابَ ۩
verses.text: He said, “He has done you sg wrong by asking your ewe in addition to his ewes, and indeed many partners do oppress one another— except those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds, but these are so few.” And David realized that We were testing him, so he sought forgiveness from his Lord and fell down to his knees and turned penitent.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَغَفَرْنَا لَهُۥ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
verses.text: So We forgave him that, and indeed there is most surely for him nearness to Us and a beautiful place to return to.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰدَاوُۥدُ إِنَّا جَعَلْنَـٰكَ خَلِيفَةً فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱحْكُم بَيْنَ ٱلنَّاسِ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا تَتَّبِعِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ فَيُضِلَّكَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَضِلُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ شَدِيدٌۢ بِمَا نَسُوا۟ يَوْمَ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: “O David, We have appointed you as a viceroy in the land, so judge between mankind with the truth and do not follow the whim, lest it misguide you from the way of Allah. Indeed, for those who stray from the way of Allah there is a severe punishment for their having forgotten the Day of Reckoning.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا بَـٰطِلًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ظَنُّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۚ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: And in no way have We created the heaven and the earth and whatever is between them in vain. That is the assumption of those who have denied. So woe to those who have denied from the Fire!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ كَٱلْمُفْسِدِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ نَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ كَٱلْفُجَّارِ
verses.text: Or are We to make those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds equal to those who spread corruption in the earth? Or are We to make the people who are mindful (of God) equal to the wicked?

verses.arabicUthmani: كِتَـٰبٌ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَيْكَ مُبَـٰرَكٌ لِّيَدَّبَّرُوٓا۟ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ وَلِيَتَذَكَّرَ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ
verses.text: A Scripture that We sent down to you sg , blessed, that they 1 may ponder its signs 2 and that those endowed with understanding may remind themselves.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَهَبْنَا لِدَاوُۥدَ سُلَيْمَـٰنَ ۚ نِعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: And to David We gave Solomon, an excellent servant; indeed, he often turns 1 to Us.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ عُرِضَ عَلَيْهِ بِٱلْعَشِىِّ ٱلصَّـٰفِنَـٰتُ ٱلْجِيَادُ
verses.text: Recall when the beautiful horses were paraded before him in the evening,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالَ إِنِّىٓ أَحْبَبْتُ حُبَّ ٱلْخَيْرِ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّى حَتَّىٰ تَوَارَتْ بِٱلْحِجَابِ
verses.text: so he said, “Indeed, I have loved the good things with a love more than the remembrance of my Lord, until it 1 disappeared behind the veil (of night) .

verses.arabicUthmani: رُدُّوهَا عَلَىَّ ۖ فَطَفِقَ مَسْحًۢا بِٱلسُّوقِ وَٱلْأَعْنَاقِ
verses.text: Bring pl them back to me.” And he started to stroke their legs and necks.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا سُلَيْمَـٰنَ وَأَلْقَيْنَا عَلَىٰ كُرْسِيِّهِۦ جَسَدًا ثُمَّ أَنَابَ
verses.text: And surely, We tested Solomon and cast a body on his throne, then he turned penitent.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَهَبْ لِى مُلْكًا لَّا يَنۢبَغِى لِأَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِىٓ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْوَهَّابُ
verses.text: He said, “My Lord, forgive me and grant me a dominion never to be attained by anyone after me; indeed, You— only You—are the Giver.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَخَّرْنَا لَهُ ٱلرِّيحَ تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦ رُخَآءً حَيْثُ أَصَابَ
verses.text: So We subjected to him the wind 1 , flowing gently by his command wherever he directed;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ كُلَّ بَنَّآءٍ وَغَوَّاصٍ
verses.text: and the demons—every builder and diver;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاخَرِينَ مُقَرَّنِينَ فِى ٱلْأَصْفَادِ
verses.text: and others bound together in fetters.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا عَطَآؤُنَا فَٱمْنُنْ أَوْ أَمْسِكْ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
verses.text: “This is Our gift, so give sg generously or withhold, without measure.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لَهُۥ عِندَنَا لَزُلْفَىٰ وَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
verses.text: And indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a beautiful place to return to.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ عَبْدَنَآ أَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ بِنُصْبٍ وَعَذَابٍ
verses.text: And recall Our servant Job, when he called out to his Lord, “Satan has touched me with toil and suffering.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱرْكُضْ بِرِجْلِكَ ۖ هَـٰذَا مُغْتَسَلٌۢ بَارِدٌ وَشَرَابٌ
verses.text: “Stamp your foot—this is a cool washing-place and drinking-place.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُۥٓ أَهْلَهُۥ وَمِثْلَهُم مَّعَهُمْ رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ
verses.text: And We gave him back his family and doubled them—a mercy from Us and a reminding for those endowed with understanding.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخُذْ بِيَدِكَ ضِغْثًا فَٱضْرِب بِّهِۦ وَلَا تَحْنَثْ ۗ إِنَّا وَجَدْنَـٰهُ صَابِرًا ۚ نِّعْمَ ٱلْعَبْدُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَوَّابٌ
verses.text: “And take with your sg hand a bundle of grass, and strike with it so as not to breach (your oath) .” Indeed, We found him patient. What an excellent servant; indeed, he often turns a unto Us.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ عِبَـٰدَنَآ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَإِسْحَـٰقَ وَيَعْقُوبَ أُو۟لِى ٱلْأَيْدِى وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرِ
verses.text: And recall sg Our servants 1 Abraham and Isaac and Jacob—those endowed with strong faith and with sight (s) .

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَخْلَصْنَـٰهُم بِخَالِصَةٍ ذِكْرَى ٱلدَّارِ
verses.text: Surely We distinguished them with a distinct quality 1 —the remembrance of the (final) Home.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُمْ عِندَنَا لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصْطَفَيْنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ
verses.text: And indeed, to Us they are of the elect, the outstanding.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱذْكُرْ إِسْمَـٰعِيلَ وَٱلْيَسَعَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ ۖ وَكُلٌّ مِّنَ ٱلْأَخْيَارِ
verses.text: And recall sg Ishmael and Elisha and Ezekiel—and all are of the outstanding.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا ذِكْرٌ ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ لَحُسْنَ مَـَٔابٍ
verses.text: This is a Reminder. For indeed, for the mindful (of God) is a beautiful place to return to:

verses.arabicUthmani: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ مُّفَتَّحَةً لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَبْوَٰبُ
verses.text: the Gardens of Eden, with their doors wide-open for them,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِفَـٰكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ وَشَرَابٍ
verses.text: relaxing therein and calling for abundant fruit and beverage.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَعِندَهُمْ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ أَتْرَابٌ
verses.text: And with them are bashful maidens of equal age.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: This is what you 1 are promised for the Day of Reckoning.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَرِزْقُنَا مَا لَهُۥ مِن نَّفَادٍ
verses.text: Indeed, such is Our provision, inexhaustible.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا ۚ وَإِنَّ لِلطَّـٰغِينَ لَشَرَّ مَـَٔابٍ
verses.text: All this. But indeed, for those who exceed all limits is a miserable place to return to:

verses.arabicUthmani: جَهَنَّمَ يَصْلَوْنَهَا فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمِهَادُ
verses.text: Hell, in which they roast—so what a miserable resting place!

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا فَلْيَذُوقُوهُ حَمِيمٌ وَغَسَّاقٌ
verses.text: All this, so let them taste it—scalding water and purulence.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاخَرُ مِن شَكْلِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجٌ
verses.text: And another 1 (torment) similar to it, of diverse kinds.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا فَوْجٌ مُّقْتَحِمٌ مَّعَكُمْ ۖ لَا مَرْحَبًۢا بِهِمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ صَالُوا۟ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: “This is a crowd rushing headlong with you pl .” They are not welcome; indeed, they are to be roasted in the Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ أَنتُمْ لَا مَرْحَبًۢا بِكُمْ ۖ أَنتُمْ قَدَّمْتُمُوهُ لَنَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْقَرَارُ
verses.text: They said, “But it is you pl who are not welcome! It is you who brought it upon us! So what a miserable end!”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا مَن قَدَّمَ لَنَا هَـٰذَا فَزِدْهُ عَذَابًا ضِعْفًا فِى ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: They said, “Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us, give him double punishment in the Fire.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ مَا لَنَا لَا نَرَىٰ رِجَالًا كُنَّا نَعُدُّهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَشْرَارِ
verses.text: And they said, “What is it with us that we do not see men whom we used to count among the villains?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَّخَذْنَـٰهُمْ سِخْرِيًّا أَمْ زَاغَتْ عَنْهُمُ ٱلْأَبْصَـٰرُ
verses.text: Did we take them with mockery 1 , or have our sight (s) swerved from them?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ لَحَقٌّ تَخَاصُمُ أَهْلِ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: Indeed, that is certainly true: the disputing among the inhabitants of the Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مُنذِرٌ ۖ وَمَا مِنْ إِلَـٰهٍ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ
verses.text: Say sg , “Indeed, I am only a forewarner, for there is no god except Allah—the One, the Subduer,

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفَّـٰرُ
verses.text: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Almighty, the Forgiver.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ نَبَؤٌا۟ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: Say sg , “It is a great tiding

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنتُمْ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضُونَ
verses.text: which you pl disregard.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا كَانَ لِىَ مِنْ عِلْمٍۭ بِٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰٓ إِذْ يَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: I have had no knowledge of the Highest Assembly as they disputed.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ إِلَّآ أَنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: It is only revealed to me that 1 I am an evident warner.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ إِنِّى خَـٰلِقٌۢ بَشَرًا مِّن طِينٍ
verses.text: Recall when Your sg Lord said to the angels, “Indeed, I am creating a human being from clay.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا سَوَّيْتُهُۥ وَنَفَخْتُ فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِى فَقَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ سَـٰجِدِينَ
verses.text: So when I have formed him and breathed into him of My spirit, fall prostrate before him.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَجَدَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ كُلُّهُمْ أَجْمَعُونَ
verses.text: So the angels fell prostrate, all of them, entirely—

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ ٱسْتَكْبَرَ وَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: but not Iblis 1 ; he acted arrogantly and became one of the deniers.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ يَـٰٓإِبْلِيسُ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَن تَسْجُدَ لِمَا خَلَقْتُ بِيَدَىَّ ۖ أَسْتَكْبَرْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالِينَ
verses.text: He said, “O Iblis, what prevented you from prostrating before what I created with My Own hands? Have you acted arrogantly, or have you become one of the exalted?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ ۖ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
verses.text: He said, “I am better than him; You created me from fire and created him from clay.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا فَإِنَّكَ رَجِيمٌ
verses.text: He said, “Then get out of it, for you are indeed an outcast!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكَ لَعْنَتِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: And indeed, My curse is upon you until the Day of Recompense.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ رَبِّ فَأَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
verses.text: He said, “My Lord, then reprieve me until the day they are resurrected.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَإِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Then indeed, you are of those reprieved

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْوَقْتِ ٱلْمَعْلُومِ
verses.text: until the Day of the Time Appointed.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَبِعِزَّتِكَ لَأُغْوِيَنَّهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: He said, “Then, by Your majesty, I will most surely delude them all,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عِبَادَكَ مِنْهُمُ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ
verses.text: except for your sincere chosen 1 servants among them.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ فَٱلْحَقُّ وَٱلْحَقَّ أَقُولُ
verses.text: He said, “So the truth 1 is —and only the truth I say—

verses.arabicUthmani: لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكَ وَمِمَّن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
verses.text: I will surely fill Hell with you sg and with whoever of them who follows you, all together.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَكَلِّفِينَ
verses.text: Say sg , “I ask of you no reward for this, and I am not a pretender.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: It is but a Reminder to (all creatures of) all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ نَبَأَهُۥ بَعْدَ حِينٍۭ
verses.text: And you pl will certainly know its tiding after a while.”

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِيلُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.text: The bestowal of the Scripture from on high is by Allah the Almighty, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ بِٱلْحَقِّ فَٱعْبُدِ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصًا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
verses.text: Indeed, We have sent down to you sg the Scripture with the truth, so worship Allah, devoting religion to Him.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَا لِلَّهِ ٱلدِّينُ ٱلْخَالِصُ ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ مَا نَعْبُدُهُمْ إِلَّا لِيُقَرِّبُونَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ زُلْفَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَهُمْ فِى مَا هُمْ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى مَنْ هُوَ كَـٰذِبٌ كَفَّارٌ
verses.text: Undoubtedly, faithful religion is due to Allah! And those who take guardians apart from Him— (they say,) “We only worship them so that they may bring us closer to Allah.” Indeed, Allah will judge between them regarding whatever they used to differ over. Indeed, Allah does not guide one who is a liar, a relentless denier.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّوْ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا لَّٱصْطَفَىٰ مِمَّا يَخْلُقُ مَا يَشَآءُ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥ ۖ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْوَٰحِدُ ٱلْقَهَّارُ
verses.text: Had Allah desired to have a child, He would have selected whatever He so willed from whatever He created. Highly Exalted is He; He is Allah, the One, the Subduer.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ يُكَوِّرُ ٱلَّيْلَ عَلَى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُكَوِّرُ ٱلنَّهَارَ عَلَى ٱلَّيْلِ ۖ وَسَخَّرَ ٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ ۖ كُلٌّ يَجْرِى لِأَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۗ أَلَا هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفَّـٰرُ
verses.text: He created the heavens and the earth with truth; He rolls the night around the day, and He rolls the day around the night. And He has subjected the sun and the moon, each running for a stated term. Undoubtedly, He is the Almighty, the Forgiving.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَكُم مِّن نَّفْسٍ وَٰحِدَةٍ ثُمَّ جَعَلَ مِنْهَا زَوْجَهَا وَأَنزَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ ثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَزْوَٰجٍ ۚ يَخْلُقُكُمْ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَـٰتِكُمْ خَلْقًا مِّنۢ بَعْدِ خَلْقٍ فِى ظُلُمَـٰتٍ ثَلَـٰثٍ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمُ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّكُمْ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ ۖ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ تُصْرَفُونَ
verses.text: He created you pl from a single self, then made from it its spouse, and sent down to you of livestock eight kinds in pairs. He creates you in your mothers’ bellies, one act of creation after another, in threefold darkness (es) . That is Allah, your pl Lord; to Him belongs the dominion; there is no god but Him, so how then are you turned away?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن تَكْفُرُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَنِىٌّ عَنكُمْ ۖ وَلَا يَرْضَىٰ لِعِبَادِهِ ٱلْكُفْرَ ۖ وَإِن تَشْكُرُوا۟ يَرْضَهُ لَكُمْ ۗ وَلَا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ ۗ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُم مَّرْجِعُكُمْ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: If you pl deny, then indeed Allah is Self-sufficient without (any need of) you, yet He does not approve denial on the part of His servants, and if you are thankful He approves it for you. And no bearer of burden bears the burden of another. Then to your Lord is your return, whereupon He informs you of what you used to do; indeed, He is All-Knowing of what lies within the chests.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ ضُرٌّ دَعَا رَبَّهُۥ مُنِيبًا إِلَيْهِ ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلَهُۥ نِعْمَةً مِّنْهُ نَسِىَ مَا كَانَ يَدْعُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ مِن قَبْلُ وَجَعَلَ لِلَّهِ أَندَادًا لِّيُضِلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ ۚ قُلْ تَمَتَّعْ بِكُفْرِكَ قَلِيلًا ۖ إِنَّكَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: And when some harm touches man, he calls upon his Lord, in penitence to Him. But then, when He confers on him a blessing of His, he forgets what he was previously calling upon for, and he sets up rivals to Allah in order to make (people) stray 1 from His way. Say, “Enjoyyour sg denial for a little while; you are one of the fellows of the Fire.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّنْ هُوَ قَـٰنِتٌ ءَانَآءَ ٱلَّيْلِ سَاجِدًا وَقَآئِمًا يَحْذَرُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ وَيَرْجُوا۟ رَحْمَةَ رَبِّهِۦ ۗ قُلْ هَلْ يَسْتَوِى ٱلَّذِينَ يَعْلَمُونَ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ ۗ إِنَّمَا يَتَذَكَّرُ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ
verses.text: Or what 1 about one who worships devoutly during the watches of the night, prostrating himself and standing up, wary of the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord? Say sg , “Are those who know and those who do not know equal?” Indeed, only those endowed with understanding remind themselves.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ يَـٰعِبَادِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ ۚ لِلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ فِى هَـٰذِهِ ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةٌ ۗ وَأَرْضُ ٱللَّهِ وَٰسِعَةٌ ۗ إِنَّمَا يُوَفَّى ٱلصَّـٰبِرُونَ أَجْرَهُم بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍ
verses.text: Say sg (on My behalf) , “O My servants who have attained faith, be mindful of your 1 Lord. For those who do good in this Earlier (Life) is goodness, and Allah’s land is vast. Indeed, the patient ones will be rendered their reward in full without measure.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنِّىٓ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصًا لَّهُ ٱلدِّينَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Indeed, I have been commanded to worship Allah, devoting religion to Him,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُمِرْتُ لِأَنْ أَكُونَ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: and I was commanded to become the first of the Muslims 1 .”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ إِنْ عَصَيْتُ رَبِّى عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: Say, “I fear, if I disobey my Lord, the punishment of a great day.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلِ ٱللَّهَ أَعْبُدُ مُخْلِصًا لَّهُۥ دِينِى
verses.text: Say sg , “It is Allah I worship, devoting my religion to Him.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱعْبُدُوا۟ مَا شِئْتُم مِّن دُونِهِۦ ۗ قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْخَـٰسِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَأَهْلِيهِمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۗ أَلَا ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْخُسْرَانُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: “So worship pl whatever you wish apart from Him.” Say sg , “Indeed, the losers are those who lost themselves and their people on the Day of Resurrection.” Undoubtedly, that is the evident loss.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَهُم مِّن فَوْقِهِمْ ظُلَلٌ مِّنَ ٱلنَّارِ وَمِن تَحْتِهِمْ ظُلَلٌ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يُخَوِّفُ ٱللَّهُ بِهِۦ عِبَادَهُۥ ۚ يَـٰعِبَادِ فَٱتَّقُونِ
verses.text: They have layers of fire above them, and layers beneath them. That is how Allah puts fear into His servants. “O My servants, therefore, be mindful of Me!”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ ٱجْتَنَبُوا۟ ٱلطَّـٰغُوتَ أَن يَعْبُدُوهَا وَأَنَابُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ لَهُمُ ٱلْبُشْرَىٰ ۚ فَبَشِّرْ عِبَادِ
verses.text: And those who avoided false masters—that they should worship them, and turned to Allah in penitence—for them are glad tidings. So give sg glad tidings to My servants

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يَسْتَمِعُونَ ٱلْقَوْلَ فَيَتَّبِعُونَ أَحْسَنَهُۥٓ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ هَدَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ ۖ وَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ
verses.text: who listen to what is said and follow the best of it; those are the ones whom Allah has guided, and those are the people of understanding.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمَنْ حَقَّ عَلَيْهِ كَلِمَةُ ٱلْعَذَابِ أَفَأَنتَ تُنقِذُ مَن فِى ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: What about the one who has deserved the decree of punishment? Is it you sg who (can) rescue those in the Fire?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَـٰكِنِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ رَبَّهُمْ لَهُمْ غُرَفٌ مِّن فَوْقِهَا غُرَفٌ مَّبْنِيَّةٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۖ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ لَا يُخْلِفُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمِيعَادَ
verses.text: But those who were mindful of their Lord—for them are compartments above which are compartments built high, with rivers flowing beneath them : the promise of Allah; Allah never breaks a promise.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ أَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَسَلَكَهُۥ يَنَـٰبِيعَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ثُمَّ يُخْرِجُ بِهِۦ زَرْعًا مُّخْتَلِفًا أَلْوَٰنُهُۥ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَىٰهُ مُصْفَرًّا ثُمَّ يَجْعَلُهُۥ حُطَـٰمًا ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ
verses.text: Have you pl not seen that Allah has sent down water from the sky, then He made it flow into springs in the earth, then He brings out with it vegetation of various colors, then they wither and you see them yellowing, then He turns them into debris? Indeed, in this is a reminding for the people of understanding.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمَن شَرَحَ ٱللَّهُ صَدْرَهُۥ لِلْإِسْلَـٰمِ فَهُوَ عَلَىٰ نُورٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ ۚ فَوَيْلٌ لِّلْقَـٰسِيَةِ قُلُوبُهُم مِّن ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: What about someone whose chest Allah has expanded to (accept) Islam, so that he follows a light from His Lord? So woe to those whose hearts are hardened against the remembrance of Allah; those are in evident misguidance.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ نَزَّلَ أَحْسَنَ ٱلْحَدِيثِ كِتَـٰبًا مُّتَشَـٰبِهًا مَّثَانِىَ تَقْشَعِرُّ مِنْهُ جُلُودُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُمْ ثُمَّ تَلِينُ جُلُودُهُمْ وَقُلُوبُهُمْ إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُدَى ٱللَّهِ يَهْدِى بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَمَن يُضْلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنْ هَادٍ
verses.text: Allah has bestowed the most beautiful of all teachings from on high: a Scripture consistent and paired. The skins of those who fear their Lord shiver from it, then their skins and their hearts soften up to the remembrance of Allah. Such is Allah’s guidance; He guides with it whomever He wills. But whomever Allah misguides, no guide shall there ever be for him.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمَن يَتَّقِى بِوَجْهِهِۦ سُوٓءَ ٱلْعَذَابِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۚ وَقِيلَ لِلظَّـٰلِمِينَ ذُوقُوا۟ مَا كُنتُمْ تَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: What about someone who covers his face against the terrible punishment of the Day of Resurrection? And it was said 1 to the unjust, “Taste what you pl used to earn.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: Those before them disbelieved, so the punishment came up to them from where they were unaware.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَذَاقَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْخِزْىَ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: So Allah made them taste disgrace in the Earlier Life, and surely the punishment of the Hereafter is more grievous, if they only knew.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ ضَرَبْنَا لِلنَّاسِ فِى هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن كُلِّ مَثَلٍ لَّعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: And surely, We have put forth in this Recital 1 for mankind all kinds of parables, that they may remind themselves:

verses.arabicUthmani: قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّا غَيْرَ ذِى عِوَجٍ لَّعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ
verses.text: an Arabic Recital b , free from any distortion, that they may become mindful (of God) .

verses.arabicUthmani: ضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًا رَّجُلًا فِيهِ شُرَكَآءُ مُتَشَـٰكِسُونَ وَرَجُلًا سَلَمًا لِّرَجُلٍ هَلْ يَسْتَوِيَانِ مَثَلًا ۚ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ۚ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Allah set forth the parable of a man owned by quarreling associates, and a man belonging exclusively to one man. Are they equal in status? All praise be to Allah. But most of them do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّكَ مَيِّتٌ وَإِنَّهُم مَّيِّتُونَ
verses.text: You sg will certainly die, and they will certainly die.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ عِندَ رَبِّكُمْ تَخْتَصِمُونَ
verses.text: Then certainly on the Day of Resurrection you will dispute with one another in the presence of your Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ فَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّن كَذَبَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ وَكَذَّبَ بِٱلصِّدْقِ إِذْ جَآءَهُۥٓ ۚ أَلَيْسَ فِى جَهَنَّمَ مَثْوًى لِّلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: So who is more unjust than one who lied about Allah and disbelieved the truth when it came to him? Is there not in Hell a dwelling for the deniers?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِى جَآءَ بِٱلصِّدْقِ وَصَدَّقَ بِهِۦٓ ۙ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُتَّقُونَ
verses.text: But the one who came with the sincere belief and sincerely believed in it—those 1 are the mindful (of God) .

verses.arabicUthmani: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: For them, with their Lord, is whatever they will; such is the repayment for those who excel in doing good.

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيُكَفِّرَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ أَسْوَأَ ٱلَّذِى عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِيَهُمْ أَجْرَهُم بِأَحْسَنِ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: So that Allah may remit the worst of what they have done and repay them their reward in accordance with the best of what they used to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِكَافٍ عَبْدَهُۥ ۖ وَيُخَوِّفُونَكَ بِٱلَّذِينَ مِن دُونِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يُضْلِلِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِنْ هَادٍ
verses.text: Is not Allah enough for His servant 1 ? And they (seek to) frighten you sg with those apart from Him. Thus whomever Allah misguides, no guide shall there ever be for him.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن يَهْدِ ٱللَّهُ فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن مُّضِلٍّ ۗ أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِعَزِيزٍ ذِى ٱنتِقَامٍ
verses.text: And whomever Allah guides, for him there is no misleader. Is Allah not Almighty, Capable of vengeance?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَئِن سَأَلْتَهُم مَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ لَيَقُولُنَّ ٱللَّهُ ۚ قُلْ أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ إِنْ أَرَادَنِىَ ٱللَّهُ بِضُرٍّ هَلْ هُنَّ كَـٰشِفَـٰتُ ضُرِّهِۦٓ أَوْ أَرَادَنِى بِرَحْمَةٍ هَلْ هُنَّ مُمْسِكَـٰتُ رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ قُلْ حَسْبِىَ ٱللَّهُ ۖ عَلَيْهِ يَتَوَكَّلُ ٱلْمُتَوَكِّلُونَ
verses.text: And if you sg asked them, “Who created the heavens and the earth?” they would say, “Allah.” Say, “Have you pl seen those whom you call upon apart from Allah? If Allah desired any harm for me, would they be capable of preventing His harm? And if He desired a blessing for me, would they be capable of preventing His mercy?” Say, “Allah suffices for me; those who trust, place their trust in Him.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱعْمَلُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِكُمْ إِنِّى عَـٰمِلٌ ۖ فَسَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Say, ‘My people, act according to your position 1 ; surely, I am also acting (according to mine) . Then you shall come to know

verses.arabicUthmani: مَن يَأْتِيهِ عَذَابٌ يُخْزِيهِ وَيَحِلُّ عَلَيْهِ عَذَابٌ مُّقِيمٌ
verses.text: who will receive a punishment that disgraces him, and upon whom a perpetual punishment shall fall.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ لِلنَّاسِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَلِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَإِنَّمَا يَضِلُّ عَلَيْهَا ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِوَكِيلٍ
verses.text: Indeed, We have sent down the Scripture upon you sg for mankind with the truth. So whoever seeks guidance does so to his own benefit, while whoever goes astray—he only does so to his own detriment, and you are not a trustee over them.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ يَتَوَفَّى ٱلْأَنفُسَ حِينَ مَوْتِهَا وَٱلَّتِى لَمْ تَمُتْ فِى مَنَامِهَا ۖ فَيُمْسِكُ ٱلَّتِى قَضَىٰ عَلَيْهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ وَيُرْسِلُ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰٓ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Allah takes up the selves at the time of their death, and those that have not died (He takes up) during their sleep. Then He retains those for which He has decreed 1 death and releases the others to (fulfill) a stated term. Most surely, in that are signs for people who reflect.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ شُفَعَآءَ ۚ قُلْ أَوَلَوْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: Or have they chosen intercessors other than Allah? Say sg , “Even though they have no power over anything, nor do they reason?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُل لِّلَّهِ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةُ جَمِيعًا ۖ لَّهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ ثُمَّ إِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “All intercession is up to Allah; to Him belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth, then to Him you pl are returned 1 .”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ ٱشْمَأَزَّتْ قُلُوبُ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ ۖ وَإِذَا ذُكِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ إِذَا هُمْ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ
verses.text: And when Allah is mentioned alone, the hearts of those who do not believe in the Hereafter are disgusted. But when those apart from Him are mentioned, they promptly start anticipating glad tidings.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلِ ٱللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ عَـٰلِمَ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ أَنتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ فِى مَا كَانُوا۟ فِيهِ يَخْتَلِفُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Our God, Originator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the hidden realm and the manifest, You judge between Your servants regarding whatever they used to differ over.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ أَنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ مَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا وَمِثْلَهُۥ مَعَهُۥ لَٱفْتَدَوْا۟ بِهِۦ مِن سُوٓءِ ٱلْعَذَابِ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۚ وَبَدَا لَهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَمْ يَكُونُوا۟ يَحْتَسِبُونَ
verses.text: If those who were unjust owned whatever is in the earth, all together, and the like of it with it, they would (seek to) redeem themselves with it from the terrible punishment on the Day of Resurrection. But there appeared 1 to them from Allah what they never anticipated.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبَدَا لَهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا كَسَبُوا۟ وَحَاقَ بِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
verses.text: And there appeared to them the evil deeds of whatever they had earned, and so they became surrounded by what they usedto ridicule.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا مَسَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ ضُرٌّ دَعَانَا ثُمَّ إِذَا خَوَّلْنَـٰهُ نِعْمَةً مِّنَّا قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أُوتِيتُهُۥ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍۭ ۚ بَلْ هِىَ فِتْنَةٌ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: And when harm touches man, he calls upon Us; then when We grant him a blessing from Us, he says, “I have been brought it solely because of (my) knowledge.” Rather, it is a means of trial, but most of them do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ قَالَهَا ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَمَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
verses.text: Those before them previously said that, but what they used to earn did not avail them,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَصَابَهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا كَسَبُوا۟ ۚ وَٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ مِنْ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ سَيُصِيبُهُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتُ مَا كَسَبُوا۟ وَمَا هُم بِمُعْجِزِينَ
verses.text: so they were afflicted by the evil deeds of whatever they had earned. And the unjust among these will also be afflicted by the evil deeds of whatever they have earned, and in no way can they thwart (God) .

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَبْسُطُ ٱلرِّزْقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَقْدِرُ ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Have they not come to know that Allah extends provision for whomever He wills, and He restrains (it) ? In that are signs for people who believe.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ قُلْ يَـٰعِبَادِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسْرَفُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَا تَقْنَطُوا۟ مِن رَّحْمَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ جَمِيعًا ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: Say sg , “O My servants who have gone to extremes against themselves: despair not of Allah’s mercy, for indeed Allah forgives all misdeeds; indeed, He is the Oft-Forgiving, the Bestower of mercy.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنِيبُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُمْ وَأَسْلِمُوا۟ لَهُۥ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَكُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ ثُمَّ لَا تُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: And turn penitent to your pl Lord and submit to Him before the punishment comes upon you and you are not supported.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱتَّبِعُوٓا۟ أَحْسَنَ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُم مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِيَكُمُ ٱلْعَذَابُ بَغْتَةً وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَشْعُرُونَ
verses.text: And follow the best of what was sent down to you pl from your Lord before the punishment comes upon you suddenly while you are unaware.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن تَقُولَ نَفْسٌ يَـٰحَسْرَتَىٰ عَلَىٰ مَا فَرَّطتُ فِى جَنۢبِ ٱللَّهِ وَإِن كُنتُ لَمِنَ ٱلسَّـٰخِرِينَ
verses.text: So that no soul may say, “Alas, for having neglected my duty towards Allah and for having been of the mockers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ تَقُولَ لَوْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هَدَىٰنِى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: Or it may say, “Had Allah guided me, I would have been of the mindful (of God) .”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوْ تَقُولَ حِينَ تَرَى ٱلْعَذَابَ لَوْ أَنَّ لِى كَرَّةً فَأَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: Or it may say, when it sees the punishment, “If only I had another chance, I would be of those who excel in doing good.”

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلَىٰ قَدْ جَآءَتْكَ ءَايَـٰتِى فَكَذَّبْتَ بِهَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرْتَ وَكُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: Yes indeed! My signs did come to you sg , but you disbelieved in them and acted arrogantly and were of the deniers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ تَرَى ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَبُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ وُجُوهُهُم مُّسْوَدَّةٌ ۚ أَلَيْسَ فِى جَهَنَّمَ مَثْوًى لِّلْمُتَكَبِّرِينَ
verses.text: And on the Day of Resurrection you sg see those who told lies about Allah with their faces blackened. Is there not in Hell a dwelling for the arrogant?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيُنَجِّى ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوْا۟ بِمَفَازَتِهِمْ لَا يَمَسُّهُمُ ٱلسُّوٓءُ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
verses.text: And Allah delivers 1 those who were mindful (of Him) to their place 2 of triumph ; no harm touches them, nor do they grieve.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ خَـٰلِقُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَكِيلٌ
verses.text: Allah is the Creator of everything, and He is the Ultimate Trustee over everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّهُۥ مَقَالِيدُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
verses.text: To Him belong the treasures of the heavens and the earth. But those who have denied the signs of Allah—it is they who are the losers.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَفَغَيْرَ ٱللَّهِ تَأْمُرُوٓنِّىٓ أَعْبُدُ أَيُّهَا ٱلْجَـٰهِلُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Is it other than Allah, then, that you command me to worship, you ignorant ones?”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ وَإِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكَ لَئِنْ أَشْرَكْتَ لَيَحْبَطَنَّ عَمَلُكَ وَلَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْخَـٰسِرِينَ
verses.text: And it was revealed to you sg and to those before you that if you sg associate (others with God) , your work will certainly be nullified, and you will certainly be of the losers.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱللَّهَ فَٱعْبُدْ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّـٰكِرِينَ
verses.text: Rather, worship Allah and be of the appreciative.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا قَدَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ حَقَّ قَدْرِهِۦ وَٱلْأَرْضُ جَمِيعًا قَبْضَتُهُۥ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ وَٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتُ مَطْوِيَّـٰتٌۢ بِيَمِينِهِۦ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥ وَتَعَـٰلَىٰ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: Yet they did not render to Allah the respect that He deserves, for the entire earth is in His grip on the Day of Resurrection, and the heavens are folded in His right. Highly Exalted is He and Most High beyond the associations they make.
