verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا۟ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ
verses.text: He said, “Do not dispute in My presence, for I have warned you pl in advance.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّـٰمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
verses.text: The decree from Me cannot be changed, and I am not a tyrant unto the servants.”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍ
verses.text: On the day when We say 1 to Hell, “Are you full?” And it says, “Are there any more?”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
verses.text: And the Garden (of Paradise) was brought closer to those mindful (of God) , not far away.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍ
verses.text: This is what you pl are promised 1 —for every constant preserver who often turns to God,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ
verses.text: the one who inwardly feared the All-Merciful and came with a penitent heart.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَـٰمٍ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُلُودِ
verses.text: “Enter pl it in peace; that is the Day of Eternity.”

verses.arabicUthmani: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ
verses.text: Therein they have whatever they desire, and We have even more.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًا فَنَقَّبُوا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
verses.text: And how many generations before them who were more powerful than they did We destroy! And they explored the lands—was there any escape?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ
verses.text: Indeed, in that is a reminder for whoever possesses a heart or cares to listen and witness.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ
verses.text: And surely We created the heavens and the earth and what is between them in six days 1 , and never were We touched by any fatigue.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ
verses.text: So endure sg what they say, and highly exalt your Lord with praise before the rising of the sun and before sunset.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَـٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
verses.text: And highly exalt sg Him with praise in the night and after 1 prostrations.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ ٱلْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍ قَرِيبٍ
verses.text: And listen sg on the day when the caller calls from a nearby place.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيْحَةَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُرُوجِ
verses.text: The day when they hear the Shout in all truth; that is the Day of Emergence.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: Indeed, We—We alone—give life and cause death, and to Us is the destiny.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌ
verses.text: The day the earth ruptures 1 open from above them, letting them rush out; that is an easy exodus for Us.

verses.arabicUthmani: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
verses.text: We know better what they say, and you sg are not a compeller over them, so remind by the Recital 1 whoever fears My warning.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلذَّٰرِيَـٰتِ ذَرْوًا
verses.text: By the spreaders spreading 1 ,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا
verses.text: and by those bearers of loads,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا
verses.text: and by those moving gently,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا
verses.text: and by those distributing as commanded—

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ
verses.text: what you pl are promised is true.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
verses.text: And, indeed, the Recompense is sure to come.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ
verses.text: By the heaven comprising interwoven tracks,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ
verses.text: indeed, you pl are of different opinions 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ
verses.text: Averted from it is he who is averted.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُتِلَ ٱلْخَرَّٰصُونَ
verses.text: May the conjecturers perish! 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ
verses.text: Those who are unmindful and in perplexity,

verses.arabicUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُونَ أَيَّانَ يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: asking, “When is the Day of Recompense?”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ
verses.text: The day they are heated on the Fire:

verses.arabicUthmani: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ
verses.text: “Taste your trial; this is what you pl , (challengingly) have been asking to be hastened.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
verses.text: Indeed, the mindful (of God) are amidst Gardens (of Paradise) and springs,

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ
verses.text: taking what their Lord has given them. Indeed, before that, they used to excel in doing good:

verses.arabicUthmani: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ
verses.text: they used to lie down but little of the night,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ
verses.text: and at dawn they would seek forgiveness,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
verses.text: and in their wealth was a share for the asker and the deprived.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ
verses.text: And on earth are signs for those who believe with certitude,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and within yourselves; do you not see?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: And in the heaven is your provision and what you are promised.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ
verses.text: So by the Lord of the heaven and the earth, indeed, it is as true as the fact that you pl (can) pronounce.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ضَيْفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ
verses.text: Has the story of Abraham’s 1 honored guests reached you sg ?

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ دَخَلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِ فَقَالُوا۟ سَلَـٰمًا ۖ قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْمٌ مُّنكَرُونَ
verses.text: When they entered upon him they said, “Peace.” He said, “Peace, strangers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ
verses.text: And he slipped away to his family and brought a fatted calf

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ
verses.text: and set it before them. He said, “Will you not eat?”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ
verses.text: And he was filled with apprehension towards them. They said, “Do not be afraid,” and they announced to him the glad tidings of a knowledgeable boy.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَقْبَلَتِ ٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ فِى صَرَّةٍ فَصَكَّتْ وَجْهَهَا وَقَالَتْ عَجُوزٌ عَقِيمٌ
verses.text: So his wife came forward with a shriek, then clasped her face and said, “A barren old woman!”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
verses.text: They said, “Thus your Lord has said; He is the All-Wise, the All- Knowing.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
verses.text: He said, “So what is your business, O emissaries?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: They said, “We have been sent to a criminal people,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ
verses.text: to unleash upon them rocks of clay,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ
verses.text: marked by your sg Lord for the extremists.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: Then We brought out all the believers who were in it.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
verses.text: Yet We found in it only one household of Muslims,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَرَكْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَةً لِّلَّذِينَ يَخَافُونَ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَلِيمَ
verses.text: and We left in it a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى مُوسَىٰٓ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: And in Moses (there is also a sign) —when We sent him to Pharaoh with an evident manifestation.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: But he turned away with his warlords and said, “A sorcerer or a madman.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُ وَجُنُودَهُۥ فَنَبَذْنَـٰهُمْ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَهُوَ مُلِيمٌ
verses.text: So We seized him and his troops and flung them into the waters, and he was to blame.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى عَادٍ إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلرِّيحَ ٱلْعَقِيمَ
verses.text: And (likewise) in (the people of) ʻĀd 1 —We sent against them the Barren Wind,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ
verses.text: sparing nothing it came upon without rendering it like decayed ruins.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ
verses.text: And (likewise) in (the people of) Thamûd 1 —they were told, “Enjoy yourselves for a while.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: But they defied the command of their Lord, so the Lightning struck 1 them as they looked on,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ
verses.text: and they could not rise up, nor could they help themselves.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا فَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: And (recall) before that, the people 1 of Noah—indeed, they were a defiantly disobedient people.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ
verses.text: And the universe—We constructed it with power, and We are surely expanding it.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ
verses.text: And the earth—We spread it out. So how excellent are We who prepared it!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: And We created all things in pairs, that you may remind 1 yourselves .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: “So flee to Allah; I am to you pl from Him an evident warner.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: And do not set up any other god with Allah; I am to you from Him an evident warner.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: Likewise, no messenger came to those before them but they said, “A sorcerer or a madman.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
verses.text: Did they recommend it to one another? In fact, they are a people who exceed all limits.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ
verses.text: So turn away from them, for you sg are not to blame.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: And remind, for the reminder benefits the believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
verses.text: And I did not create the unseen beings 1 and humans but to worship Me.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ
verses.text: I need no provision from them, nor do I need them to feed Me.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ
verses.text: Allah is the All-Providing, the Possessor of power, the All-Firm.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ ذَنُوبًا مِّثْلَ ذَنُوبِ أَصْحَـٰبِهِمْ فَلَا يَسْتَعْجِلُونِ
verses.text: So, indeed, those who do injustice will have their lot like the lot of their fellows, so let them not hasten Me.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ
verses.text: So woe to those who have denied from that day of theirs which they are promised.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلطُّورِ
verses.text: By Mount Tûr.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكِتَـٰبٍ مَّسْطُورٍ
verses.text: By a scripture inscribed

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى رَقٍّ مَّنشُورٍ
verses.text: in an unrolled parchment.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلْمَعْمُورِ
verses.text: By the frequented House (of God) .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّقْفِ ٱلْمَرْفُوعِ
verses.text: By the raised canopy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْبَحْرِ ٱلْمَسْجُورِ
verses.text: By the sea flared up with fire—

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَٰقِعٌ
verses.text: the punishment of your sg Lord is sure to come;

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّا لَهُۥ مِن دَافِعٍ
verses.text: there is nothing to avert it

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوْرًا
verses.text: on the day when the sky sways in agitation

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلْجِبَالُ سَيْرًا
verses.text: and the mountains go into motion.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَوَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: So woe on that day to the disbelievers

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ
verses.text: who are indulged in vain talk, playing.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
verses.text: The day when they are shoved into the Fire of Hell forcefully.

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: “This is the Fire in which you pl used to disbelieve.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَسِحْرٌ هَـٰذَآ أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: Is this magic, or do you pl not see?

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Roast in it, and be patient or be impatient—it is the same for you pl ; indeed, you are only being repaid for what you used to do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَعِيمٍ
verses.text: Indeed, the mindful (of God) are in Gardens and bliss,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَـٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: enjoying what their Lord has brought them, and their Lord has shielded them from the punishment of purgatory.

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: “Eat and drink pleasantly on account of what you pl used to do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ ۖ وَزَوَّجْنَـٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
verses.text: Relaxing on luxurious furnishings, and We coupled them with spouses with lovely wide eyes.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَـٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَـٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍ ۚ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌ
verses.text: And those who attained faith and whose offspring 1 followed them in faith—We have united 2 them with their offspring 3 , and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمْدَدْنَـٰهُم بِفَـٰكِهَةٍ وَلَحْمٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.text: And We have supplied them with fruit and meat such as they desire.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَتَنَـٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ
verses.text: They exchange therein a cup which does not lead to any idle talk or recrimination.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ
verses.text: And serving them are youths like nestled pearls.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: And they approached one another, inquiring.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
verses.text: They said, “When we were still with our families 1 we used to live in fear 2 ,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
verses.text: so Allah has conferred favor upon us and has shielded us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: Indeed, before this we used to pray to Him; indeed , 1 He is the Fulfiller of promises, the Bestower of mercy.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
verses.text: So remind, for you sg are neither a soothsayer nor a madman.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
verses.text: Or do they say, “A poet 1 for whom we await a calamity of time”?

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Go on awaiting, for I am with you pl among those awaiting.”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَـٰمُهُم بِهَـٰذَآ ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ
verses.text: Or is it that their discerning minds command them to this? Or are they a people who exceed all limits?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Or do they say, “He made it up”? In fact, they do not believe.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: So let them produce a discourse like it if they are truthful.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
verses.text: Or were they created out of nothing? Or are they the creators?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? In fact, they are not certain.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
verses.text: Or do they possess the treasuries of your Lord? Or are they the controllers?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Or do they have a stairway (to heaven) by means of which they listen? Then let their listener bring an evident manifestation.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَـٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
verses.text: Or is He to have the daughters and you pl the sons?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.text: Or do you sg ask them for a reward so that they are weighed down by debt?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.text: Or do they have (knowledge of) the hidden realm and they are writing it down?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًا ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
verses.text: Or do they want a plot? Rather, the plot will only befall the deniers.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: Or do they have a god other than Allah? Highly Exalted is Allah above what they associate.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ
verses.text: And if they were to see lumps of sky falling, they would say, “A mass of clouds.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
verses.text: So leave sg them until they meet 1 their day in which they are stunned—

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: the day when their plots avail them nothing, nor are they supported.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: And indeed, for those who did injustice there is a punishment apart from that, but most of them do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.text: So wait patiently for the decree of your sg Lord, for you are before Our Eyes. And highly exalt your Lord with praise when you arise,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَـٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.text: and highly exalt Him during the night and at the receding of the stars.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّجْمِ إِذَا هَوَىٰ
verses.text: By the star as it goes down,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمْ وَمَا غَوَىٰ
verses.text: your pl fellow has not gone astray, nor has he been deluded,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا يَنطِقُ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰٓ
verses.text: nor does he speak out of whim.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا وَحْىٌ يُوحَىٰ
verses.text: It is but a revelation being revealed,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَهُۥ شَدِيدُ ٱلْقُوَىٰ
verses.text: taught to him by the extremely powerful, 1

verses.arabicUthmani: ذُو مِرَّةٍ فَٱسْتَوَىٰ
verses.text: the one of vigor. He settled

verses.arabicUthmani: وَهُوَ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.text: while he was at the highest horizon,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ دَنَا فَتَدَلَّىٰ
verses.text: then he came near and descended

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوْسَيْنِ أَوْ أَدْنَىٰ
verses.text: so that he was within two bows’ length or closer.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦ مَآ أَوْحَىٰ
verses.text: Then He revealed to His servant that which He revealed.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا كَذَبَ ٱلْفُؤَادُ مَا رَأَىٰٓ
verses.text: The burning heart did not lie 1 about what it saw.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَتُمَـٰرُونَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَا يَرَىٰ
verses.text: Will you pl enter into controversies 1 with him despitewhat he sees?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ نَزْلَةً أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: And he saw him on another descent,

verses.arabicUthmani: عِندَ سِدْرَةِ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.text: at the Lote-tree of the Extremity 1 ,

verses.arabicUthmani: عِندَهَا جَنَّةُ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰٓ
verses.text: near which is the Garden of Shelter,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذْ يَغْشَى ٱلسِّدْرَةَ مَا يَغْشَىٰ
verses.text: when there covered the Lote-tree what covered it.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا زَاغَ ٱلْبَصَرُ وَمَا طَغَىٰ
verses.text: The sight (of the Prophet) did not swerve, nor did it exceed.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: He certainly saw some of the great signs of his Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱللَّـٰتَ وَٱلْعُزَّىٰ
verses.text: Have you pl seen Al-Lāt and Al-ʻUzza?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَنَوٰةَ ٱلثَّالِثَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: And Manāt 1 , the third one, the other?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَكُمُ ٱلذَّكَرُ وَلَهُ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: Are you pl to have the males and He the females 1 ?

verses.arabicUthmani: تِلْكَ إِذًا قِسْمَةٌ ضِيزَىٰٓ
verses.text: What a bizarre distribution!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطَـٰنٍ ۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ ۖ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
verses.text: These are nothing but names which you pl have named, you and your forefathers, for which Allah sent down no manifestation. They follow nothing but assumptions and what the (inner) selves desire, even though guidance has come to them from their Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ مَا تَمَنَّىٰ
verses.text: Or is there for man whatever he wishes?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلِلَّهِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: To Allah belong the Hereafter and the first (life) .

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ
verses.text: And how many an angel is there in the heavens whose intercession avails nothing except after Allah gives permission to whomever He wills and is well pleased with.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels with female names,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ ۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا
verses.text: though they have no knowledge of that. They only follow assumptions, yet surely assumptions do not substitute for the truth.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا
verses.text: So disregard sg the one who has turned away from Our Reminder and has wanted nothing but the Earlier Life.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
verses.text: That is the extent of their knowledge. Indeed, your sg Lord is the One Who knows better who has strayed from His way and He is the One Who knows better who has accepted guidance.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَسَـٰٓـُٔوا۟ بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا۟ بِٱلْحُسْنَى
verses.text: And to Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth, that He may repay those who have done evil according to what they have done and repay those who have excelled in doing good with the best.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَـٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْفَوَٰحِشَ إِلَّا ٱللَّمَمَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَٰسِعُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ ۚ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌ فِى بُطُونِ أُمَّهَـٰتِكُمْ ۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰٓ
verses.text: Those who avoid the gravest 1 of sins and obscenities—except for minor lapses—your sg Lord is of vast forgiveness. He knows better about you pl , ever since He initiated you from the earth, and ever since you were fetuses in your mothers’ bellies. So do not acclaim your own purity—He knows better who is mindful (of Him) .

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: Have you sg seen the one who turned away

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَعْطَىٰ قَلِيلًا وَأَكْدَىٰٓ
verses.text: and gave a little, then held back?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَهُوَ يَرَىٰٓ
verses.text: Does he possess knowledge of the hidden realm and can therefore foresee?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
verses.text: Or was he not informed of what is in the Scrolls of Moses,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلَّذِى وَفَّىٰٓ
verses.text: and of Abraham 1 who fulfilled (conveying the commandments) :

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: that no bearer of burden bears the burden of another;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
verses.text: and that man attains only what he has striven for;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ سَعْيَهُۥ سَوْفَ يُرَىٰ
verses.text: and that surely his pursuit will eventually be seen,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ يُجْزَىٰهُ ٱلْجَزَآءَ ٱلْأَوْفَىٰ
verses.text: then he is repaid for it with the fullest repayment;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ
verses.text: and that to your pl Lord is the finality;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَضْحَكَ وَأَبْكَىٰ
verses.text: and that it is He Who caused laughter and weeping;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحْيَا
verses.text: and that it is He Who caused death and gave life;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ خَلَقَ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰ
verses.text: and that He created the two spouses 1 —the male and the female,

verses.arabicUthmani: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ إِذَا تُمْنَىٰ
verses.text: from a sperm drop when emitted;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّ عَلَيْهِ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: and that upon Him is the next creation;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَغْنَىٰ وَأَقْنَىٰ
verses.text: and that it is He Who enriched and impoverished;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعْرَىٰ
verses.text: and that it is He Who is the Lord of Sirius 1 ;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنَّهُۥٓ أَهْلَكَ عَادًا ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: and that He annihilated ancient ʻĀd 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثَمُودَا۟ فَمَآ أَبْقَىٰ
verses.text: and Thamûd 1 , sparing no one;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ هُمْ أَظْلَمَ وَأَطْغَىٰ
verses.text: and the people of Noah before that; indeed, they were more unjust and more exceeding of all limits 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَةَ أَهْوَىٰ
verses.text: And He brought down the Ruined Cities 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَغَشَّىٰهَا مَا غَشَّىٰ
verses.text: and covered them by that which He covered.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارَىٰ
verses.text: So which of your sg Lord’s marvels do you enter into controversies about?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا نَذِيرٌ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلْأُولَىٰٓ
verses.text: This is a warning just like the first warnings.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَزِفَتِ ٱلْـَٔازِفَةُ
verses.text: The inevitable is imminent;

verses.arabicUthmani: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
verses.text: none apart from Allah can unveil it.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمِنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ تَعْجَبُونَ
verses.text: Do you pl marvel at this discourse,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَضْحَكُونَ وَلَا تَبْكُونَ
verses.text: and laugh and do not weep,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنتُمْ سَـٰمِدُونَ
verses.text: lost in your frivolity?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ ۩
verses.text: So prostrate yourselves to Allah and worship!

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ
verses.text: The Hour has drawn near and the moon has ruptured.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ
verses.text: Yet whenever they see a miracle, they disregard (it) and say, “Continuous magic!”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعُوٓا۟ أَهْوَآءَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلُّ أَمْرٍ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
verses.text: And they disbelieved and followed their whims. And every matter is bound to settle [1666]

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ
verses.text: And most surely there have come to them tidings containing a deterrent—

verses.arabicUthmani: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.text: profound wisdom, but warnings are of no avail.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ
verses.text: So turn away sg from them. On the day when the Summoner summons to something terrible,

verses.arabicUthmani: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ
verses.text: with their sight (s) (subdued) in reverence they come out of the tombs like swarming locusts,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّهْطِعِينَ إِلَى ٱلدَّاعِ ۖ يَقُولُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ هَـٰذَا يَوْمٌ عَسِرٌ
verses.text: scrambling towards the Summoner; the deniers say, “This is a hard day.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ عَبْدَنَا وَقَالُوا۟ مَجْنُونٌ وَٱزْدُجِرَ
verses.text: The people of Noah disbelieved before them, so they disbelieved Our servant and said, “A madman!”, and he was rebuked.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ
verses.text: So he called upon his Lord, “I am overcome, so bestow help!”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ
verses.text: So We opened 1 the gates of the sky with water pouring down,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ
verses.text: and We made the earth burst with springs, so the waters met for a matter already determined.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ
verses.text: And We carried him on a craft of planks and nails,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ
verses.text: sailing before Our eyes—a repayment for the one who had been denied.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: And most surely We have left it as a sign, so is there anyone to remind himself?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: So how were My punishment and My warnings!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: And most surely We have made the Recital 1 easy for remembrance, so is there anyone to remind himself?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ عَادٌ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: ʻĀd 1 disbelieved, so how were My punishment and My warnings!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ رِيحًا صَرْصَرًا فِى يَوْمِ نَحْسٍ مُّسْتَمِرٍّ
verses.text: Indeed, We sent against them a screaming wind on a day of unrelenting misfortune,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ
verses.text: plucking people away as though they were trunks of uprooted palm trees.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: So how were My punishment and My warnings!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: And most surely We made the Recital c easy for remembrance, so is there anyone to remind himself?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: Thamûd 1 disbelieved in the warnings

verses.arabicUthmani: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.text: and said, “Are we to follow a human being from among us? Indeed, we would then be astray and insane!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ
verses.text: Has the Reminder been cast to him out of all of us? Rather, he is a wicked sheer liar.”

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ
verses.text: They 1 will know tomorrow who the wicked sheer liar is.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ
verses.text: We are sending the she-camel as a means of trial for them, so watch sg them and be patient.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ
verses.text: And inform sg them that the water is to be shared between them 1 ; each one should drink in turn.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
verses.text: But they called their fellow, and he dared and hamstrung (it) .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: So how were My punishment and My warnings!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
verses.text: Indeed, We sent against them a single Shout, and they ended up like a fence-maker’s dry sticks.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: And most surely We made the Recital 1 easy for remembrance, so is there anyone to remind himself?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: The people of Lot disbelieved in the warnings.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَـٰهُم بِسَحَرٍ
verses.text: Indeed, We sent against them a shower of stones, except for Lot’s folk–We delivered them at dawn—

verses.arabicUthmani: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
verses.text: a blessing from Us; thus We repay whoever gives thanks.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.text: And most surely he 1 had warned them of Our onslaught, but they entered into controversies about the warnings.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: And most surely they solicited of him his guests, so We obliterated their eyes— “So taste My punishment and My warnings.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌ مُّسْتَقِرٌّ
verses.text: And most surely an abiding punishment came upon them in the morning—

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.text: “So taste pl My punishment and My warnings.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: And most surely We made the Recital a easy for remembrance, so is there anyone to remind himself?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.text: And most surely the warnings came to Pharaoh’s folk—

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَـٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
verses.text: they disbelieved all Our signs. So We seized them (with) the seizure of an Almighty, Invincible One.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.text: “Are your pl deniers better than all those? Or do you have immunity in the Books?”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ
verses.text: Or do they say, “We, all together, will be victorious”?

verses.arabicUthmani: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
verses.text: The multitude will be defeated, and they will turn their backs.

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
verses.text: Nay, the Hour is their appointed time, and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ
verses.text: Indeed, the criminals are in confusion and insanity.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
verses.text: The day when they are dragged upon their faces into the Fire: “Taste the touch of Saqar 1 .”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ
verses.text: Indeed, We have created everything in due measure.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ
verses.text: And Our command is but once, like the twinkling of an eye.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَهْلَكْنَآ أَشْيَاعَكُمْ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ
verses.text: And most surely We have annihilated your pl likes, so is there anyone to remind himself?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.text: And everything they have done is in the Books—

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ
verses.text: for everything, small or large, is written down.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ
verses.text: Indeed, the mindful (of God) are amidst Gardens and rivers,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ
verses.text: in a seat of truth, in the presence of an Invincible King.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ
verses.text: The All-Merciful

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ
verses.text: taught the Recital 1

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ
verses.text: created man,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَّمَهُ ٱلْبَيَانَ
verses.text: and taught him clear expression.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ بِحُسْبَانٍ
verses.text: The sun and the moon move according to plan,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلنَّجْمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسْجُدَانِ
verses.text: and the plants 1 and the trees prostrate themselves.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
verses.text: And the sky—He raised it and set up the balance,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَّا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْمِيزَانِ
verses.text: so do pl not exceed in the balance,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلْوَزْنَ بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَلَا تُخْسِرُوا۟ ٱلْمِيزَانَ
verses.text: but maintain the weights justly and do not fall short in the balance.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلْأَنَامِ
verses.text: And the earth—He set it up for living creatures;

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَٱلنَّخْلُ ذَاتُ ٱلْأَكْمَامِ
verses.text: in it are fruits and sheathed palm trees ,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْحَبُّ ذُو ٱلْعَصْفِ وَٱلرَّيْحَانُ
verses.text: and grains 1 in the blades, and fragrant plants .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in 1 ?

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ كَٱلْفَخَّارِ
verses.text: He created man from potter’s clay like pottery

verses.arabicUthmani: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ
verses.text: and created the unseen being 1 from a smokeless flame of fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَغْرِبَيْنِ
verses.text: Lord of the two Easts and Lord of the two Wests.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ
verses.text: He merged the two waters 1 , converging together;

verses.arabicUthmani: بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ
verses.text: between them is a barrier which they do not overrun.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا ٱللُّؤْلُؤُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.text: From them come out 1 pearls and corals .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ
verses.text: His are the running ships, whose sails are raised 1 in the sea like banners 2 .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُّ مَنْ عَلَيْهَا فَانٍ
verses.text: Everyone upon it 1 is bound to perish,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.text: and all that remains is your sg Lord’s Countenance, the Possessor of majesty and nobility.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ
verses.text: Everyone in the heavens and the earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنَفْرُغُ لَكُمْ أَيُّهَ ٱلثَّقَلَانِ
verses.text: We 1 will attend to you pl , O two huge communities c .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ
verses.text: O society of unseen beings and humans, if you pl can penetrate the bounds of the heavens and the earth then go ahead and penetrate; you will never penetrate except with authority 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: يُرْسَلُ عَلَيْكُمَا شُوَاظٌ مِّن نَّارٍ وَنُحَاسٌ فَلَا تَنتَصِرَانِ
verses.text: Flares of fire , and brass 1 , will be sent upon you dl , and you will not find help .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا ٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ وَرْدَةً كَٱلدِّهَانِ
verses.text: And when the sky ruptures and becomes rose-colored like oil—

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: so which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.text: On that day neither any human nor unseen being 1 is asked about his misdeeds.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَـٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ
verses.text: The criminals are recognized by their marks then taken by the forelocks and the feet.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ
verses.text: This is Hell in which the criminals disbelieve;

verses.arabicUthmani: يَطُوفُونَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ حَمِيمٍ ءَانٍ
verses.text: they circulate between it and an intensely scalding water.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ
verses.text: But for whoever feared standing before his Lord there are two Gardens (in Paradise) .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَوَاتَآ أَفْنَانٍ
verses.text: Both having varieties.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ تَجْرِيَانِ
verses.text: In them are two flowing springs.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ زَوْجَانِ
verses.text: In them, of every kind of fruit there is apair.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ
verses.text: Reclining on furnishings lined with brocade, and the yield of the two Gardens are near at hand.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِنَّ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.text: In them are bashful maidens, untouched before by any human or unseen being b .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلْيَاقُوتُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ
verses.text: Like rubies and corals.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلْ جَزَآءُ ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنُ
verses.text: Is the repayment of kindness anything but kindness?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ
verses.text: And beneath them are two gardens.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: مُدْهَآمَّتَانِ
verses.text: Both of deepest green.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ
verses.text: In them are two gushing springs.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِمَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَنَخْلٌ وَرُمَّانٌ
verses.text: In them are fruits and date-palms and pomegranates.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِيهِنَّ خَيْرَٰتٌ حِسَانٌ
verses.text: In them are good, beautiful ones.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: حُورٌ مَّقْصُورَٰتٌ فِى ٱلْخِيَامِ
verses.text: Spouses with lovely wide eyes, secluded in pavilions.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ
verses.text: Untouched before by any human or unseen being b .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ رَفْرَفٍ خُضْرٍ وَعَبْقَرِىٍّ حِسَانٍ
verses.text: Reclining on green cushions and exquisite carpets.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ
verses.text: So which of your Lord’s marvels do you dl disbelieve in?

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ
verses.text: Supremely Blessed be the Name of your sg Lord, the Possessor 1 of majesty and nobility.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ
verses.text: When the inevitable event befalls,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَيْسَ لِوَقْعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ
verses.text: no disbelief will there be about its befalling,

verses.arabicUthmani: خَافِضَةٌ رَّافِعَةٌ
verses.text: bringing low, raising high.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا رُجَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ رَجًّا
verses.text: When the earth is shaken violently,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَبُسَّتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ بَسًّا
verses.text: and mountains are crushed and crumbled

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَانَتْ هَبَآءً مُّنۢبَثًّا
verses.text: and become scattered dust,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكُنتُمْ أَزْوَٰجًا ثَلَـٰثَةً
verses.text: and you become three classes:

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَيْمَنَةِ
verses.text: the fellows of the rightness; what of the fellows of the rightness!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
verses.text: And the fellows of the ill-omened; what of the fellows of the ill-omened!

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ ٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ
verses.text: And the pioneers, the pioneers:

verses.arabicUthmani: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
verses.text: those are the ones brought near (to God)

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: in the Gardens of Bliss—

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: a throng from the ancients

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَلِيلٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and a small band from the latecomers,

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّوْضُونَةٍ
verses.text: on luxurious couches,

verses.arabicUthmani: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَيْهَا مُتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
verses.text: leaning on them, facing one another.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ
verses.text: Serving them will be immortal youths

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَكْوَابٍ وَأَبَارِيقَ وَكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينٍ
verses.text: with glasses, and pitchers, and a cup from a flowing spring,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يُصَدَّعُونَ عَنْهَا وَلَا يُنزِفُونَ
verses.text: causing them neither headache nor intoxication 1 ,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَـٰكِهَةٍ مِّمَّا يَتَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.text: and fruit of their choice,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَحْمِ طَيْرٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.text: and meat of any bird they may desire.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحُورٌ عِينٌ
verses.text: And (in it are) spouses 1 with lovely wide eyes,

verses.arabicUthmani: كَأَمْثَـٰلِ ٱللُّؤْلُؤِ ٱلْمَكْنُونِ
verses.text: like well-preserved pearls,

verses.arabicUthmani: جَزَآءًۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: as a repayment on account of what they used to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا
verses.text: Therein they will hear no idle talk and no recrimination

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا قِيلًا سَلَـٰمًا سَلَـٰمًا
verses.text: except for the saying: “Peace, peace.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: And the fellows of the right—what of the fellows of the right?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى سِدْرٍ مَّخْضُودٍ
verses.text: Amid thornless lote-trees

verses.arabicUthmani: وَطَلْحٍ مَّنضُودٍ
verses.text: and clustered banana-trees

verses.arabicUthmani: وَظِلٍّ مَّمْدُودٍ
verses.text: and extended shade

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآءٍ مَّسْكُوبٍ
verses.text: and outpouring water

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَـٰكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ
verses.text: and abundant fruit,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا مَقْطُوعَةٍ وَلَا مَمْنُوعَةٍ
verses.text: neither withheld nor forbidden.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفُرُشٍ مَّرْفُوعَةٍ
verses.text: And high-class spouses;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّآ أَنشَأْنَـٰهُنَّ إِنشَآءً
verses.text: We have created them perfectly

verses.arabicUthmani: فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُنَّ أَبْكَارًا
verses.text: and made them virgins,

verses.arabicUthmani: عُرُبًا أَتْرَابًا
verses.text: tender, of matching age,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: for the fellows of the right—

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: a throng from the ancients

verses.arabicUthmani: وَثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: and a throng from the latecomers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ مَآ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلشِّمَالِ
verses.text: And the fellows of the left—what of the fellows of the left?

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى سَمُومٍ وَحَمِيمٍ
verses.text: Amid searing wind and scalding water

verses.arabicUthmani: وَظِلٍّ مِّن يَحْمُومٍ
verses.text: and a shadow of thick smoke,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا بَارِدٍ وَلَا كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: neither cool nor refreshing 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُتْرَفِينَ
verses.text: They had lived before that indulging in affluence,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَانُوا۟ يُصِرُّونَ عَلَى ٱلْحِنثِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: and they used to insist on great violation,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ
verses.text: and they used to say, “Can it be that when we have died and become dust and bones— can it be that 1 we will really be resurrected?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ
verses.text: And 1 our ancient forefathers, too ?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Indeed, the ancients and the latecomers

verses.arabicUthmani: لَمَجْمُوعُونَ إِلَىٰ مِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ
verses.text: will be gathered for the appointment of a well-known day!

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: Then indeed all of you, O misguided disbelievers,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَـَٔاكِلُونَ مِن شَجَرٍ مِّن زَقُّومٍ
verses.text: will certainly be eating from the trees of Zaqqum 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ
verses.text: and filling your bellies with it

verses.arabicUthmani: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
verses.text: and will be drinking on top of it scalding water,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ شُرْبَ ٱلْهِيمِ
verses.text: thus drinking as a thirst-mad camel drinks.”

verses.arabicUthmani: هَـٰذَا نُزُلُهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: That is their hospitality on the Day of Recompense.

verses.arabicUthmani: نَحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ فَلَوْلَا تُصَدِّقُونَ
verses.text: We have created you pl ; if only you would believe!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تُمْنُونَ
verses.text: Have you pl seen what you ejaculate?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ تَخْلُقُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ
verses.text: Is it you pl who create it or are We the Creators?

verses.arabicUthmani: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ
verses.text: We have decreed death among you pl , and We will not be outstripped

verses.arabicUthmani: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَـٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: in replacing you with your likes and transforming you into what you do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: And you pl have certainly known the first formation; if only you would remind 1 yourselves !

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ
verses.text: Have you pl seen what you cultivate?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ تَزْرَعُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلزَّٰرِعُونَ
verses.text: Is it you who plant it or are We the Planters?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ حُطَـٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ
verses.text: If We will, We can turn it into rubble, then you pl will lament,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا لَمُغْرَمُونَ
verses.text: “ Indeed, we 1 are in debt ;

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
verses.text: rather , we are dispossessed!”

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلْمَآءَ ٱلَّذِى تَشْرَبُونَ
verses.text: Have you pl seen the water you drink?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ
verses.text: Is it you who sent it down from the rainclouds or are We the Senders?

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: If We will, We can make it salty. Will you pl not be thankful?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى تُورُونَ
verses.text: Have you seen the fire you kindle?

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ
verses.text: Is it you who produced the tree for it, or are We the Producers?

verses.arabicUthmani: نَحْنُ جَعَلْنَـٰهَا تَذْكِرَةً وَمَتَـٰعًا لِّلْمُقْوِينَ
verses.text: We have made it a reminding and a comfort for the travelers.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So highly exalt the Name of your sg Lord, the Great.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَوَٰقِعِ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.text: I swear by the locations 1 of the stars—

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَقَسَمٌ لَّوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: and it is certainly a great oath if only you pl were to know.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ لَقُرْءَانٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: It is indeed a Noble Recital 1

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى كِتَـٰبٍ مَّكْنُونٍ
verses.text: in a well-protected Scripture.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَمَسُّهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْمُطَهَّرُونَ
verses.text: None touches it except the cleansed,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: a bestowal from on high by the Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَبِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ أَنتُم مُّدْهِنُونَ
verses.text: Is it this discourse that you pl take so lightly?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَجْعَلُونَ رِزْقَكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: And you render due thanks for being provided with it by disbelieving in it?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَوْلَآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلْحُلْقُومَ
verses.text: So when it 1 has reached the throat,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنتُمْ حِينَئِذٍ تَنظُرُونَ
verses.text: and you are at that moment looking on,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and We are nearer to him than you are, but you do not see—

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَوْلَآ إِن كُنتُمْ غَيْرَ مَدِينِينَ
verses.text: why, if you are not to be held to account,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَرْجِعُونَهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: do you not bring it a back if you are truthful?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
verses.text: Yet, if he is one of those brought near (to God) ,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَرَوْحٌ وَرَيْحَانٌ وَجَنَّتُ نَعِيمٍ
verses.text: then serenity 1 and fragrant plants and a Garden of Bliss.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: And if he is one of the fellows of the right,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَلَـٰمٌ لَّكَ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: then, “Peace for you sg ,” from the fellows of the right.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ
verses.text: But if he is one of the misguided disbelievers,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَنُزُلٌ مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ
verses.text: then the welcome will be scalding water

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَصْلِيَةُ جَحِيمٍ
verses.text: and roasting in purgatory.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.text: Indeed, this is surely the truth of certitude.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So highly exalt the Name of your sg Lord, the Great.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Whatever is in the heavens and the earth has been highly exalting Allah, and He is the Almighty, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: To Him belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth; He gives life and causes death, for He is All-Powerful over everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرُ وَٱلظَّـٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: He is the First and the Last and the Manifest and the Innermost, and He is All-Knowing of everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا وَمَا يَنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا ۖ وَهُوَ مَعَكُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: It is He Who created the heavens and the earth in six days 1 then settled over the Throne. He knows what penetrates the earth and what comes out of it, and what descends from the sky and what ascends to it, for He is with you pl wherever you may be. And Allah is All-Seeing of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرْجَعُ ٱلْأُمُورُ
verses.text: To Him belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth, and to Allah all matters are returned 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: يُولِجُ ٱلَّيْلَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ وَيُولِجُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فِى ٱلَّيْلِ ۚ وَهُوَ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: He causes the night to penetrate the day and He causes the day to penetrate the night, and He is All-Knowing of what lies within the chests.

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَامِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا جَعَلَكُم مُّسْتَخْلَفِينَ فِيهِ ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَأَنفَقُوا۟ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ
verses.text: Believe in Allah and His Messenger, and spend of that over which He has made you trustees, for those of you who have attained faith and spent—for them is a supreme reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَكُمْ لَا تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ ۙ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدْعُوكُمْ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِرَبِّكُمْ وَقَدْ أَخَذَ مِيثَـٰقَكُمْ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: And what is the matter with you pl that you do not believe in Allah when the Messenger calls you to believe in your Lord—when He has taken 1 your pledge 2 — if you are believers?

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُنَزِّلُ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦٓ ءَايَـٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَـٰتٍ لِّيُخْرِجَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: It is He who bestows 1 upon His servant evident signs from on high to bring you pl out of darkness (es) into light. And towards you Allah is truly Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَكُمْ أَلَّا تُنفِقُوا۟ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِلَّهِ مِيرَٰثُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ لَا يَسْتَوِى مِنكُم مَّنْ أَنفَقَ مِن قَبْلِ ٱلْفَتْحِ وَقَـٰتَلَ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَعْظَمُ دَرَجَةً مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَنفَقُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدُ وَقَـٰتَلُوا۟ ۚ وَكُلًّا وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ
verses.text: And why is it that you pl do not spend in the way of Allah when to Allah belongs the inheritance of the heavens and the earth? Not equal among you are those who spent before the conquest and combated; those are higher in degrees (of rank) than those who spent afterwards and combated , yet to each 1 Allah has promised the best (reward) , and Allah is All-Aware of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّن ذَا ٱلَّذِى يُقْرِضُ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا فَيُضَـٰعِفَهُۥ لَهُۥ وَلَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: Who is it that will lend Allah a good loan, that He may multiply it for him, and for him is a noble reward?

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَرَى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ يَسْعَىٰ نُورُهُم بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَـٰنِهِم بُشْرَىٰكُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ جَنَّـٰتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: On the day when you sg see the believing men and believing women with their light radiating ahead of them and to their right: “Glad tidings for you today: Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein; it is that which is the great triumph.”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَقُولُ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقُونَ وَٱلْمُنَـٰفِقَـٰتُ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱنظُرُونَا نَقْتَبِسْ مِن نُّورِكُمْ قِيلَ ٱرْجِعُوا۟ وَرَآءَكُمْ فَٱلْتَمِسُوا۟ نُورًا فَضُرِبَ بَيْنَهُم بِسُورٍ لَّهُۥ بَابٌۢ بَاطِنُهُۥ فِيهِ ٱلرَّحْمَةُ وَظَـٰهِرُهُۥ مِن قِبَلِهِ ٱلْعَذَابُ
verses.text: On the day when the hypocritical men and hypocritical women say to those who believed, “ Wait for 1 us so that we may borrow from your light.” They were told 2 : “Go back behind you and seek light.” Then a wall with a door was raised between them: within it is mercy and outside of it is punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُنَادُونَهُمْ أَلَمْ نَكُن مَّعَكُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ وَلَـٰكِنَّكُمْ فَتَنتُمْ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَتَرَبَّصْتُمْ وَٱرْتَبْتُمْ وَغَرَّتْكُمُ ٱلْأَمَانِىُّ حَتَّىٰ جَآءَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَغَرَّكُم بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْغَرُورُ
verses.text: They 1 call to them 2 , “Were we not with you?” They said, “Yes, but you tempted yourselves and waited and doubted and became deceived by fancies until the command of Allah arrived, and the deceiver 3 deceived you regarding Allah.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا يُؤْخَذُ مِنكُمْ فِدْيَةٌ وَلَا مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۚ مَأْوَىٰكُمُ ٱلنَّارُ ۖ هِىَ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: So today no ransom is accepted from you pl nor from those who have denied. The Fire is your shelter; it is your patron—and what a miserable destiny!”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَلَمْ يَأْنِ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَن تَخْشَعَ قُلُوبُهُمْ لِذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَمَا نَزَلَ مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ وَلَا يَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ مِن قَبْلُ فَطَالَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْأَمَدُ فَقَسَتْ قُلُوبُهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Is it not time for those who have attained faith: that their hearts should become reverent towards Allah’s Reminder and to that which came down 1 of the truth, and not be 2 like those who were given the Scripture previously, but for whom time became prolonged so that their hearts hardened, and many of them are defiantly disobedient?

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا ۚ قَدْ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: Know that Allah revives the earth after its death; We have made the signs evident for you, that you may reason.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلْمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلْمُصَّدِّقَـٰتِ وَأَقْرَضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا يُضَـٰعَفُ لَهُمْ وَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ كَرِيمٌ
verses.text: Indeed, charitable men and charitable women 1 who have loaned Allah a good loan—it will be multiplied for them, and for them is a noble reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦٓ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصِّدِّيقُونَ ۖ وَٱلشُّهَدَآءُ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ لَهُمْ أَجْرُهُمْ وَنُورُهُمْ ۖ وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: And as for those who have attained faith in Allah and His messengers—those are the unwavering believers and the witnesses 1 who will come as witnesses with their Lord; for them is their reward and their light. But as for those who denied and rejected Our signs—those are the fellows of purgatory.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا لَعِبٌ وَلَهْوٌ وَزِينَةٌ وَتَفَاخُرٌۢ بَيْنَكُمْ وَتَكَاثُرٌ فِى ٱلْأَمْوَٰلِ وَٱلْأَوْلَـٰدِ ۖ كَمَثَلِ غَيْثٍ أَعْجَبَ ٱلْكُفَّارَ نَبَاتُهُۥ ثُمَّ يَهِيجُ فَتَرَىٰهُ مُصْفَرًّا ثُمَّ يَكُونُ حُطَـٰمًا ۖ وَفِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ عَذَابٌ شَدِيدٌ وَمَغْفِرَةٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنٌ ۚ وَمَا ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَآ إِلَّا مَتَـٰعُ ٱلْغُرُورِ
verses.text: Know pl that the Earlier Life is only a game and a distraction and an adornment and boasting among you and rivalry in wealth and children: like a rainfall producing plants that delighted the farmers, then it withers and you see it yellowing, then it becomes debris. But in the Hereafter is severe punishment and forgiveness from Allah and (His) good pleasure, for the Earlier Life is nothing but the enjoyment of deception.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَابِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَغْفِرَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرْضُهَا كَعَرْضِ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ أُعِدَّتْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: Race towards forgiveness from your pl Lord and a Garden (of Paradise) whose width is like the width of the heavens and the earth—prepared for those who have attained faith in Allah and His messengers. That is Allah’s grace; He bestows it upon whomever He wills, and Allah is the Possessor of great grace.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةٍ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا فِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ إِلَّا فِى كِتَـٰبٍ مِّن قَبْلِ أَن نَّبْرَأَهَآ ۚ إِنَّ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٌ
verses.text: No calamity occurs on earth or among yourselves but it is already written in a Record 1 before We make it— indeed, that is easy for Allah—

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّكَيْلَا تَأْسَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمْ وَلَا تَفْرَحُوا۟ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ
verses.text: so that you pl do not grieve over what you have missed nor exult over what He has given 1 you. And Allah does not love every self-admiring boaster—

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبُخْلِ ۗ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.text: those who are miserly and command mankind to miserliness. And whoever turns away—indeed, it is Allah who is 1 the Self-Sufficient, the Praiseworthy.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا رُسُلَنَا بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ وَأَنزَلْنَا مَعَهُمُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْمِيزَانَ لِيَقُومَ ٱلنَّاسُ بِٱلْقِسْطِ ۖ وَأَنزَلْنَا ٱلْحَدِيدَ فِيهِ بَأْسٌ شَدِيدٌ وَمَنَـٰفِعُ لِلنَّاسِ وَلِيَعْلَمَ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَنصُرُهُۥ وَرُسُلَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ
verses.text: And We certainly sent Our messengers with evident proofs, and We sent down with them the Scripture and the Balance, that mankind may uphold justice. And We sent down iron in which there is intense force and benefits for humanity, and that Allah may know who supports Him and His messengers, though unseen. Indeed, Allah is All-Powerful, Almighty.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا ٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ۖ فَمِنْهُم مُّهْتَدٍ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: And We certainly sent Noah and Abraham 1 and established Prophethood and Scripture among their offspring, so some of them are rightly guided, while many of them are defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ قَفَّيْنَا عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِم بِرُسُلِنَا وَقَفَّيْنَا بِعِيسَى ٱبْنِ مَرْيَمَ وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلْإِنجِيلَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى قُلُوبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّبَعُوهُ رَأْفَةً وَرَحْمَةً وَرَهْبَانِيَّةً ٱبْتَدَعُوهَا مَا كَتَبْنَـٰهَا عَلَيْهِمْ إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ رِضْوَٰنِ ٱللَّهِ فَمَا رَعَوْهَا حَقَّ رِعَايَتِهَا ۖ فَـَٔاتَيْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ أَجْرَهُمْ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Then We sent in their wake Our messengers and followed them with Jesus, son of Mary, and We gave him the Gospel and instilled in the hearts of those who followed him compassion and mercy. But the monasticism which they invented was only to seek Allah’s good pleasure—We did not ordain it for them— yet they did not observe it with its due observance. So We gave those of them who attained faith their reward, but many of them are defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِرَسُولِهِۦ يُؤْتِكُمْ كِفْلَيْنِ مِن رَّحْمَتِهِۦ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ نُورًا تَمْشُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, be mindful of Allah and believe in His Messenger: He shall (then) bring you a double share of His mercy and shall make for you a light by which you walk and shall forgive you, for Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّئَلَّا يَعْلَمَ أَهْلُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ أَلَّا يَقْدِرُونَ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍ مِّن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَأَنَّ ٱلْفَضْلَ بِيَدِ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So that the People of the Scripture may know that they have no power whatsoever over Allah’s grace and that all grace is in Allah’s hand; He brings it to whomever He wills, for Allah is the Possessor of great grace.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ سَمِعَ ٱللَّهُ قَوْلَ ٱلَّتِى تُجَـٰدِلُكَ فِى زَوْجِهَا وَتَشْتَكِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَٱللَّهُ يَسْمَعُ تَحَاوُرَكُمَآ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: Allah has surely heard the statement of she who argues with you sg concerning her spouse and complains to Allah, and Allah hears your dl conversation; indeed, Allah is All-Hearing, All-Seeing.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ يُظَـٰهِرُونَ مِنكُم مِّن نِّسَآئِهِم مَّا هُنَّ أُمَّهَـٰتِهِمْ ۖ إِنْ أُمَّهَـٰتُهُمْ إِلَّا ٱلَّـٰٓـِٔى وَلَدْنَهُمْ ۚ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَيَقُولُونَ مُنكَرًا مِّنَ ٱلْقَوْلِ وَزُورًا ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَعَفُوٌّ غَفُورٌ
verses.text: Those of you who estrange their wives by equating them with their mothers—they are not their mothers; their mothers are only those who gave birth to them. And indeed, what they say is truly a deplorable thing to say and a blatant lie. But indeed, Allah is Pardoning, Oft-Forgiving.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُظَـٰهِرُونَ مِن نِّسَآئِهِمْ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا قَالُوا۟ فَتَحْرِيرُ رَقَبَةٍ مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّا ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ تُوعَظُونَ بِهِۦ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ
verses.text: And those who estrange their wives by equating them with their mothers then go back on what they have said—a slave must be set free before they may touch one another. With this you pl are admonished, and Allah is All-Aware of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَن لَّمْ يَجِدْ فَصِيَامُ شَهْرَيْنِ مُتَتَابِعَيْنِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّا ۖ فَمَن لَّمْ يَسْتَطِعْ فَإِطْعَامُ سِتِّينَ مِسْكِينًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ۚ وَتِلْكَ حُدُودُ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَلِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: But whoever cannot find the means must fast for two consecutive months before they may touch one another, and if he is unable—then the feeding of sixty destitute people. This is to affirm your pl faith in Allah and His Messenger, and these are the limits of Allah. And for the deniers is a painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ كُبِتُوا۟ كَمَا كُبِتَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ وَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ ءَايَـٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَـٰتٍ ۚ وَلِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ عَذَابٌ مُّهِينٌ
verses.text: Indeed, those who oppose Allah and His Messenger have been subdued as those before them were subdued. And we have certainly sent down evident signs. And for the deniersis a demeaning punishment

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَبْعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعًا فَيُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوٓا۟ ۚ أَحْصَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ وَنَسُوهُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ
verses.text: on the day when Allah resurrects them all and informs them of what they did. Allah has kept count of it, but they have forgotten it, and Allah is Witness over all things.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ مَا يَكُونُ مِن نَّجْوَىٰ ثَلَـٰثَةٍ إِلَّا هُوَ رَابِعُهُمْ وَلَا خَمْسَةٍ إِلَّا هُوَ سَادِسُهُمْ وَلَآ أَدْنَىٰ مِن ذَٰلِكَ وَلَآ أَكْثَرَ إِلَّا هُوَ مَعَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كَانُوا۟ ۖ ثُمَّ يُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Have you sg not seen that Allah knows whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth? There is no secret conversation between three but He is their fourth, nor between five but He is their sixth, nor less than that nor more 1 but He is with them wherever they may be. Then on the Day of Resurrection He will inform them of what they did; indeed, Allah is All-Knowing of everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ نُهُوا۟ عَنِ ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا نُهُوا۟ عَنْهُ وَيَتَنَـٰجَوْنَ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَإِذَا جَآءُوكَ حَيَّوْكَ بِمَا لَمْ يُحَيِّكَ بِهِ ٱللَّهُ وَيَقُولُونَ فِىٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ لَوْلَا يُعَذِّبُنَا ٱللَّهُ بِمَا نَقُولُ ۚ حَسْبُهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ يَصْلَوْنَهَا ۖ فَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: Have you sg not seen those who were prohibited from conversing secretly but then revert to what they were prohibited from? They converse secretly 1 in sin and hostility and (in) disobedience to the Messenger. And when they come to you sg they greet you with a greeting that Allah never greeted you with, and they say within themselves, “Why does Allah not punish us for what we say?” Hell is enough for them; they will roast in it—so what a miserable destiny!

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا تَنَـٰجَيْتُمْ فَلَا تَتَنَـٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَتَنَـٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَٱلتَّقْوَىٰ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِىٓ إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, when you converse secretly, do not converse secretly 1 in sin and hostility and (in) disobedience to the Messenger, but converse in virtue and mindfulness (of God) , and be mindful of Allah to Whom you will be herded.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ لِيَحْزُنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَلَيْسَ بِضَآرِّهِمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Indeed, (malicious) private conversations are from Satan, that those who have attained faith may be sad 1 . But he cannot harm them at all except by Allah’s leave. And in Allah let the believers place their trust.
