verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَكُمْ تَفَسَّحُوا۟ فِى ٱلْمَجَـٰلِسِ فَٱفْسَحُوا۟ يَفْسَحِ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ ۖ وَإِذَا قِيلَ ٱنشُزُوا۟ فَٱنشُزُوا۟ يَرْفَعِ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ دَرَجَـٰتٍ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, when you are told, “Make room for one another in assemblies 1 ,” then make room so that Allah makes room for you. And when you are told, “Arise,” then arise. Allah elevates by degrees those of you who have attained faith and those given knowledge. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا نَـٰجَيْتُمُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ نَجْوَىٰكُمْ صَدَقَةً ۚ ذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ وَأَطْهَرُ ۚ فَإِن لَّمْ تَجِدُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, when you converse privately with the Messenger, give a donation ahead of your private conversation. That is better for you and cleaner. But if you do not find the means, then Allah is indeed Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَشْفَقْتُمْ أَن تُقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ نَجْوَىٰكُمْ صَدَقَـٰتٍ ۚ فَإِذْ لَمْ تَفْعَلُوا۟ وَتَابَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْكُمْ فَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Are you pl reluctant to give donations before your private conversation? If you do not do so and Allah pardons you, then establish the prayer and bring 1 the purifying charity 2 and obey Allah and His Messenger. And Allah is All-Aware of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ تَوَلَّوْا۟ قَوْمًا غَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِم مَّا هُم مِّنكُمْ وَلَا مِنْهُمْ وَيَحْلِفُونَ عَلَى ٱلْكَذِبِ وَهُمْ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Have you sg not seen those who allied themselves with a people upon whom is Allah’s wrath? They are neither of you pl nor of them, and they swear to lies while they know (the truth) .

verses.arabicUthmani: أَعَدَّ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ سَآءَ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Allah has prepared for them a severe punishment; evil indeed is what they used to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ أَيْمَـٰنَهُمْ جُنَّةً فَصَدُّوا۟ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ فَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ مُّهِينٌ
verses.text: They took their oaths as a cover and barred (others) from the way of Allah, so for them is a demeaning punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّن تُغْنِىَ عَنْهُمْ أَمْوَٰلُهُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ ۖ هُمْ فِيهَا خَـٰلِدُونَ
verses.text: Neither their possessions nor their children will avail them anything against Allah. Those are the fellows of the Fire; therein they abide.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَبْعَثُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ جَمِيعًا فَيَحْلِفُونَ لَهُۥ كَمَا يَحْلِفُونَ لَكُمْ ۖ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّهُمْ هُمُ ٱلْكَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: On the day when Allah resurrects them all together, they swear to Him as they swear to you pl , thinking that they are (standing) upon something. Undoubtedly, it is indeed they themselves who are the liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱسْتَحْوَذَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ ذِكْرَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
verses.text: Satan has taken hold of them and so has caused them to forget the remembrance of Allah. Those are the party of Satan. Undoubtedly, it is indeed the party of Satan who are the losers.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى ٱلْأَذَلِّينَ
verses.text: Indeed, those who oppose Allah and His Messenger are among the most humiliated 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَغْلِبَنَّ أَنَا۠ وَرُسُلِىٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ
verses.text: Allah has prescribed: “I will most surely overcome, I and My messengers.” Indeed, Allah is All-Powerful, Almighty.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا تَجِدُ قَوْمًا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِ يُوَآدُّونَ مَنْ حَآدَّ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَلَوْ كَانُوٓا۟ ءَابَآءَهُمْ أَوْ أَبْنَآءَهُمْ أَوْ إِخْوَٰنَهُمْ أَوْ عَشِيرَتَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ كَتَبَ فِى قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلْإِيمَـٰنَ وَأَيَّدَهُم بِرُوحٍ مِّنْهُ ۖ وَيُدْخِلُهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ رَضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱللَّهِ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: You sg will not find a people who believe in Allah and the Last Day loving those who oppose Allah and His Messenger, even if they were their fathers or their sons or their brethren or their kinsfolk. Those—He has prescribed faith in their hearts and has aided them with a spirit from Him, and He will enter them into Gardens (of Paradise) beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide. Allah became well pleased with them and they became well pleased with Him. Those are the party of Allah. Undoubtedly, it is indeed the party of Allah who are the successful.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Whatever is in the heavens and in the earth has been highly exalting Allah, and He is the Almighty, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَخْرَجَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مِن دِيَـٰرِهِمْ لِأَوَّلِ ٱلْحَشْرِ ۚ مَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن يَخْرُجُوا۟ ۖ وَظَنُّوٓا۟ أَنَّهُم مَّانِعَتُهُمْ حُصُونُهُم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ فَأَتَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَمْ يَحْتَسِبُوا۟ ۖ وَقَذَفَ فِى قُلُوبِهِمُ ٱلرُّعْبَ ۚ يُخْرِبُونَ بُيُوتَهُم بِأَيْدِيهِمْ وَأَيْدِى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ فَٱعْتَبِرُوا۟ يَـٰٓأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَبْصَـٰرِ
verses.text: It is He who evicted those who denied among the People of the Scripture from their homes at the first exodus 1 . You pl did not think they would depart, and they thought their fortresses would protect them from Allah, but Allah came at them from where they never expected and threw terror into their hearts. They 2 wreck 3 their houses with their own hands and by the hands of the believers. So take a lesson, O you who are endowed with sight (s) .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْلَآ أَن كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْجَلَآءَ لَعَذَّبَهُمْ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَهُمْ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ عَذَابُ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.text: Had Allah not prescribed evacuation for them, He would have punished them in the Earlier (Life) , and for them in the Hereafter is the punishment of the Fire.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ شَآقُّوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ ۖ وَمَن يُشَآقِّ ٱللَّهَ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلْعِقَابِ
verses.text: That is because they went against Allah and His Messenger, and whoever goes against Allah—indeed, Allah is stern in retribution.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا قَطَعْتُم مِّن لِّينَةٍ أَوْ تَرَكْتُمُوهَا قَآئِمَةً عَلَىٰٓ أُصُولِهَا فَبِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِيُخْزِىَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: Whatever palm tree you pl cut down or left standing on its roots, then that was by Allah’s leave and that He may disgrace those who are defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَوْجَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ خَيْلٍ وَلَا رِكَابٍ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسَلِّطُ رُسُلَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: And whatever Allah has turned over to His Messenger from them, you have spurred neither horse nor camel for them, but Allah gives authority to His messengers over whomever He wills, and Allah is All-Powerful over everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْقُرَىٰ فَلِلَّهِ وَلِلرَّسُولِ وَلِذِى ٱلْقُرْبَىٰ وَٱلْيَتَـٰمَىٰ وَٱلْمَسَـٰكِينِ وَٱبْنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ كَىْ لَا يَكُونَ دُولَةًۢ بَيْنَ ٱلْأَغْنِيَآءِ مِنكُمْ ۚ وَمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمُ ٱلرَّسُولُ فَخُذُوهُ وَمَا نَهَىٰكُمْ عَنْهُ فَٱنتَهُوا۟ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ شَدِيدُ ٱلْعِقَابِ
verses.text: Whatever Allah has turned over to His Messenger from the people of the towns, then that is for Allah and for the Messenger and for the relative and the orphans and the destitute pl and to the traveler in need, so that it does not circulate exclusively 1 between the wealthy among you. And whatever the Messenger brings you—accept it, and whatever he forbids you—abstain from it. And be mindful of Allah; indeed, Allah is stern in retribution.

verses.arabicUthmani: لِلْفُقَرَآءِ ٱلْمُهَـٰجِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُخْرِجُوا۟ مِن دِيَـٰرِهِمْ وَأَمْوَٰلِهِمْ يَبْتَغُونَ فَضْلًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنًا وَيَنصُرُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّـٰدِقُونَ
verses.text: (It is) for the poor immigrants 1 who were evicted from their homes and their possessions, seeking grace from Allah, and (His) good pleasure, and supporting Allah and His Messenger— those are the sincere.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ تَبَوَّءُو ٱلدَّارَ وَٱلْإِيمَـٰنَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ يُحِبُّونَ مَنْ هَاجَرَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلَا يَجِدُونَ فِى صُدُورِهِمْ حَاجَةً مِّمَّآ أُوتُوا۟ وَيُؤْثِرُونَ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَلَوْ كَانَ بِهِمْ خَصَاصَةٌ ۚ وَمَن يُوقَ شُحَّ نَفْسِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: And (for) those who,before them,had settled in the homeland and (adopted) the faith—theylove those who emigrated to them and find no need in their chests for what has been brought to them, and they give them priority over themselves even if they themselves are needy. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his (inner) self—then it is those 1 who are the successful.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ جَآءُو مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَٰنِنَا ٱلَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِٱلْإِيمَـٰنِ وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِى قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ رَبَّنَآ إِنَّكَ رَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: And those who came after them, saying, “Our Lord, forgive us and our brethren who precededus in faith, and leave no malice in our hearts towards those who have attained faith. Our Lord, You are indeed Compassionate, Bestowing of mercy.”

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ أَلَمْ تَرَ إِلَى ٱلَّذِينَ نَافَقُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ لِإِخْوَٰنِهِمُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ لَئِنْ أُخْرِجْتُمْ لَنَخْرُجَنَّ مَعَكُمْ وَلَا نُطِيعُ فِيكُمْ أَحَدًا أَبَدًا وَإِن قُوتِلْتُمْ لَنَنصُرَنَّكُمْ وَٱللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّهُمْ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: Have you sg not seen those who became hypocrites, saying to their brethren who denied among the People of the Scripture, “Indeed, if you are evicted, we will certainly depart with you and not obey anyone against you, ever, and should anyone combat you, we will certainly support you”? But Allah bears witness that they are certainly liars.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَئِنْ أُخْرِجُوا۟ لَا يَخْرُجُونَ مَعَهُمْ وَلَئِن قُوتِلُوا۟ لَا يَنصُرُونَهُمْ وَلَئِن نَّصَرُوهُمْ لَيُوَلُّنَّ ٱلْأَدْبَـٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: Indeed, if they are evicted, they will not depart with them; and indeed, if anyone combats them, they will not support them. And (even) if they do support them, they will (then) certainly turn their backs, then they will not be supported.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ رَهْبَةً فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌ لَّا يَفْقَهُونَ
verses.text: Indeed, fear of you pl is surely more intense in their chests than fear of Allah; that is because they are people who do not comprehend.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يُقَـٰتِلُونَكُمْ جَمِيعًا إِلَّا فِى قُرًى مُّحَصَّنَةٍ أَوْ مِن وَرَآءِ جُدُرٍۭ ۚ بَأْسُهُم بَيْنَهُمْ شَدِيدٌ ۚ تَحْسَبُهُمْ جَمِيعًا وَقُلُوبُهُمْ شَتَّىٰ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌ لَّا يَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: They do not combat you pl all together except from fortified strongholds or from behind walls 1 . Their hostility towards each other is severe. You sg would think them united, but their hearts are diverse; that is because they are people who do not reason.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَمَثَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ قَرِيبًا ۖ ذَاقُوا۟ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهِمْ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Like those who shortly before them tasted the grievous consequences of their affairs, and for them is a painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَمَثَلِ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ إِذْ قَالَ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ ٱكْفُرْ فَلَمَّا كَفَرَ قَالَ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌ مِّنكَ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ ٱللَّهَ رَبَّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: Like the example of Satan when he said to man, “Deny,” but when he had denied, he said, “I disown you; I fear Allah, Lord of all realms.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَتَهُمَآ أَنَّهُمَا فِى ٱلنَّارِ خَـٰلِدَيْنِ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَٰٓؤُا۟ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: So the consequence for both of them was 1 that they are 2 in the Fire, abiding therein, and such is the repayment of the unjust.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلْتَنظُرْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ لِغَدٍ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, be mindful of Allah, and let every soul look what it has put forth for tomorrow, and be mindful of Allah; indeed, Allah is All-Aware of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ نَسُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ أَنفُسَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَـٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: And do pl not be like those who forgot Allah, so He made them forget themselves; those are the defiantly disobedient.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَا يَسْتَوِىٓ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ وَأَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ۚ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ هُمُ ٱلْفَآئِزُونَ
verses.text: Not equal are the fellows of the Fire and the fellows of the Garden (of Paradise) ; it is the fellows of the Garden who are the triumphant ones.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَوْ أَنزَلْنَا هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عَلَىٰ جَبَلٍ لَّرَأَيْتَهُۥ خَـٰشِعًا مُّتَصَدِّعًا مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَمْثَـٰلُ نَضْرِبُهَا لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: Had We sent this Recital 1 down upon a mountain, you sg would have seen it (trembling) in reverence, crumbling in awe of Allah. And these parables We set forth for mankind, that they may reflect.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ ۖ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: He is Allah, besides Whom there is no god, the Knower of the hidden realm and the manifest; He is the All-Merciful, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْقُدُّوسُ ٱلسَّلَـٰمُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُ ٱلْمُهَيْمِنُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْجَبَّارُ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرُ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: He is Allah, besides Whom there is no god, the King, the Holy, the Peace (Giver) , the Believer, the Overseer, the Almighty, the Irresistible, the Sublime; Highly Exalted is Allah beyond what they associate.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُ ٱلْبَارِئُ ٱلْمُصَوِّرُ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: He is Allah, the Creator, the Maker, the Designer; His are the Most Beautiful Names. Whatever is in the heavens and the earth highly exalts Him, and He is the Almighty, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَّخِذُوا۟ عَدُوِّى وَعَدُوَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءَ تُلْقُونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا۟ بِمَا جَآءَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْحَقِّ يُخْرِجُونَ ٱلرَّسُولَ وَإِيَّاكُمْ ۙ أَن تُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ رَبِّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ خَرَجْتُمْ جِهَـٰدًا فِى سَبِيلِى وَٱبْتِغَآءَ مَرْضَاتِى ۚ تُسِرُّونَ إِلَيْهِم بِٱلْمَوَدَّةِ وَأَنَا۠ أَعْلَمُ بِمَآ أَخْفَيْتُمْ وَمَآ أَعْلَنتُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْهُ مِنكُمْ فَقَدْ ضَلَّ سَوَآءَ ٱلسَّبِيلِ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, do not take My enemies and your enemies as guardians, extending love towards them when they have denied what has come to you of the truth, evicting the Messenger and yourselves because you believe in Allah, your Lord—if you have set out to strive in My way and to seek My pleasure. How can you secretly express love towards them while I know better what you have hidden and what you have made public? And whoever of you does that has certainly strayed from the right way.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن يَثْقَفُوكُمْ يَكُونُوا۟ لَكُمْ أَعْدَآءً وَيَبْسُطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْكُمْ أَيْدِيَهُمْ وَأَلْسِنَتَهُم بِٱلسُّوٓءِ وَوَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تَكْفُرُونَ
verses.text: If they encounter you pl , they are enemies to you and they extend their hands and tongues against you with malice, for they would love that you become deniers.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَن تَنفَعَكُمْ أَرْحَامُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ ۚ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ يَفْصِلُ بَيْنَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: Neither your relatives 1 nor your children will benefit you; on the Day of Resurrection He will decide 2 between you, for Allah is All-Seeing of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ كَانَتْ لَكُمْ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ فِىٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥٓ إِذْ قَالُوا۟ لِقَوْمِهِمْ إِنَّا بُرَءَٰٓؤُا۟ مِنكُمْ وَمِمَّا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَفَرْنَا بِكُمْ وَبَدَا بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْعَدَٰوَةُ وَٱلْبَغْضَآءُ أَبَدًا حَتَّىٰ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَحْدَهُۥٓ إِلَّا قَوْلَ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ لِأَبِيهِ لَأَسْتَغْفِرَنَّ لَكَ وَمَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكَ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مِن شَىْءٍ ۖ رَّبَّنَا عَلَيْكَ تَوَكَّلْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ أَنَبْنَا وَإِلَيْكَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: Surely, there has always been an excellent role model for you pl in Abraham 1 and those with him, when they said to their people, “We disown you and what you worship apart from Allah. We have disbelieved 2 in you, and enmity and hatred have surfaced between us and you forever until you believe in Allah alone.” Except for the words of Abraham to his father, “I will ask forgiveness for you, though I cannot protect you from Allah.” “Our Lord, in You we have placed our trust, and to You we have turned penitent, for to You is the destiny.

verses.arabicUthmani: رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَا رَبَّنَآ ۖ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Our Lord, do not make us a means of trial for those who have denied, and forgive us, our Lord; You are indeed the Almighty, the All-Wise.”

verses.arabicUthmani: لَقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِيهِمْ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِّمَن كَانَ يَرْجُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ
verses.text: Indeed, there has always been an excellent role model in them for you pl (and) for anyone who has been putting hope in Allah and (expecting) the Last Day. But whoever turns away—indeed, Allah is the Self-Sufficient, the Praiseworthy.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ عَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ ٱلَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةً ۚ وَٱللَّهُ قَدِيرٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: Hopefully, Allah will produce love between you and those of them whom you took for enemies, for Allah is All-Powerful, and Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَمْ يُقَـٰتِلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَلَمْ يُخْرِجُوكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِكُمْ أَن تَبَرُّوهُمْ وَتُقْسِطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُقْسِطِينَ
verses.text: Allah does not forbid you pl from those who have neither combated you over religion nor evicted you from your homes—that you deal with them very kindly and equitably. Indeed, Allah loves the equitable.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ قَـٰتَلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَأَخْرَجُوكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِكُمْ وَظَـٰهَرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ إِخْرَاجِكُمْ أَن تَوَلَّوْهُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّهُمْ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: Rather, Allah forbids you pl from 1 those who combated you over religion and evicted you from your homes and backed up (your enemies) in your eviction. And whoever takes them as guardians—those are the unjust.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا جَآءَكُمُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتُ مُهَـٰجِرَٰتٍ فَٱمْتَحِنُوهُنَّ ۖ ٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِإِيمَـٰنِهِنَّ ۖ فَإِنْ عَلِمْتُمُوهُنَّ مُؤْمِنَـٰتٍ فَلَا تَرْجِعُوهُنَّ إِلَى ٱلْكُفَّارِ ۖ لَا هُنَّ حِلٌّ لَّهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحِلُّونَ لَهُنَّ ۖ وَءَاتُوهُم مَّآ أَنفَقُوا۟ ۚ وَلَا جُنَاحَ عَلَيْكُمْ أَن تَنكِحُوهُنَّ إِذَآ ءَاتَيْتُمُوهُنَّ أُجُورَهُنَّ ۚ وَلَا تُمْسِكُوا۟ بِعِصَمِ ٱلْكَوَافِرِ وَسْـَٔلُوا۟ مَآ أَنفَقْتُمْ وَلْيَسْـَٔلُوا۟ مَآ أَنفَقُوا۟ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ حُكْمُ ٱللَّهِ ۖ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, when believing women come to you immigrating, test them; Allah knows better about their faith. And if you pl find them to be faithful, do not send them back to the deniers; they are not lawful for them 1 nor are they lawful for them 2 . But give them what they have spent 3 . And no sin is committed by you if you marry them, provided you give them their compensation g . And do not hold on to ties with unbelieving women, but demand what you have spent and let them demand what they have spent. This is Allah’s judgment—He judges among you, for Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن فَاتَكُمْ شَىْءٌ مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُمْ إِلَى ٱلْكُفَّارِ فَعَاقَبْتُمْ فَـَٔاتُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ذَهَبَتْ أَزْوَٰجُهُم مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنفَقُوا۟ ۚ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنتُم بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: And if any of your pl wives should go over to the deniers and then you punish (them in retaliation) , then give those whose wives have gone away the equivalent of what they had spent. And be mindful of Allah in whom you are believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ إِذَا جَآءَكَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتُ يُبَايِعْنَكَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن لَّا يُشْرِكْنَ بِٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يَسْرِقْنَ وَلَا يَزْنِينَ وَلَا يَقْتُلْنَ أَوْلَـٰدَهُنَّ وَلَا يَأْتِينَ بِبُهْتَـٰنٍ يَفْتَرِينَهُۥ بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِنَّ وَأَرْجُلِهِنَّ وَلَا يَعْصِينَكَ فِى مَعْرُوفٍ ۙ فَبَايِعْهُنَّ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُنَّ ٱللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: O Prophet, if believing women come to you pledging allegiance to you that they will not associate anything with Allah, nor steal, nor fornicate, nor kill their children, nor commit perjury as to parenthood, nor disobey you in anything righteous—then accept their allegiance and ask Allah’s forgiveness for them; indeed, Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَوَلَّوْا۟ قَوْمًا غَضِبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ قَدْ يَئِسُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ كَمَا يَئِسَ ٱلْكُفَّارُ مِنْ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْقُبُورِ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, do not take for guardians people upon whom is Allah’s wrath—they have indeed despaired of the Hereafter as the deniers have despaired of the fellows of the graves.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth has been highly exalting Allah, and He is the Almighty, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لِمَ تَقُولُونَ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, why do you say what you do not do?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَبُرَ مَقْتًا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَن تَقُولُوا۟ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: It is most loathsome to Allah that you pl say what you do not do.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُقَـٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِهِۦ صَفًّا كَأَنَّهُم بُنْيَـٰنٌ مَّرْصُوصٌ
verses.text: Indeed, Allah loves those who combat in His way, lining up in ranks as though they were a compact structure.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذْ قَالَ مُوسَىٰ لِقَوْمِهِۦ يَـٰقَوْمِ لِمَ تُؤْذُونَنِى وَقَد تَّعْلَمُونَ أَنِّى رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ إِلَيْكُمْ ۖ فَلَمَّا زَاغُوٓا۟ أَزَاغَ ٱللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: And recall when Moses said to his people, “O my people, why do you hurt me, though you know that I am Allah’s Messenger to you?” And when they swerved, Allah caused their hearts to swerve, for Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذْ قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ يَـٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ إِنِّى رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ إِلَيْكُم مُّصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَىَّ مِنَ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةِ وَمُبَشِّرًۢا بِرَسُولٍ يَأْتِى مِنۢ بَعْدِى ٱسْمُهُۥٓ أَحْمَدُ ۖ فَلَمَّا جَآءَهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ قَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: And recall when Jesus, son of Mary, said, “O Children of Israel, I am Allah’s Messenger to you, confirming what preceded me of the Torah and a bearer of glad tidings of a messenger who comes after me, whose name is Ahmad.” Yet when he came to them with evident proofs, they said, “This is evident sorcery 1 .”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلْإِسْلَـٰمِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: And who is more unjust than one who fabricated lies against Allah when he was being invited to Islam? Thus Allah does not guide the unjust people.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُرِيدُونَ لِيُطْفِـُٔوا۟ نُورَ ٱللَّهِ بِأَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَٱللَّهُ مُتِمُّ نُورِهِۦ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
verses.text: They want to extinguish Allah’s Light with their mouths, but Allah shall perfect His Light, even though the deniers hate it.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلْحَقِّ لِيُظْهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ٱلْمُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: It is He who sent His Messenger with the guidance and the religion of truth to make it prevail over all religion, even though the pagans hate it.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ تِجَـٰرَةٍ تُنجِيكُم مِّنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, shall I inform you of a bargain that will save 1 you from a painful punishment?

verses.arabicUthmani: تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُجَـٰهِدُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِأَمْوَٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: That you pl believe in Allah and His Messenger, and strive in the way of Allah with your wealth and yourselves; that is better for you, if you only knew—

verses.arabicUthmani: يَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ وَيُدْخِلْكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ وَمَسَـٰكِنَ طَيِّبَةً فِى جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: He will forgive you pl your misdeeds and will enter you into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, and into beautiful residences in the Gardens of Eden; that is the great triumph.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُخْرَىٰ تُحِبُّونَهَا ۖ نَصْرٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَفَتْحٌ قَرِيبٌ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: And something else you pl love: support from Allah and an imminent conquest. So give glad tidings to the believers.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ كُونُوٓا۟ أَنصَارَ ٱللَّهِ كَمَا قَالَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ لِلْحَوَارِيِّـۧنَ مَنْ أَنصَارِىٓ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ قَالَ ٱلْحَوَارِيُّونَ نَحْنُ أَنصَارُ ٱللَّهِ ۖ فَـَٔامَنَت طَّآئِفَةٌ مِّنۢ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَكَفَرَت طَّآئِفَةٌ ۖ فَأَيَّدْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ عَلَىٰ عَدُوِّهِمْ فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ ظَـٰهِرِينَ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, be the supporters 1 of Allah as Jesus, son of Mary, said to the disciples, “Who are my supporters towards Allah?” The disciples said, “We are the supporters of Allah.” Then a faction of the Children of Israel attained faith while another faction denied it, and We aided those who had attained faith against their enemy, so they came to prevail.

verses.arabicUthmani: يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْمَلِكِ ٱلْقُدُّوسِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ
verses.text: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth highly exalts Allah, the Sovereign, the Holy, the Almighty, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى بَعَثَ فِى ٱلْأُمِّيِّـۧنَ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ يَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ وَيُزَكِّيهِمْ وَيُعَلِّمُهُمُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَإِن كَانُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: It is He who sent among the gentiles 1 a messenger from among themselves, reading His signs 2 to them and purifying them and teaching them the Scripture and wisdom—although they were indeed in evident misguidance before that—

verses.arabicUthmani: وَءَاخَرِينَ مِنْهُمْ لَمَّا يَلْحَقُوا۟ بِهِمْ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: and (to) others of them who have not yet joined them 1 . And He is the Almighty, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: That is Allah’s grace which He brings to whomever He wills, and Allah is the Possessor of great grace.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَثَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ حُمِّلُوا۟ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةَ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَحْمِلُوهَا كَمَثَلِ ٱلْحِمَارِ يَحْمِلُ أَسْفَارًۢا ۚ بِئْسَ مَثَلُ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: The likeness of those who were made to carry (the responsibility of) the Torah but then failed to carry it is as the likeness of the donkey carrying tomes. How miserable is the example of the people who rejected Allah’s signs, for Allah does not guide the unjust people.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ هَادُوٓا۟ إِن زَعَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءُ لِلَّهِ مِن دُونِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا۟ ٱلْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Say sg , “O you who have Judaized, if you claim to be the allies of Allah apart from (the rest of) mankind, then wish for death if you are truthful.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَتَمَنَّوْنَهُۥٓ أَبَدًۢا بِمَا قَدَّمَتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌۢ بِٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: But they will not wish for it ever due to what their hands have put forth, and Allah is All-Knowing of the unjust.

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْمَوْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَفِرُّونَ مِنْهُ فَإِنَّهُۥ مُلَـٰقِيكُمْ ۖ ثُمَّ تُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ عَـٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “Indeed, the death from which you pl flee—it is bound to encounter you, then you will be returned to the Knower of the hidden realm and the manifest, and He will inform you of what you used to do.”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا نُودِىَ لِلصَّلَوٰةِ مِن يَوْمِ ٱلْجُمُعَةِ فَٱسْعَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَذَرُوا۟ ٱلْبَيْعَ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, when the call to prayer is made on Friday, hasten to the remembrance of Allah and leave aside all selling; that is better for you if you only knew.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا قُضِيَتِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةُ فَٱنتَشِرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱبْتَغُوا۟ مِن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ وَٱذْكُرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًا لَّعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: Then when the prayer is concluded, disperse through the land and seek Allah’s grace and remember Allah much, that you pl may succeed.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا رَأَوْا۟ تِجَـٰرَةً أَوْ لَهْوًا ٱنفَضُّوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَتَرَكُوكَ قَآئِمًا ۚ قُلْ مَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهْوِ وَمِنَ ٱلتِّجَـٰرَةِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ
verses.text: Yet whenever they 1 come across a bargain or distraction they scramble towards it and leave you sg standing. Say, “What is with Allah is better than (any) distraction or bargain, and Allah is the Best of providers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا جَآءَكَ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقُونَ قَالُوا۟ نَشْهَدُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ إِنَّكَ لَرَسُولُهُۥ وَٱللَّهُ يَشْهَدُ إِنَّ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: When the hypocrites come to you sg , they say, “We bear witness that you are most surely Allah’s Messenger.” And Allah knows that you are most surely His Messenger, and Allah bears witness that the hypocrites are most surely liars:

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ أَيْمَـٰنَهُمْ جُنَّةً فَصَدُّوا۟ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ سَآءَ مَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: they have taken their oaths as a cover, and so they have barred (others) from the way of Allah; indeed, evil is what they have been doing.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ ءَامَنُوا۟ ثُمَّ كَفَرُوا۟ فَطُبِعَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ
verses.text: That is because they believed then they denied, so their hearts were sealed—thus they do not comprehend.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ تُعْجِبُكَ أَجْسَامُهُمْ ۖ وَإِن يَقُولُوا۟ تَسْمَعْ لِقَوْلِهِمْ ۖ كَأَنَّهُمْ خُشُبٌ مُّسَنَّدَةٌ ۖ يَحْسَبُونَ كُلَّ صَيْحَةٍ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ هُمُ ٱلْعَدُوُّ فَٱحْذَرْهُمْ ۚ قَـٰتَلَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ ۖ أَنَّىٰ يُؤْفَكُونَ
verses.text: Yet when you sg see them, their physiques impress you, and when they speak, you listen to what they say. They are like propped-up timber; they think every shout is aimed at them. They are the enemy, so beware of them. MayAllah strike them down! How can they be averted (from the truth) ?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَعَالَوْا۟ يَسْتَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ رَسُولُ ٱللَّهِ لَوَّوْا۟ رُءُوسَهُمْ وَرَأَيْتَهُمْ يَصُدُّونَ وَهُم مُّسْتَكْبِرُونَ
verses.text: And when it is said to them, “Come, the Messenger of Allah will ask forgiveness for you,” they keep turning 1 their heads aside and you sg see them turning away while acting arrogantly.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ أَسْتَغْفَرْتَ لَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ لَن يَغْفِرَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ
verses.text: It is the same for them whether you sg ask forgiveness for them or do not ask forgiveness for them—Allah will not forgive them; indeed, Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ لَا تُنفِقُوا۟ عَلَىٰ مَنْ عِندَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ حَتَّىٰ يَنفَضُّوا۟ ۗ وَلِلَّهِ خَزَآئِنُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ
verses.text: It is they who say: “Do not spend anything on those who side with Allah’s Messenger, that they may disperse.” And to Allah belong the treasuries of the heavens and the earth, but the hypocrites do not comprehend.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَقُولُونَ لَئِن رَّجَعْنَآ إِلَى ٱلْمَدِينَةِ لَيُخْرِجَنَّ ٱلْأَعَزُّ مِنْهَا ٱلْأَذَلَّ ۚ وَلِلَّهِ ٱلْعِزَّةُ وَلِرَسُولِهِۦ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: They say, “If we return to al-Madinah, the mightier ones will surely evict the inferior ones.” But might belongs to Allah and His Messenger and the believers, but the hypocrites do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تُلْهِكُمْ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, let neither your wealth nor your children distract you from the remembrance of Allah, and whoever does that—then those are the losers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَنفِقُوا۟ مِن مَّا رَزَقْنَـٰكُم مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَأْتِىَ أَحَدَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتُ فَيَقُولَ رَبِّ لَوْلَآ أَخَّرْتَنِىٓ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ قَرِيبٍ فَأَصَّدَّقَ وَأَكُن مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: And spend from what We have provided for you pl before death approaches one of you, whereupon he says, “My Lord, if only You would delay me for a short while so that I may donate and become of the righteous!”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَن يُؤَخِّرَ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهَا ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: But Allah will not delay a soul when its time has come, for Allah is All-Aware of what you pl do 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth highly exalts Allah; to Him belongs the dominion and to Him all praise is due, and He is All-Powerful over everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ فَمِنكُمْ كَافِرٌ وَمِنكُم مُّؤْمِنٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: It is He Who created you: so some of you are deniers and some of you are believers. And Allah is All-Seeing of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَصَوَّرَكُمْ فَأَحْسَنَ صُوَرَكُمْ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: He created the heavens and the earth with truth, and He designed you pl and perfected your designs, and to Him is the destiny.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَعْلَمُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُسِرُّونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: He knows whatever is in the heavens and the earth, and He knows whatever you pl keep secret and whatever you make public. For Allah is All-Knowing of what lies within the chests.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَبَؤُا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ فَذَاقُوا۟ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهِمْ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Has the news not reached you pl of those who denied before, so they tasted the grievous consequences of their affairs? For for them is a painful punishment.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُۥ كَانَت تَّأْتِيهِمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرٌ يَهْدُونَنَا فَكَفَرُوا۟ وَتَوَلَّوا۟ ۚ وَّٱسْتَغْنَى ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَنِىٌّ حَمِيدٌ
verses.text: That is because their messengers came to them with evident proofs, but they said, “Are human beings going to guide us?” So they denied and turned away, but Allah had no need (for anyone) , for Allah is Self-Sufficient, Praiseworthy.

verses.arabicUthmani: زَعَمَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَن لَّن يُبْعَثُوا۟ ۚ قُلْ بَلَىٰ وَرَبِّى لَتُبْعَثُنَّ ثُمَّ لَتُنَبَّؤُنَّ بِمَا عَمِلْتُمْ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٌ
verses.text: Those who have denied have claimed that they will not be resurrected. Say sg , “Yes indeed, by my Lord, you pl will be resurrected, then you will be informed of whatever you did, for that is easy for Allah.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَـَٔامِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَٱلنُّورِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلْنَا ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ
verses.text: So have faith in Allah and His Messenger and the Light 1 which We have sent down. For Allah is All-Aware of what you do.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يَجْمَعُكُمْ لِيَوْمِ ٱلْجَمْعِ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلتَّغَابُنِ ۗ وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَـٰلِحًا يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَيُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
verses.text: The day when He 1 gathers you pl for the Day of Gathering—that is the Day of Mutual Loss and Gain. And whoever attains faith in Allah and acts righteously, He 2 will remit his evil deeds and He will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein forever; that is the great triumph.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: But those who denied and rejected Our signs—those are the fellows of the Fire, abiding therein, and what a miserable destiny!

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَصَابَ مِن مُّصِيبَةٍ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۗ وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ يَهْدِ قَلْبَهُۥ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ
verses.text: No disaster occurs except by Allah’s leave. And whoever believes in Allah—He guides his heart. For Allah is All-Knowing of everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱلرَّسُولَ ۚ فَإِن تَوَلَّيْتُمْ فَإِنَّمَا عَلَىٰ رَسُولِنَا ٱلْبَلَـٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: So obey Allah and obey the Messenger. But if you pl turn away, then surely Our Messenger’s onlyduty is evident proclamation.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Allah—there is no god but He. So in Allah let the believers place their trust.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِنَّ مِنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدِكُمْ عَدُوًّا لَّكُمْ فَٱحْذَرُوهُمْ ۚ وَإِن تَعْفُوا۟ وَتَصْفَحُوا۟ وَتَغْفِرُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, indeed, among your spouses and your children are enemies to you, so beware of them. But if you pardon and overlook and forgive—then indeed, Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّمَآ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ فِتْنَةٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عِندَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: Indeed, your wealth and your children are but a means of trial, while with Allah is a great reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ وَٱسْمَعُوا۟ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ خَيْرًا لِّأَنفُسِكُمْ ۗ وَمَن يُوقَ شُحَّ نَفْسِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: So be mindful of Allah as much as you pl can, and listen and obey and give (in charity) for your own good. For whoever is protected from the stinginess of his (inner) self—those are the successful.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن تُقْرِضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا يُضَـٰعِفْهُ لَكُمْ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ شَكُورٌ حَلِيمٌ
verses.text: If you pl lend Allah a good loan, He will multiply it for you and will forgive you, for Allah is Ever Thankful, Forbearing—

verses.arabicUthmani: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: the Knower of the hidden realm and the manifest, the Almighty, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ إِذَا طَلَّقْتُمُ ٱلنِّسَآءَ فَطَلِّقُوهُنَّ لِعِدَّتِهِنَّ وَأَحْصُوا۟ ٱلْعِدَّةَ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ ۖ لَا تُخْرِجُوهُنَّ مِنۢ بُيُوتِهِنَّ وَلَا يَخْرُجْنَ إِلَّآ أَن يَأْتِينَ بِفَـٰحِشَةٍ مُّبَيِّنَةٍ ۚ وَتِلْكَ حُدُودُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَتَعَدَّ حُدُودَ ٱللَّهِ فَقَدْ ظَلَمَ نَفْسَهُۥ ۚ لَا تَدْرِى لَعَلَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْدِثُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ أَمْرًا
verses.text: O Prophet, when you pl divorce 1 women, then divorce them at a time when their (waiting) period can properly start, and calculate the period carefully. And be mindful of Allah, your pl Lord. Do not evict them from their houses nor shall they depart, unless they have committed an evident obscenity 2 . Those are the limits of Allah, and whoever oversteps Allah’s limits, then he has surely been unjust to himself. You sg never know—Allah may afterwards bring about a new matter.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا بَلَغْنَ أَجَلَهُنَّ فَأَمْسِكُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍ أَوْ فَارِقُوهُنَّ بِمَعْرُوفٍ وَأَشْهِدُوا۟ ذَوَىْ عَدْلٍ مِّنكُمْ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلشَّهَـٰدَةَ لِلَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ يُوعَظُ بِهِۦ مَن كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مَخْرَجًا
verses.text: Once they have reached their term, either retain pl them in accordance with what is fair or separate from them in accordance with what is fair. And call to witness two just people from among you and give upright testimony for Allah. That is to admonish whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, for whoever is mindful of Allah—He will make for him a way out (of every difficulty)

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بَـٰلِغُ أَمْرِهِۦ ۚ قَدْ جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدْرًا
verses.text: and will provide for him from where he never expects, and whoever places his trust in Allah—He will suffice him. Allah shall indeed conclude His decreed matters; Allah has set a due measure for everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّـٰٓـِٔى يَئِسْنَ مِنَ ٱلْمَحِيضِ مِن نِّسَآئِكُمْ إِنِ ٱرْتَبْتُمْ فَعِدَّتُهُنَّ ثَلَـٰثَةُ أَشْهُرٍ وَٱلَّـٰٓـِٔى لَمْ يَحِضْنَ ۚ وَأُو۟لَـٰتُ ٱلْأَحْمَالِ أَجَلُهُنَّ أَن يَضَعْنَ حَمْلَهُنَّ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مِنْ أَمْرِهِۦ يُسْرًا
verses.text: And those of your womenwho have despaired of (further) menstruation—if you have any doubts, their (waiting) period shall be three months, and also for those who have not menstruated 1 . And those who are pregnant—their term shall be until they have delivered. And whoever is mindful of Allah—He will ease his affairs.

verses.arabicUthmani: ذَٰلِكَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ أَنزَلَهُۥٓ إِلَيْكُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَيُعْظِمْ لَهُۥٓ أَجْرًا
verses.text: That is Allah’s command which He has sent down to you pl . And whoever is mindful of Allah—He will remit his evil deeds and amplify his reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَسْكِنُوهُنَّ مِنْ حَيْثُ سَكَنتُم مِّن وُجْدِكُمْ وَلَا تُضَآرُّوهُنَّ لِتُضَيِّقُوا۟ عَلَيْهِنَّ ۚ وَإِن كُنَّ أُو۟لَـٰتِ حَمْلٍ فَأَنفِقُوا۟ عَلَيْهِنَّ حَتَّىٰ يَضَعْنَ حَمْلَهُنَّ ۚ فَإِنْ أَرْضَعْنَ لَكُمْ فَـَٔاتُوهُنَّ أُجُورَهُنَّ ۖ وَأْتَمِرُوا۟ بَيْنَكُم بِمَعْرُوفٍ ۖ وَإِن تَعَاسَرْتُمْ فَسَتُرْضِعُ لَهُۥٓ أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: Allow them 1 to reside where you pl have been residing according to your means, and do not harass them to make things difficult for them. And if they are pregnant, spend for them until they deliver. And if they nurse your infant, pay them their reward and conduct your relation in accordance with what is fair. But if you disagree, then another woman will nurse him.

verses.arabicUthmani: لِيُنفِقْ ذُو سَعَةٍ مِّن سَعَتِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن قُدِرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقُهُۥ فَلْيُنفِقْ مِمَّآ ءَاتَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ ۚ لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا مَآ ءَاتَىٰهَا ۚ سَيَجْعَلُ ٱللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍ يُسْرًا
verses.text: The wealthy one shall spend according to his means, and the one whose resources have been restrained shall spend according to what Allah has given him. Allah never tasks any self beyond what He has brought it; Allah shall bring ease after hardship.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَكَأَيِّن مِّن قَرْيَةٍ عَتَتْ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهَا وَرُسُلِهِۦ فَحَاسَبْنَـٰهَا حِسَابًا شَدِيدًا وَعَذَّبْنَـٰهَا عَذَابًا نُّكْرًا
verses.text: And how many a town has defied the command of its Lord and His messengers, so We held it to a strict reckoning and We punished it with a dreadful punishment:

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَاقَتْ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهَا وَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ أَمْرِهَا خُسْرًا
verses.text: it tasted the grievous consequence of its affairs, and the consequence of its affairs was perdition.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَعَدَّ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا شَدِيدًا ۖ فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ يَـٰٓأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَلْبَـٰبِ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ۚ قَدْ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ إِلَيْكُمْ ذِكْرًا
verses.text: Allah has prepared for them a severe punishment, so beware of Allah, O you who possess intellect and have attained faith. Allah has sent down to you a Reminder—

verses.arabicUthmani: رَّسُولًا يَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ مُبَيِّنَـٰتٍ لِّيُخْرِجَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ مِنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِٱللَّهِ وَيَعْمَلْ صَـٰلِحًا يُدْخِلْهُ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۖ قَدْ أَحْسَنَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُۥ رِزْقًا
verses.text: a messenger who reads to you Allah’s signs 1 , (which are) clarifying 2 , in order to bring out those who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds from darkness into light. And whoever believes in Allah and acts righteously— He 3 will enter him into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, abiding therein forever; Allah has surely given him an excellent provision.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ وَمِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ مِثْلَهُنَّ يَتَنَزَّلُ ٱلْأَمْرُ بَيْنَهُنَّ لِتَعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَدْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًۢا
verses.text: Allah is He Who created seven heavens, and their like of earth. The command descends between them so that you pl may know that Allah is Powerful over everything and that Allah has encompassed everything in knowledge.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ لِمَ تُحَرِّمُ مَآ أَحَلَّ ٱللَّهُ لَكَ ۖ تَبْتَغِى مَرْضَاتَ أَزْوَٰجِكَ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: O Prophet, why do you prohibit what Allah has permitted for you,seeking to please your spouses? Yet Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Bestowing of mercy.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَدْ فَرَضَ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ تَحِلَّةَ أَيْمَـٰنِكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
verses.text: Allah has already ordained for you pl the dissolution of your oaths, for Allah is your Patron, and He is the All-Knowing, the All-Wise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذْ أَسَرَّ ٱلنَّبِىُّ إِلَىٰ بَعْضِ أَزْوَٰجِهِۦ حَدِيثًا فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَتْ بِهِۦ وَأَظْهَرَهُ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ عَرَّفَ بَعْضَهُۥ وَأَعْرَضَ عَنۢ بَعْضٍ ۖ فَلَمَّا نَبَّأَهَا بِهِۦ قَالَتْ مَنْ أَنۢبَأَكَ هَـٰذَا ۖ قَالَ نَبَّأَنِىَ ٱلْعَلِيمُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
verses.text: And recall when the Prophet confided a matter to some of his spouses, then as soon as one (of them) disclosed it (to another wife) and Allah made it known to him, he communicated part of it 1 and disregarded another part. Then, when he informed her of it, she said, “Who informed you of this?” He said, “The All-Knowing, the All-Aware informed me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: إِن تَتُوبَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ فَقَدْ صَغَتْ قُلُوبُكُمَا ۖ وَإِن تَظَـٰهَرَا عَلَيْهِ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ مَوْلَىٰهُ وَجِبْرِيلُ وَصَـٰلِحُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ۖ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ ظَهِيرٌ
verses.text: If you dl repent 1 to Allah, then your hearts have listened. But if both of you band together against him, then Allah is his Patron, as are Gabriel and the righteous believers. And, in addition, the angels will back him.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَسَىٰ رَبُّهُۥٓ إِن طَلَّقَكُنَّ أَن يُبْدِلَهُۥٓ أَزْوَٰجًا خَيْرًا مِّنكُنَّ مُسْلِمَـٰتٍ مُّؤْمِنَـٰتٍ قَـٰنِتَـٰتٍ تَـٰٓئِبَـٰتٍ عَـٰبِدَٰتٍ سَـٰٓئِحَـٰتٍ ثَيِّبَـٰتٍ وَأَبْكَارًا
verses.text: Perhaps, if he divorces 1 you pl , his Lord will give him in exchange better spouses than you: Muslim 2 , believing, devout, repentant, given to worshiping, given to fasting—whether previously married or virgins.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَهْلِيكُمْ نَارًا وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ عَلَيْهَا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظٌ شِدَادٌ لَّا يَعْصُونَ ٱللَّهَ مَآ أَمَرَهُمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, shield yourselves and your families from a fire whose fuel is people and stones; over it are fierce and powerful angels who never disobey Allah in anything He commands them, and they carry out whatever they are commanded.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَا تَعْتَذِرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: O you who have denied, make no excuses today; indeed, you are only being repaid for what you used to do.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ تُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ تَوْبَةً نَّصُوحًا عَسَىٰ رَبُّكُمْ أَن يُكَفِّرَ عَنكُمْ سَيِّـَٔاتِكُمْ وَيُدْخِلَكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ يَوْمَ لَا يُخْزِى ٱللَّهُ ٱلنَّبِىَّ وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ ۖ نُورُهُمْ يَسْعَىٰ بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَبِأَيْمَـٰنِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَآ أَتْمِمْ لَنَا نُورَنَا وَٱغْفِرْ لَنَآ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: O you who have attained faith, repent to Allah with sincere 1 repentance ; hopefully your Lord will remit your evil deeds and enter you into Gardens beneath which rivers flow, on the day when Allah will never disgrace the Prophet and those who believed with him. With their light streaming before them and to their right, they say, “Our Lord, perfect our light for us and forgive us; You are indeed All-Powerful over everything.”

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّبِىُّ جَـٰهِدِ ٱلْكُفَّارَ وَٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ وَٱغْلُظْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۚ وَمَأْوَىٰهُمْ جَهَنَّمُ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: O Prophet, strive hard against the deniers and the hypocrites, and be stern with them. And their shelter is Hell, and what a miserable destiny!

verses.arabicUthmani: ضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ٱمْرَأَتَ نُوحٍ وَٱمْرَأَتَ لُوطٍ ۖ كَانَتَا تَحْتَ عَبْدَيْنِ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا صَـٰلِحَيْنِ فَخَانَتَاهُمَا فَلَمْ يُغْنِيَا عَنْهُمَا مِنَ ٱللَّهِ شَيْـًٔا وَقِيلَ ٱدْخُلَا ٱلنَّارَ مَعَ ٱلدَّٰخِلِينَ
verses.text: Allah has set forth a parable for those who denied: the wife of Noah and the wife of Lot; they were under two servants of Our righteous servants but they betrayed them, so they availed them nothing against Allah, and it was said, “Enter the Fire with those who are entering.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَضَرَبَ ٱللَّهُ مَثَلًا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱمْرَأَتَ فِرْعَوْنَ إِذْ قَالَتْ رَبِّ ٱبْنِ لِى عِندَكَ بَيْتًا فِى ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَنَجِّنِى مِن فِرْعَوْنَ وَعَمَلِهِۦ وَنَجِّنِى مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: And Allah has set forth a parable for those who have attained faith: the wife of Pharaoh, when she said, “My Lord, build for me, with you, a house in the Garden (of Paradise) , and deliver me from Pharaoh and his actions, and deliver me from the unjust people.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَرْيَمَ ٱبْنَتَ عِمْرَٰنَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَحْصَنَتْ فَرْجَهَا فَنَفَخْنَا فِيهِ مِن رُّوحِنَا وَصَدَّقَتْ بِكَلِمَـٰتِ رَبِّهَا وَكُتُبِهِۦ وَكَانَتْ مِنَ ٱلْقَـٰنِتِينَ
verses.text: And Mary, the daughter of Imran, who guarded her chastity, and so We breathed into her of Our Spirit, and she believed in her Lord’s Words and His Scriptures 1 and was one of the devout.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
verses.text: Supremely Blessed be He in whose hand is the dominion, and He is All- Powerful over everything;

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَٱلْحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفُورُ
verses.text: the One Who created death and life to test you pl as to which of you is better in conduct, for He is the Almighty, the Oft-Forgiving;

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا ۖ مَّا تَرَىٰ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِن تَفَـٰوُتٍ ۖ فَٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ هَلْ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورٍ
verses.text: the One Who created seven heavens in layers: you sg see no discrepancy in the creation of the All-Merciful. So look again: can you see any splits?

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ يَنقَلِبْ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْبَصَرُ خَاسِئًا وَهُوَ حَسِيرٌ
verses.text: Then look again and again—your sg sight will return to you bedazzled and exhausted.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِمَصَـٰبِيحَ وَجَعَلْنَـٰهَا رُجُومًا لِّلشَّيَـٰطِينِ ۖ وَأَعْتَدْنَا لَهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: And indeed, We have adorned the lowest 1 heaven with lanterns and made them missiles against the Satans, and We have prepared for them the punishment of the Blaze.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِرَبِّهِمْ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ ۖ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: And for those who have denied their Lord is the punishment of Hell, and what a miserable destiny!

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ فِيهَا سَمِعُوا۟ لَهَا شَهِيقًا وَهِىَ تَفُورُ
verses.text: When they are thrown into it, they hear it roaring as it seethes—

verses.arabicUthmani: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلْغَيْظِ ۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلْقِىَ فِيهَا فَوْجٌ سَأَلَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَذِيرٌ
verses.text: it almost bursts with rage. Every time a crowd is thrown into it, its keepers ask them, “Did no warner come to you?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ قَدْ جَآءَنَا نَذِيرٌ فَكَذَّبْنَا وَقُلْنَا مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ كَبِيرٍ
verses.text: They said 1 , “Yes, a warner did come to us, but we disbelieved and said, ‘Allah did not bestow anything from on high; it is you pl who are greatly misguided!’”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْ كُنَّا نَسْمَعُ أَوْ نَعْقِلُ مَا كُنَّا فِىٓ أَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: And they said, “Had we listened or reasoned, we would not have been among the fellows of the Blaze.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱعْتَرَفُوا۟ بِذَنۢبِهِمْ فَسُحْقًا لِّأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
verses.text: Thus they acknowledged their misdeed, so away with the fellows of the Blaze.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌ وَأَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ
verses.text: Indeed, for those who fear their Lord though Unseen, there is forgiveness and a supreme reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَسِرُّوا۟ قَوْلَكُمْ أَوِ ٱجْهَرُوا۟ بِهِۦٓ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمٌۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
verses.text: And keep your pl words secret or say them aloud—indeed, He is All-Knowing of what lies within the chests.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَلَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ
verses.text: Would He not know whomever He has created, while He is the Subtle, the All-Aware?

verses.arabicUthmani: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًا فَٱمْشُوا۟ فِى مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِهِۦ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
verses.text: It is He who made the earth manageable for you pl , so walk through its regions and eat of His provision, and to Him is the Resurrection.

verses.arabicUthmani: ءَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يَخْسِفَ بِكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَمُورُ
verses.text: Are you pl confident that the One in heaven will not cause the earth to collapse beneath you as it spins?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يُرْسِلَ عَلَيْكُمْ حَاصِبًا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ كَيْفَ نَذِيرِ
verses.text: Or are you confident that the One in heaven will not unleash against you a violent storm? Then you will know what My 1 warning is like.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
verses.text: And surely those before them disbelieved (as well) , so how terrible was My condemnation!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلطَّيْرِ فَوْقَهُمْ صَـٰٓفَّـٰتٍ وَيَقْبِضْنَ ۚ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۭ بَصِيرٌ
verses.text: Have they not seen the birds above them, spreading their wings and folding them? None holds them except the All-Merciful; indeed, He is All-Seeing of everything.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى هُوَ جُندٌ لَّكُمْ يَنصُرُكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۚ إِنِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ إِلَّا فِى غُرُورٍ
verses.text: Or who is this who is an army for you pl , supporting you, apart from the All-Merciful? Indeed, the deniers are in nothing but a deception.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمَّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَرْزُقُكُمْ إِنْ أَمْسَكَ رِزْقَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّجُّوا۟ فِى عُتُوٍّ وَنُفُورٍ
verses.text: Or who is this that will provide for you if He withholds His provision? Rather, they persist in defiance and aversion.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَمَن يَمْشِى مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجْهِهِۦٓ أَهْدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمْشِى سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
verses.text: Is one who walks bent on his own face better guided or one who walks upright on a straight path?

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَكُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۖ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “It is He Who initiated you pl and made for you hearing and sight (s) and burning hearts; rarely do you give thanks.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِى ذَرَأَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ
verses.text: Say sg , “It is He Who scattered you pl on earth, and to Him you will be herded.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: And they say, “When will this promise be fulfilled if you pl are truthful?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ إِنَّمَا ٱلْعِلْمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ
verses.text: Say sg , “Indeed, knowledge is only with Allah, and indeed, I am only an evident warner.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهُ زُلْفَةً سِيٓـَٔتْ وُجُوهُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَقِيلَ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَدَّعُونَ
verses.text: But when they saw it approaching, the faces of those who had denied turned gloomy, and it was said, “This is what you pl used to claim 1 (would never happen) .”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَهْلَكَنِىَ ٱللَّهُ وَمَن مَّعِىَ أَوْ رَحِمَنَا فَمَن يُجِيرُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ مِنْ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ
verses.text: Say sg , “Have you seen: if Allah makes me and those with me perish or has mercy on us, who then will protect the deniers from a painful punishment?”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَعَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Say sg , “He is the All-Merciful; we have attained faith in Him, and in Him alone we have placed our trust, and soon you pl will know 1 who is in evident misguidance.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَصْبَحَ مَآؤُكُمْ غَوْرًا فَمَن يَأْتِيكُم بِمَآءٍ مَّعِينٍۭ
verses.text: Say sg , “Have you pl seen:if your water drains away, who then will bring you pure running water?”

verses.arabicUthmani: نٓ ۚ وَٱلْقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسْطُرُونَ
verses.text: Nûn. By the pen and all that they inscribe.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجْنُونٍ
verses.text: Your sg Lord’s blessing does not make you a madman.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّ لَكَ لَأَجْرًا غَيْرَ مَمْنُونٍ
verses.text: And most surely, for you sg is an unfailing reward.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ
verses.text: And very truly, you sg are of great moral character.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَتُبْصِرُ وَيُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: Thus you sg shall see and they shall see

verses.arabicUthmani: بِأَييِّكُمُ ٱلْمَفْتُونُ
verses.text: which of you is the demented.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, your sg Lord is He Who knows better who has strayed from His way, and it is He Who knows better of the rightly guided.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَا تُطِعِ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: So do not obey the disbelievers;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تُدْهِنُ فَيُدْهِنُونَ
verses.text: they would like you to compromise, then they too would compromise.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا تُطِعْ كُلَّ حَلَّافٍ مَّهِينٍ
verses.text: And do not obey any despicable swearer,

verses.arabicUthmani: هَمَّازٍ مَّشَّآءٍۭ بِنَمِيمٍ
verses.text: backbiter, spreader of malicious gossip,

verses.arabicUthmani: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
verses.text: preventer of good, transgressor, sinful,

verses.arabicUthmani: عُتُلٍّۭ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ زَنِيمٍ
verses.text: brutal; moreover, of spurious parentage!

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن كَانَ ذَا مَالٍ وَبَنِينَ
verses.text: Just 1 because he has money and sons,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
verses.text: when Our signs 1 are read to him, he says, “Legends of the ancients!”

verses.arabicUthmani: سَنَسِمُهُۥ عَلَى ٱلْخُرْطُومِ
verses.text: We will brand him on the snout.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا بَلَوْنَـٰهُمْ كَمَا بَلَوْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ إِذْ أَقْسَمُوا۟ لَيَصْرِمُنَّهَا مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: Indeed, We have tested them as We tested the fellows of the garden, when they swore to harvest it in the morning

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَسْتَثْنُونَ
verses.text: without any reservation.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
verses.text: Then a sweeping visitation from your sg Lord swept through it while they were asleep,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَصْبَحَتْ كَٱلصَّرِيمِ
verses.text: and in the morning it was as though harvested.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَتَنَادَوْا۟ مُصْبِحِينَ
verses.text: So they called to each other in the early morning:

verses.arabicUthmani: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰرِمِينَ
verses.text: “Go early to your pl field if you are going to harvest.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱنطَلَقُوا۟ وَهُمْ يَتَخَـٰفَتُونَ
verses.text: So they set out, murmuring to one another,

verses.arabicUthmani: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌ
verses.text: “Not one destitute person is to enter it upon you pl today.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَغَدَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْدٍ قَـٰدِرِينَ
verses.text: And early they went, resolved in intent.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهَا قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا لَضَآلُّونَ
verses.text: But when they saw it, they said, “Indeed, we are surely misguided;

verses.arabicUthmani: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ
verses.text: rather, we are deprived.”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
verses.text: The most reasonable of them said, “Did I not tell you pl , ‘if only you would highly exalt (God) ?’”

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
verses.text: They said, “Highly Exalted is our Lord; indeed, we were unjust.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍ يَتَلَـٰوَمُونَ
verses.text: Then they turned to each other, blaming one another.

verses.arabicUthmani: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا طَـٰغِينَ
verses.text: They said, “Woe to us; indeed, we have exceeded all limits.

verses.arabicUthmani: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
verses.text: Perhaps our Lord will give us a better substitute for it. Indeed, to our Lord we turn wishfully.”

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْعَذَابُ ۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ أَكْبَرُ ۚ لَوْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Such is the punishment (of this world) ; but the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
verses.text: Indeed, for the people who are mindful (of God) are Gardens of Bliss, with their Lord.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَفَنَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ كَٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
verses.text: Shall We treat the Muslims 1 like the criminals?

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا لَكُمْ كَيْفَ تَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: What is the matter with you pl ? How do you judge?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَكُمْ كِتَـٰبٌ فِيهِ تَدْرُسُونَ
verses.text: Or do you have a scripture in which you study,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ لَكُمْ فِيهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُونَ
verses.text: wherein there is whatever you choose?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَكُمْ أَيْمَـٰنٌ عَلَيْنَا بَـٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ ٱلْقِيَـٰمَةِ ۙ إِنَّ لَكُمْ لَمَا تَحْكُمُونَ
verses.text: Or do you have oaths from Us, binding until the Day of Resurrection, that you will have whatever you demand?

verses.arabicUthmani: سَلْهُمْ أَيُّهُم بِذَٰلِكَ زَعِيمٌ
verses.text: Ask sg them which of them guarantees that.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Or do they have associates? Then let them bring their associates if they are truthful.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
verses.text: On the day when the shin is exposed 1 and they are called to prostrate themselves, but they 2 are unable to.

verses.arabicUthmani: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا۟ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَـٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: Their sight (s) (subdued) in reverence, humiliation overwhelms them, for they had been called to prostrate themselves when they were sound.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَذَرْنِى وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ ۖ سَنَسْتَدْرِجُهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: So leave sg Me to those who reject this discourse; We will draw them forth gradually (to punishment) from where they do not know.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأُمْلِى لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ كَيْدِى مَتِينٌ
verses.text: And I will give them respite. Indeed, My plot is firm.

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.text: Or do you sg ask them for a reward, so they are burdened with debt?

verses.arabicUthmani: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.text: Or do they have (knowledge of) the hidden realm and they are writing it down?

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌ
verses.text: So wait patiently for the Decree of your sg Lord, and do not be like the Fellow of the Whale, who cried out in despair.

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّوْلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌ
verses.text: Were it not for his Lord’s favor that reached him, he would have been thrown into the wilderness, fully despised.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
verses.text: But his Lord chose him and made him one of the righteous.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَـٰرِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا۟ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجْنُونٌ
verses.text: Those who have denied almost stab you sg with their sight (s) when they hear the Reminder, and say, “He is indeed a madman!”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: But it is nothing other than a Reminder to (all creatures of) all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.text: The Reality.

verses.arabicUthmani: مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.text: What is the Reality?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ
verses.text: And what can make you sg realize what the Reality is?

verses.arabicUthmani: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ وَعَادٌۢ بِٱلْقَارِعَةِ
verses.text: Thamûd and ʻĀd disbelieved in the Shocking Event.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا ثَمُودُ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِٱلطَّاغِيَةِ
verses.text: So as for Thamûd, they were annihilated by the Overwhelming.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا عَادٌ فَأُهْلِكُوا۟ بِرِيحٍ صَرْصَرٍ عَاتِيَةٍ
verses.text: And as for ʻĀd, they were annihilated by a furious, roaring wind

verses.arabicUthmani: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
verses.text: which He unleashed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you sg could see the people tossed around as though they were stumps of hollow palm trees.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهَلْ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٍ
verses.text: So can you sg see any remnant of them?

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَآءَ فِرْعَوْنُ وَمَن قَبْلَهُۥ وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَـٰتُ بِٱلْخَاطِئَةِ
verses.text: Then Pharaoh and whoever was before him 1 and the Overturned Cities 2 came up with grave offenses

verses.arabicUthmani: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
verses.text: and disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with an overpowering grip.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ
verses.text: Indeed, when the waters overflowed We carried you pl in the running ship,

verses.arabicUthmani: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ
verses.text: making it a lesson for you pl —so that an attentive ear may take heed.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ نَفْخَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ
verses.text: Then, when the Trumpet is blown with a single blast,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٰحِدَةً
verses.text: and the earth and the mountains are lifted up and crushed with a single crush—

verses.arabicUthmani: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ
verses.text: on that day, the Inevitable Event shall come to pass

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِىَ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاهِيَةٌ
verses.text: and the heaven shall crack, for on that day it shall be frail.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ
verses.text: And the angels are ranged around its borders, while eight carry the Throne of your sg Lord above them on that day.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُعْرَضُونَ لَا تَخْفَىٰ مِنكُمْ خَافِيَةٌ
verses.text: On that day you pl are presented, and no hidden secret of yours remains hidden.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
verses.text: So as for the one who was given his record 1 in his right hand, he says, “Here, take my record and read it.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلَـٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.text: Indeed, I was certain that I would meet my reckoning.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ
verses.text: So he will be in a well-pleasing living,

verses.arabicUthmani: فِى جَنَّةٍ عَالِيَةٍ
verses.text: in a lofty Garden (of Paradise) ,

verses.arabicUthmani: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ
verses.text: its clusters (of fruit) within reach—

verses.arabicUthmani: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ
verses.text: “Eat and drink with satisfaction on account of what you pl did 1 in the days gone by.”

verses.arabicUthmani: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ
verses.text: But as for the one who was given his record a in his left hand, he says, “I wish I was never given my record

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ
verses.text: and never knew what my reckoning was.

verses.arabicUthmani: يَـٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ
verses.text: If only it was the end!

verses.arabicUthmani: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنِّى مَالِيَهْ ۜ
verses.text: My money cannot avail me;

verses.arabicUthmani: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطَـٰنِيَهْ
verses.text: my power has vanished from me.”

verses.arabicUthmani: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
verses.text: “Take pl him and shackle him,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ
verses.text: then scorch him in purgatory,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ
verses.text: then in a chain whose length is seventy cubits tie him up.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: For he would not believe in Allah, the Great,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
verses.text: nor would he urge (others to serve) food to the destitute sg .

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَيْسَ لَهُ ٱلْيَوْمَ هَـٰهُنَا حَمِيمٌ
verses.text: So he has no intimate (friend) here today,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنْ غِسْلِينٍ
verses.text: nor any food except scum,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَّا يَأْكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْخَـٰطِـُٔونَ
verses.text: which none eats except the wrongdoers.”

verses.arabicUthmani: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: So I swear by what you pl see

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: and what you do not see:

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ
verses.text: it is indeed the word 1 of a noble messenger

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: and in no way is it the word of a poet—little do you pl believe 1 ,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: nor is it the speech of a soothsayer—little do you remind yourselves 1 .

verses.arabicUthmani: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
verses.text: (It is) a bestowal from on high by the Lord of all realms.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَوْ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْنَا بَعْضَ ٱلْأَقَاوِيلِ
verses.text: And had he falsely attributed some statements to Us,

verses.arabicUthmani: لَأَخَذْنَا مِنْهُ بِٱلْيَمِينِ
verses.text: We would certainly have seized him strongly 1 ,

verses.arabicUthmani: ثُمَّ لَقَطَعْنَا مِنْهُ ٱلْوَتِينَ
verses.text: then We would certainly have slashed his aorta,

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَـٰجِزِينَ
verses.text: and in no way could any of you have defended him.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَذْكِرَةٌ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: And indeed, it is a reminding for the mindful pl (of God) .

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّا لَنَعْلَمُ أَنَّ مِنكُم مُّكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: And indeed, We do know that some of you are disbelievers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَسْرَةٌ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
verses.text: And indeed, it is surely a source of grief for the deniers.

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ
verses.text: And indeed, it is surely the truth of certitude.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
verses.text: So highly exalt the name of your sg Lord, the Great.

verses.arabicUthmani: سَأَلَ سَآئِلٌۢ بِعَذَابٍ وَاقِعٍ
verses.text: An asker asked 1 about a punishment sure to come

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّلْكَـٰفِرِينَ لَيْسَ لَهُۥ دَافِعٌ
verses.text: for the deniers, that none can repel—

verses.arabicUthmani: مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ذِى ٱلْمَعَارِجِ
verses.text: from Allah, Lord of the Ways of Ascent.

verses.arabicUthmani: تَعْرُجُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ
verses.text: Unto Him the angels and the Spirit ascend on a day the duration of which is fifty thousand years.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَٱصْبِرْ صَبْرًا جَمِيلًا
verses.text: So be sg patient with beautiful patience.

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّهُمْ يَرَوْنَهُۥ بَعِيدًا
verses.text: Indeed, they see it distant,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَنَرَىٰهُ قَرِيبًا
verses.text: but We see it near—

verses.arabicUthmani: يَوْمَ تَكُونُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ كَٱلْمُهْلِ
verses.text: on the day when the sky is like molten brass,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ
verses.text: and the mountains are like tufted wool,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَلَا يَسْـَٔلُ حَمِيمٌ حَمِيمًا
verses.text: and no intimate (friend) asks 1 his intimate (friend) —

verses.arabicUthmani: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمْ ۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلْمُجْرِمُ لَوْ يَفْتَدِى مِنْ عَذَابِ يَوْمِئِذٍۭ بِبَنِيهِ
verses.text: though they are shown each other. The criminal wishes he could be redeemed from the punishment of that day 1 by sacrificing his children

verses.arabicUthmani: وَصَـٰحِبَتِهِۦ وَأَخِيهِ
verses.text: and his female companion and his brother

verses.arabicUthmani: وَفَصِيلَتِهِ ٱلَّتِى تُـْٔوِيهِ
verses.text: and his kinsfolk who shelter him

verses.arabicUthmani: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
verses.text: and everyone on earth, so it would then save him.

verses.arabicUthmani: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهَا لَظَىٰ
verses.text: But no! It is a raging fire

verses.arabicUthmani: نَزَّاعَةً لِّلشَّوَىٰ
verses.text: that strips 1 away the scalps,

verses.arabicUthmani: تَدْعُوا۟ مَنْ أَدْبَرَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: inviting the one who had retreated and turned away 1

verses.arabicUthmani: وَجَمَعَ فَأَوْعَىٰٓ
verses.text: and accumulated (wealth) and hoarded.

verses.arabicUthmani: ۞ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا
verses.text: Indeed, man was created fretful:

verses.arabicUthmani: إِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ جَزُوعًا
verses.text: when touched by adversity he is impatient,

verses.arabicUthmani: وَإِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلْخَيْرُ مَنُوعًا
verses.text: and when touched by good he is ungenerous;

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ
verses.text: except the prayerful pl

verses.arabicUthmani: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ دَآئِمُونَ
verses.text: who are 1 constant at their prayers;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ مَّعْلُومٌ
verses.text: and those in whose wealth is a rightfully acknowledged share

verses.arabicUthmani: لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ
verses.text: for the asker and the deprived;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُصَدِّقُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
verses.text: and those who believe in the Day of Recompense;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
verses.text: and those who fear their Lord’s punishment—

verses.arabicUthmani: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّهِمْ غَيْرُ مَأْمُونٍ
verses.text: indeed, none can feel secure from their Lord’s punishment;

verses.arabicUthmani: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِفُرُوجِهِمْ حَـٰفِظُونَ
verses.text: and those who preserve their private parts 1 ,

verses.arabicUthmani: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ
verses.text: except from their spouses or those whom they rightfully possess—for then they are indeed not blameworthy.

verses.arabicUthmani: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ
